papers.title: Rhizome OS-1: Rhizome's Semi-Autonomous Operating System for Small Molecule Drug Discovery
papers.abstract: We present Rhizome OS-1, a semi-autonomous operating system for small molecule drug discovery in which multi-modal AI agents operate as a full multidisciplinary discovery team. These agents function as computational chemists, medicinal chemists, and patent agents: they write and execute analysis code (fingerprint clustering, R-group decomposition, substructure search), visually triage molecular grids using vision capabilities, formulate explicit medicinal chemistry hypotheses across three strategy tiers, assess patent freedom-to-operate, and dynamically adapt generation strategies based on empirical screening feedback. Powered by r1 - a 246M-parameter graph diffusion model trained on 800 million molecular graphs - the system generates novel chemical matter directly on molecular graphs using fragment masking, scaffold decoration, linker design, and graph editing primitives. In two oncology campaigns (BCL6 BTB domain and EZH2 SET domain), the agent team executed 26 seeds and produced 5,231 novel molecules. Across both targets, 91.9% of generated Murcko scaffolds are absent from ChEMBL, with median Tanimoto similarity of 0.56-0.69 to the nearest known active. Boltz-2 binding affinity predictions, calibrated against ChEMBL data, achieved Spearman correlations of -0.53 to -0.64 and ROC AUC values of 0.88-0.93. These results demonstrate that semi-autonomous agent systems, equipped with graph-native generative tools and physics-informed scoring, enable a new paradigm for early-stage drug discovery: scaled, rapid, and adaptive inverse design with embedded medicinal chemistry reasoning.

analysis.tldr: Rhizome OS-1 是一个半自主小分子药物发现操作系统，利用多模态 AI 代理模拟完整药物发现团队，结合图扩散模型生成新颖分子，并在两个肿瘤靶点中验证了有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统小分子药物发现流程耗时且昂贵，需要多学科专家协作，而现有 AI 方法通常只解决单一任务，缺乏端到端的自主推理和决策能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够模拟完整药物发现团队（计算化学家、药物化学家、专利代理人）的半自主操作系统，实现从分子生成到专利评估的闭环推理和自适应优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Rhizome OS-1，包含多模态 AI 代理（计算化学家、药物化学家、专利代理人）和 r1 图扩散模型（246M 参数，基于 8 亿分子图训练），支持片段掩码、支架装饰、连接子设计和图编辑等生成原语，并通过视觉能力进行分子网格分类和专利自由实施评估。
contributions: 提出首个半自主操作系统 Rhizome OS-1，集成多模态 AI 代理模拟完整药物发现团队。
训练了 r1 图扩散模型，能够直接在图结构上生成新颖分子，并支持多种生成原语。
在两个肿瘤靶点（BCL6 BTB 域和 EZH2 SET 域）上验证了系统有效性，生成分子中 91.9% 的 Murcko 支架在 ChEMBL 中未见。
analysis.experiments: 在两个肿瘤靶点（BCL6 BTB 域和 EZH2 SET 域）上，代理团队执行了 26 个种子并生成 5,231 个新颖分子。91.9% 的生成 Murcko 支架在 ChEMBL 中未见，中位 Tanimoto 相似度为 0.56-0.69。Boltz-2 结合亲和力预测与 ChEMBL 数据校准后，Spearman 相关系数为 -0.53 至 -0.64，ROC AUC 为 0.88-0.93。
limitations: 系统仅在两个肿瘤靶点上进行了验证，泛化性有待进一步评估。
Boltz-2 预测的 Spearman 相关性中等，亲和力预测精度可能仍有提升空间。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: Rhizome OS-1 是一个半自主小分子药物发现操作系统，利用多模态 AI 代理模拟完整药物发现团队，结合图扩散模型生成新颖分子，并在两个肿瘤靶点中验证了有效性。

papers.title: ReflectRM: Boosting Generative Reward Models via Self-Reflection within a Unified Judgment Framework
papers.abstract: Reward Models (RMs) are critical components in the Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) pipeline, directly determining the alignment quality of Large Language Models (LLMs). Recently, Generative Reward Models (GRMs) have emerged as a superior paradigm, offering higher interpretability and stronger generalization than traditional scalar RMs. However, existing methods for GRMs focus primarily on outcome-level supervision, neglecting analytical process quality, which constrains their potential. To address this, we propose ReflectRM, a novel GRM that leverages self-reflection to assess analytical quality and enhance preference modeling. ReflectRM is trained under a unified generative framework for joint modeling of response preference and analysis preference. During inference, we use its self-reflection capability to identify the most reliable analysis, from which the final preference prediction is derived. Experiments across four benchmarks show that ReflectRM consistently improves performance, achieving an average accuracy gain of +3.7 on Qwen3-4B. Further experiments confirm that response preference and analysis preference are mutually reinforcing. Notably, ReflectRM substantially mitigates positional bias, yielding +10.2 improvement compared with leading GRMs and establishing itself as a more stable evaluator. Our code is available at https://github.com/yuliangCarmelo/ReflectRM.

analysis.tldr: 提出 ReflectRM，通过自反思机制统一建模响应偏好与分析偏好，显著提升生成式奖励模型的偏好预测准确性与稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式奖励模型（GRM）虽优于传统标量奖励模型，但现有方法仅关注结果级监督，忽视分析过程质量，限制了其潜力。
analysis.problem: 如何利用自反思能力评估分析质量，以增强生成式奖励模型的偏好建模能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 ReflectRM，在统一生成框架下联合建模响应偏好与分析偏好；推理时通过自反思选择最可靠分析，据此预测最终偏好。
contributions: 提出 ReflectRM，一种利用自反思评估分析质量并增强偏好建模的新型生成式奖励模型。
在四个基准上平均准确率提升+3.7，并显著缓解位置偏差（+10.2），成为更稳定的评估器。
analysis.experiments: 在四个基准上评估，使用 Qwen3-4B 获得平均准确率提升+3.7，位置偏差改善+10.2；代码已开源。
limitations: 可能依赖自反思机制的计算开销。

analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 ReflectRM，通过自反思机制统一建模响应偏好与分析偏好，显著提升生成式奖励模型的偏好预测准确性与稳定性。

papers.title: Beyond Human-Readable: Rethinking Software Engineering Conventions for the Agentic Development Era
papers.abstract: For six decades, software engineering principles have been optimized for a single consumer: the human developer. The rise of agentic AI development, where LLM-based agents autonomously read, write, navigate, and debug codebases, introduces a new primary consumer with fundamentally different constraints. This paper presents a systematic analysis of human-centric conventions under agentic pressure and proposes a key design principle: semantic density optimization, eliminating tokens that carry zero information while preserving tokens that carry high semantic value. We validate this principle through a controlled experiment on log format token economy across four conditions (human-readable, structured, compressed, and tool-assisted compressed), demonstrating a counterintuitive finding: aggressive compression increased total session cost by 67% despite reducing input tokens by 17%, because it shifted interpretive burden to the model's reasoning phase. We extend this principle to propose the rehabilitation of classical anti-patterns, introduce the program skeleton concept for agentic code navigation, and argue for a fundamental decoupling of semantic intent from human-readable representation.

analysis.tldr: 针对LLM Agent的软件工程应优化语义密度而非人类可读性，过度压缩反而增加成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统软件工程原则以人类开发者为中心，但LLM Agent作为新的代码消费者具有不同约束，现有约定可能不适用于Agent开发。
analysis.problem: 如何设计适合LLM Agent的软件工程约定，以平衡token效率与模型推理负担。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现：过度压缩日志格式虽减少输入token，但将解释负担转移至模型推理阶段，导致总成本增加67%。
analysis.method: 提出语义密度优化原则，消除零信息token，保留高语义值token；并引入程序骨架概念用于Agent代码导航。
contributions: 系统分析人类中心约定在Agent开发中的局限性
提出语义密度优化原则并实验验证其反直觉效果
提出程序骨架概念和经典反模式的重构
analysis.experiments: 在日志格式token经济性上进行四条件（人类可读、结构化、压缩、工具辅助压缩）控制实验，摘要未提供具体数据集或基准。
limitations: 实验仅针对日志格式，未覆盖其他软件工程约定
未讨论不同模型架构或任务类型的影响

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对LLM Agent的软件工程应优化语义密度而非人类可读性，过度压缩反而增加成本。

papers.title: Triage: Routing Software Engineering Tasks to Cost-Effective LLM Tiers via Code Quality Signals
papers.abstract: Context: AI coding agents route every task to a single frontier large language model (LLM), paying premium inference cost even when many tasks are routine. Objectives: We propose Triage, a framework that uses code health metrics -- indicators of software maintainability -- as a routing signal to assign each task to the cheapest model tier whose output passes the same verification gate as the expensive model. Methods: Triage defines three capability tiers (light, standard, heavy -- mirroring, e.g., Haiku, Sonnet, Opus) and routes tasks based on pre-computed code health sub-factors and task metadata. We design an evaluation comparing three routing policies on SWE-bench Lite (300 tasks across three model tiers): heuristic thresholds, a trained ML classifier, and a perfect-hindsight oracle. Results: We analytically derived two falsifiable conditions under which the tier-dependent asymmetry (medium LLMs benefit from clean code while frontier models do not) yields cost-effective routing: the light-tier pass rate on healthy code must exceed the inter-tier cost ratio, and code health must discriminate the required model tier with at least a small effect size ($\hat{p} \geq 0.56$). Conclusion: Triage transforms a diagnostic code quality metric into an actionable model-selection signal. We present a rigorous evaluation protocol to test the cost--quality trade-off and identify which code health sub-factors drive routing decisions.

analysis.tldr: 提出Triage框架，利用代码健康指标将软件工程任务路由到成本效益最优的LLM层级。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI编码代理对所有任务都使用单一前沿LLM，导致即使常规任务也支付高昂推理成本，缺乏成本效益。
analysis.problem: 如何根据任务特性自动选择最经济的LLM层级，同时保证输出质量与昂贵模型相当。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 定义三个能力层级（轻量、标准、重型），基于预计算的代码健康子因素和任务元数据，通过启发式阈值、ML分类器或完美后见之明策略进行路由。
contributions: 提出Triage框架，将代码健康指标作为模型选择信号。
推导出两个可证伪条件，用于判断层级不对称性是否带来成本效益。
在SWE-bench Lite上设计评估协议，比较三种路由策略。
analysis.experiments: 在SWE-bench Lite（300个任务，三个模型层级）上比较三种路由策略：启发式阈值、训练好的ML分类器、完美后见之明。
limitations: 实验仅在SWE-bench Lite上进行，泛化性未知。
代码健康指标可能不适用于所有软件工程任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法有实用价值，但实验规模有限，创新性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Triage框架，利用代码健康指标将软件工程任务路由到成本效益最优的LLM层级。

papers.title: Cluster Attention for Graph Machine Learning
papers.abstract: Message Passing Neural Networks have recently become the most popular approach to graph machine learning tasks; however, their receptive field is limited by the number of message passing layers. To increase the receptive field, Graph Transformers with global attention have been proposed; however, global attention does not take into account the graph topology and thus lacks graph-structure-based inductive biases, which are typically very important for graph machine learning tasks. In this work, we propose an alternative approach: cluster attention (CLATT). We divide graph nodes into clusters with off-the-shelf graph community detection algorithms and let each node attend to all other nodes in each cluster. CLATT provides large receptive fields while still having strong graph-structure-based inductive biases. We show that augmenting Message Passing Neural Networks or Graph Transformers with CLATT significantly improves their performance on a wide range of graph datasets including datasets from the recently introduced GraphLand benchmark representing real-world applications of graph machine learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出聚类注意力机制，在保持图结构归纳偏好的同时扩大感受野，显著提升图神经网络性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 消息传递神经网络受限于层数导致感受野有限，而图Transformer的全局注意力缺乏图结构归纳偏好，两者均存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲图结构归纳偏好的前提下，扩大图神经网络的感受野。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用现成的图社区检测算法将节点划分为簇，让每个节点关注同一簇内的所有其他节点，实现聚类注意力（CLATT）。
contributions: 提出聚类注意力机制，结合了局部消息传递和全局注意力的优点。
在多个图数据集上验证了CLATT增强消息传递神经网络和图Transformer的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在包括GraphLand基准在内的多个图数据集上进行了实验，结果显示性能显著提升。
limitations: 聚类质量依赖社区检测算法，可能影响注意力效果。
未讨论计算复杂度与可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，对图学习领域有实际价值，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出聚类注意力机制，在保持图结构归纳偏好的同时扩大感受野，显著提升图神经网络性能。

papers.title: Enabling Intrinsic Reasoning over Dense Geospatial Embeddings with DFR-Gemma
papers.abstract: Representation learning for geospatial and spatio-temporal data plays a critical role in enabling general-purpose geospatial intelligence. Recent geospatial foundation models, such as the Population Dynamics Foundation Model (PDFM), encode complex population and mobility dynamics into compact embeddings. However, their integration with Large Language Models (LLMs) remains limited. Existing approaches to LLM integration treat these embeddings as retrieval indices or convert them into textual descriptions for reasoning, introducing redundancy, token inefficiency, and numerical inaccuracies. We propose Direct Feature Reasoning-Gemma (DFR-Gemma), a novel framework that enables LLMs to reason directly over dense geospatial embeddings. DFR aligns high-dimensional embeddings with the latent space of an LLM via a lightweight projector, allowing embeddings to be injected as semantic tokens alongside natural language instructions. This design eliminates the need for intermediate textual representations and enables intrinsic reasoning over spatial features. To evaluate this paradigm, we introduce a multi-task geospatial benchmark that pairs embeddings with diverse question-answer tasks, including feature querying, comparison, and semantic description. Experimental results show that DFR allows LLMs to decode latent spatial patterns and perform accurate zero-shot reasoning across tasks, while significantly improving efficiency compared to text-based baselines. Our results demonstrate that treating embeddings as primary data inputs, provides a more direct, efficient, and scalable approach to multimodal geospatial intelligence.

analysis.tldr: 提出DFR-Gemma框架，让LLM直接对稠密地理空间嵌入进行推理，无需中间文本转换。
analysis.research_motivation: 地理空间基础模型（如PDFM）生成的嵌入难以与LLM高效集成，现有方法将嵌入转为文本描述会导致冗余、token效率低和数值不准确。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM直接对稠密地理空间嵌入进行推理，避免中间文本表示带来的效率和信息损失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过轻量级投影器将高维地理空间嵌入对齐到LLM的潜在空间，使嵌入作为语义token与自然语言指令一同输入，实现直接推理。
contributions: 提出DFR-Gemma框架，实现LLM对稠密地理空间嵌入的直接推理。
引入多任务地理空间基准，包含特征查询、比较和语义描述等任务。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明DFR-Gemma在零样本推理中准确解码空间模式，且效率显著优于基于文本的基线方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的地理空间嵌入（如PDFM）。
投影器训练需要配对数据，可能限制泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖但应用领域较窄，实验信息有限，建议保存以供参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DFR-Gemma框架，让LLM直接对稠密地理空间嵌入进行推理，无需中间文本转换。

papers.title: CLEAR: Context Augmentation from Contrastive Learning of Experience via Agentic Reflection
papers.abstract: Large language model agents rely on effective model context to obtain task-relevant information for decision-making. Many existing context engineering approaches primarily rely on the context generated from the past experience and retrieval mechanisms that reuse these context. However, retrieved context from past tasks must be adapted by the execution agent to fit new situations, placing additional reasoning burden on the underlying LLM. To address this limitation, we propose a generative context augmentation framework using Contrastive Learning of Experience via Agentic Reflection (CLEAR). CLEAR first employs a reflection agent to perform contrastive analysis over past execution trajectories and summarize useful context for each observed task. These summaries are then used as supervised fine-tuning data to train a context augmentation model (CAM). Then we further optimize CAM using reinforcement learning, where the reward signal is obtained by running the task execution agent. By learning to generate task-specific knowledge rather than retrieve knowledge from the past, CAM produces context that is better tailored to the current task. We conduct comprehensive evaluations on the AppWorld and WebShop benchmarks. Experimental results show that CLEAR consistently outperforms strong baselines. It improves task completion rate from 72.62% to 81.15% on AppWorld test set and averaged reward from 0.68 to 0.74 on a subset of WebShop, compared with baseline agent. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/awslabs/CLEAR.

analysis.tldr: 提出CLEAR框架，通过对比学习与强化学习训练上下文增强模型，生成任务定制化知识以提升LLM Agent决策能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有上下文工程方法依赖检索历史经验，但检索到的上下文需执行Agent自行适配，增加了LLM的推理负担，限制了任务完成效率。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成适应新任务的定制化上下文，而非依赖检索和Agent手动适配历史经验。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CLEAR框架：1) 反射Agent对历史轨迹进行对比分析并总结有用上下文；2) 用这些总结微调上下文增强模型(CAM)；3) 通过强化学习优化CAM，奖励信号来自任务执行Agent的运行结果。
contributions: 提出生成式上下文增强框架CLEAR，通过对比学习和强化学习训练CAM生成任务定制化知识。
在AppWorld和WebShop基准上验证了CLEAR优于强基线，任务完成率从72.62%提升至81.15%，平均奖励从0.68提升至0.74。
analysis.experiments: 在AppWorld和WebShop基准上评估，CLEAR在AppWorld测试集上将任务完成率从72.62%提升至81.15%，在WebShop子集上将平均奖励从0.68提升至0.74。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的历史轨迹数据。
强化学习训练的计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合对比学习和强化学习生成上下文，实验效果显著，与Agent方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CLEAR框架，通过对比学习与强化学习训练上下文增强模型，生成任务定制化知识以提升LLM Agent决策能力。

papers.title: Private Seeds, Public LLMs: Realistic and Privacy-Preserving Synthetic Data Generation
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as a powerful tool for synthetic data generation. A particularly important use case is producing synthetic replicas of private text, which requires carefully balancing privacy and utility. We propose Realistic and Privacy-Preserving Synthetic Data Generation (RPSG), which uses private seeds and integrates privacy-preserving strategies, including a formal differential privacy (DP) mechanism in the candidate selection, to generate realistic synthetic data. Comprehensive experiments against state-of-the-art private synthetic data generation methods demonstrate that RPSG achieves high fidelity to private data while providing strong privacy protection.

analysis.tldr: 提出RPSG方法，利用私有种子和差分隐私机制生成高保真且隐私保护的合成文本数据。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成合成数据时，复制私有文本需平衡隐私与效用，现有方法难以兼顾。
analysis.problem: 如何生成既真实反映私有数据分布又满足差分隐私的合成文本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: RPSG：使用私有种子作为输入，在候选选择中集成形式化差分隐私机制。
contributions: 提出RPSG框架，结合私有种子与差分隐私实现隐私保护合成数据生成。
实验证明RPSG在保真度和隐私保护上优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 与最先进的私有合成数据生成方法进行对比实验，摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖种子数据的质量。
差分隐私机制可能影响生成数据的多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但实验细节不足，与隐私保护方向相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RPSG方法，利用私有种子和差分隐私机制生成高保真且隐私保护的合成文本数据。

papers.title: ConsistRM: Improving Generative Reward Models via Consistency-Aware Self-Training
papers.abstract: Generative reward models (GRMs) have emerged as a promising approach for aligning Large Language Models (LLMs) with human preferences by offering greater representational capacity and flexibility than traditional scalar reward models. However, GRMs face two major challenges: reliance on costly human-annotated data restricts scalability, and self-training approaches often suffer from instability and vulnerability to reward hacking. To address these issues, we propose ConsistRM, a self-training framework that enables effective and stable GRM training without human annotations. ConsistRM incorporates the Consistency-Aware Answer Reward, which produces reliable pseudo-labels with temporal consistency, thereby providing more stable model optimization. Moreover, the Consistency-Aware Critique Reward is introduced to assess semantic consistency across multiple critiques and allocates fine-grained and differentiated rewards. Experiments on five benchmark datasets across four base models demonstrate that ConsistRM outperforms vanilla Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT) by an average of 1.5%. Further analysis shows that ConsistRM enhances output consistency and mitigates position bias caused by input order, highlighting the effectiveness of consistency-aware rewards in improving GRMs. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/yuliangCarmelo/ConsistRM.

analysis.tldr: ConsistRM通过一致性感知自训练提升生成式奖励模型的稳定性和性能，无需人工标注。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式奖励模型（GRM）在LLM对齐中具有潜力，但依赖昂贵的人工标注数据限制了可扩展性，且自训练方法不稳定、易受奖励黑客攻击。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有人工标注的情况下实现有效且稳定的GRM自训练，避免奖励黑客和训练不稳定问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自训练GRM存在不稳定性和奖励黑客问题，且输出一致性和位置偏差影响模型性能。
analysis.method: 提出ConsistRM框架，包含一致性感知答案奖励（产生可靠伪标签）和一致性感知批评奖励（评估多个批评的语义一致性并分配细粒度奖励）。
contributions: 提出ConsistRM自训练框架，无需人工标注即可稳定训练GRM。
引入两种一致性感知奖励机制，提升伪标签可靠性和模型优化稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 在五个基准数据集和四个基础模型上实验，ConsistRM平均优于vanilla RFT 1.5%，并提升了输出一致性、减轻了位置偏差。
limitations: 可能依赖基础模型的质量，对弱基础模型效果有限。
一致性感知奖励的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，与LLM对齐方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ConsistRM通过一致性感知自训练提升生成式奖励模型的稳定性和性能，无需人工标注。

papers.title: Healthcare AI for Automation or Allocation? A Transaction Cost Economics Framework
papers.abstract: Healthcare productivity is shaped not only by clinical complexity but by the costs of coordinating work under uncertainty. Transaction-cost economics offers a theory of these coordination frictions, yet has rarely been operationalised at task level across health occupations. Using task statements and frequency weights from the O*NET occupational database, we characterised healthcare work at task granularity and coded each unique task using a constrained large language model into one dominant transaction-cost category (information search, decision and bargaining, monitoring and enforcement, or adaptation and coordination) together with an overall transaction-cost intensity score. Aggregating to the occupation level, clinician roles exhibited substantially higher transaction-cost intensity than non-clinician roles, driven primarily by greater burdens of information search and decision-related coordination, while dispersion of transaction costs within occupations did not differ. These findings demonstrate systematic heterogeneity in the nature of coordination work across healthcare roles and suggest that the opportunities for digital and AI interventions are unevenly distributed, shaped less by technical task complexity than by underlying coordination structure.

analysis.tldr: 用交易成本经济学框架分析医疗工作协调成本，发现临床角色交易成本强度显著更高，AI自动化机会分布不均。
analysis.research_motivation: 医疗生产力受协调成本影响，但交易成本经济学很少在任务层面被操作化，缺乏对医疗工作协调摩擦的系统量化。
analysis.problem: 如何从交易成本角度量化医疗工作的协调负担，并揭示不同职业角色在协调结构上的异质性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 临床角色的交易成本强度显著高于非临床角色，主要由信息搜索和决策相关协调驱动，但职业内部交易成本离散度无显著差异。
analysis.method: 使用O*NET数据库的任务陈述和频率权重，通过约束大语言模型将每个任务编码为交易成本类别（信息搜索、决策与谈判、监控与执行、适应与协调）并计算交易成本强度分数。
contributions: 将交易成本经济学操作化为任务级编码框架，适用于医疗工作分析。
揭示医疗角色间协调结构异质性，指出AI干预机会受协调结构而非技术复杂度影响。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖O*NET数据库，可能不覆盖所有医疗任务。
LLM编码可能存在分类偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖但实验信息有限，与核心方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用交易成本经济学框架分析医疗工作协调成本，发现临床角色交易成本强度显著更高，AI自动化机会分布不均。

papers.title: Active Reward Machine Inference From Raw State Trajectories
papers.abstract: Reward machines are automaton-like structures that capture the memory required to accomplish a multi-stage task. When combined with reinforcement learning or optimal control methods, they can be used to synthesize robot policies to achieve such tasks. However, specifying a reward machine by hand, including a labeling function capturing high-level features that the decisions are based on, can be a daunting task. This paper deals with the problem of learning reward machines directly from raw state and policy information. As opposed to existing works, we assume no access to observations of rewards, labels, or machine nodes, and show what trajectory data is sufficient for learning the reward machine in this information-scarce regime. We then extend the result to an active learning setting where we incrementally query trajectory extensions to improve data (and indirectly computational) efficiency. Results are demonstrated with several grid world examples.

analysis.tldr: 提出从原始状态轨迹中主动推断奖励机器的方法，无需奖励、标签或节点观测。
analysis.research_motivation: 奖励机器能有效捕捉多阶段任务所需记忆，但手动指定（包括标签函数）非常困难，现有方法需要奖励或标签观测，限制了实用性。
analysis.problem: 在无奖励、标签或机器节点观测的信息稀缺条件下，仅从原始状态轨迹学习奖励机器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 首先分析在信息稀缺条件下哪些轨迹数据足以学习奖励机器，然后扩展为主动学习框架，通过增量查询轨迹扩展来提高数据和计算效率。
contributions: 证明了在无奖励、标签或节点观测下，仅从原始状态轨迹可学习奖励机器的充分条件。
提出主动学习策略，通过增量查询轨迹扩展提升学习效率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于离散状态和动作的网格世界环境。
主动查询策略在复杂连续空间中的效率未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但实验信息不足，应用场景有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出从原始状态轨迹中主动推断奖励机器的方法，无需奖励、标签或节点观测。

papers.title: Semantic Intent Fragmentation: A Single-Shot Compositional Attack on Multi-Agent AI Pipelines
papers.abstract: We introduce Semantic Intent Fragmentation (SIF), an attack class against LLM orchestration systems where a single, legitimately phrased request causes an orchestrator to decompose a task into subtasks that are individually benign but jointly violate security policy. Current safety mechanisms operate at the subtask level, so each step clears existing classifiers -- the violation only emerges at the composed plan. SIF exploits OWASP LLM06:2025 through four mechanisms: bulk scope escalation, silent data exfiltration, embedded trigger deployment, and quasi-identifier aggregation, requiring no injected content, no system modification, and no attacker interaction after the initial request. We construct a three-stage red-teaming pipeline grounded in OWASP, MITRE ATLAS, and NIST frameworks to generate realistic enterprise scenarios. Across 14 scenarios spanning financial reporting, information security, and HR analytics, a GPT-20B orchestrator produces policy-violating plans in 71% of cases (10/14) while every subtask appears benign. Three independent signals validate this: deterministic taint analysis, chain-of-thought evaluation, and a cross-model compliance judge with 0% false positives. Stronger orchestrators increase SIF success rates. Plan-level information-flow tracking combined with compliance evaluation detects all attacks before execution, showing the compositional safety gap is closable.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义意图碎片化（SIF）攻击，利用多智能体LLM编排系统的任务分解漏洞，使单个合法请求生成整体违规但子任务无害的计划。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前多智能体LLM编排系统的安全机制仅在子任务层面检测，无法捕获组合后出现的违规行为，存在安全漏洞。
analysis.problem: 解决多智能体LLM编排系统中，单个合法请求通过任务分解绕过子任务级安全检测，生成整体违规计划的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SIF攻击类，包含四种机制（批量范围升级、静默数据窃取、嵌入式触发器部署、准标识符聚合），并构建基于OWASP、MITRE ATLAS和NIST框架的三阶段红队流水线。
contributions: 提出语义意图碎片化（SIF）攻击类，揭示多智能体LLM编排系统的组合安全漏洞。
构建三阶段红队流水线，在14个企业场景中验证攻击有效性，并展示通过计划级信息流追踪和合规评估可检测所有攻击。
analysis.experiments: 在14个企业场景（涵盖财务报告、信息安全、HR分析）中，GPT-20B编排器在71%的案例中生成违规计划，且每个子任务看似良性。三种独立信号（确定性污点分析、思维链评估、跨模型合规裁判）验证了攻击，假阳性率为0%。
limitations: 攻击仅针对特定编排器（GPT-20B），其他模型效果未知。
防御方法（计划级信息流追踪）可能增加系统开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 提出新颖的攻击类，实验验证充分，对多智能体系统安全有重要启示。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义意图碎片化（SIF）攻击，利用多智能体LLM编排系统的任务分解漏洞，使单个合法请求生成整体违规但子任务无害的计划。

papers.title: SMFD-UNet: Semantic Face Mask Is The Only Thing You Need To Deblur Faces
papers.abstract: For applications including facial identification, forensic analysis, photographic improvement, and medical imaging diagnostics, facial image deblurring is an essential chore in computer vision allowing the restoration of high-quality images from blurry inputs. Often based on general picture priors, traditional deblurring techniques find it difficult to capture the particular structural and identity-specific features of human faces. We present SMFD-UNet (Semantic Mask Fusion Deblurring UNet), a new lightweight framework using semantic face masks to drive the deblurring process, therefore removing the need for high-quality reference photos in order to solve these difficulties. First, our dual-step method uses a UNet-based semantic mask generator to directly extract detailed facial component masks (e.g., eyes, nose, mouth) straight from blurry photos. Sharp, high-fidelity facial images are subsequently produced by integrating these masks with the blurry input using a multi-stage feature fusion technique within a computationally efficient UNet framework. We created a randomized blurring pipeline that roughly replicates real-world situations by simulating around 1.74 trillion deterioration scenarios, hence guaranteeing resilience. Examined on the CelebA dataset, SMFD-UNet shows better performance than state-of-the-art models, attaining higher Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) and Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) while preserving satisfactory naturalness measures, including NIQE, LPIPS, and FID. Powered by Residual Dense Convolution Blocks (RDC), a multi-stage feature fusion strategy, efficient and effective upsampling techniques, attention techniques like CBAM, post-processing techniques, and the lightweight design guarantees scalability and efficiency, enabling SMFD-UNet to be a flexible solution for developing facial image restoration research and useful applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出SMFD-UNet，利用语义掩码引导人脸去模糊，无需高质量参考图像，在CelebA上超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统去模糊方法基于通用图像先验，难以捕捉人脸特有的结构和身份特征，且通常需要高质量参考图像，限制了实际应用。

analysis.method: 提出SMFD-UNet，包含两个阶段：首先用UNet从模糊图像生成语义掩码（眼睛、鼻子、嘴等），然后通过多阶段特征融合将掩码与模糊输入结合，在轻量UNet框架中生成清晰图像。采用残差密集卷积块、CBAM注意力、高效上采样和后处理技术。

papers.title: When Switching Algorithms Helps: A Theoretical Study of Online Algorithm Selection
papers.abstract: Online algorithm selection (OAS) aims to adapt the optimization process to changes in the fitness landscape and is expected to outperform any single algorithm from a given portfolio. Although this expectation is supported by numerous empirical studies, there are currently no theoretical results proving that OAS can yield asymptotic speedups (apart from some artificial examples for hyper-heuristics). Moreover, theory-based guidelines for when and how to switch between algorithms are largely missing. In this paper, we present the first theoretical example in which switching between two algorithms -- the $(1+λ)$ EA and the $(1+(λ,λ))$ GA -- solves the OneMax problem asymptotically faster than either algorithm used in isolation. We show that an appropriate choice of population sizes for the two algorithms allows the optimum to be reached in $O(n\log\log n)$ expected time, faster than the $Θ(n\sqrt{\frac{\log n \log\log\log n}{\log\log n}})$ runtime of the best of these two algorithms with optimally tuned parameters. We first establish this bound under an idealized switching rule that changes from the $(1+λ)$ to the $(1+(λ,λ))$ GA at the optimal time. We then propose a realistic switching strategy that achieves the same performance. Our analysis combines fixed-start and fixed-target perspectives, illustrating how different algorithms dominate at different stages of the optimization process. This approach offers a promising path toward a deeper theoretical understanding of OAS.

analysis.tldr: 首次理论证明在线算法选择（OAS）能实现渐近加速，在OneMax问题上通过切换(1+λ) EA和(1+(λ,λ)) GA达到O(n log log n)期望时间。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线算法选择（OAS）在实践中被广泛使用，但缺乏理论证明其能带来渐近加速，且缺乏何时切换算法的理论指导。

analysis.method: 理论分析：先假设理想切换规则（在最优时间从(1+λ) EA切换到(1+(λ,λ)) GA），再提出实际可行的切换策略，结合固定起点和固定目标视角分析。

papers.title: M-ArtAgent: Evidence-Based Multimodal Agent for Implicit Art Influence Discovery
papers.abstract: Implicit artistic influence, although visually plausible, is often undocumented and thus poses a historically constrained attribution problem: resemblance is necessary but not sufficient evidence. Most prior systems reduce influence discovery to embedding similarity or label-driven graph completion, while recent multimodal large language models (LLMs) remain vulnerable to temporal inconsistency and unverified attributions. This paper introduces M-ArtAgent, an evidence-based multimodal agent that reframes implicit influence discovery as probabilistic adjudication. It follows a four-phase protocol consisting of Investigation, Corroboration, Falsification, and Verdict governed by a Reasoning and Acting (ReAct)-style controller that assembles verifiable evidence chains from images and biographies, enforces art-historical axioms, and subjects each hypothesis to adversarial falsification via a prompt-isolated critic. Two theory-grounded operators, StyleComparator for Wolfflin formal analysis and ConceptRetriever for ICONCLASS-based iconographic grounding, ensure that intermediate claims are formally auditable. On the balanced WikiArt Influence Benchmark-100 (WIB-100) of 100 artists and 2,000 directed pairs, M-ArtAgent achieves 83.7% positive-class F1, 0.666 Matthews correlation coefficient (MCC), and 0.910 area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (ROC-AUC), with leakage-control and robustness checks confirming that the gains persist when explicit influence phrases are masked. By coupling multimodal perception with domain-constrained falsification, M-ArtAgent demonstrates that implicit influence analysis benefits from historically grounded adjudication rather than pattern matching alone.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于证据的多模态Agent M-ArtAgent，将隐式艺术影响发现重构为概率裁决，通过四阶段协议和领域约束验证提升归因可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 隐式艺术影响缺乏文档记录，现有方法依赖嵌入相似性或标签驱动图补全，多模态大模型易受时间不一致和未验证归因影响，亟需可验证的归因方法。
analysis.problem: 解决隐式艺术影响发现中证据不足、归因不可靠的问题，将相似性匹配提升为可审计的概率裁决。

analysis.method: 提出M-ArtAgent，采用四阶段协议（调查、佐证、证伪、裁决），由ReAct风格控制器驱动，结合StyleComparator（沃尔夫林形式分析）和ConceptRetriever（ICONCLASS图像学基础）构建可验证证据链，并通过对抗性证伪和艺术史公理约束确保归因可审计。

设计四阶段协议和领域约束算子（StyleComparator、ConceptRetriever），实现可审计的归因推理。
在WIB-100基准上取得83.7% F1、0.666 MCC和0.910 ROC-AUC，并通过泄漏控制和鲁棒性检验。
analysis.experiments: 在WikiArt Influence Benchmark-100（100位艺术家，2000个有向对）上评估，正类F1为83.7%，MCC为0.666，ROC-AUC为0.910，并进行了泄漏控制和鲁棒性检验。

papers.title: CMP: Robust Whole-Body Tracking for Loco-Manipulation via Competence Manifold Projection
papers.abstract: While decoupled control schemes for legged mobile manipulators have shown robustness, learning holistic whole-body control policies for tracking global end-effector poses remains fragile against Out-of-Distribution (OOD) inputs induced by sensor noise or infeasible user commands. To improve robustness against these perturbations without sacrificing task performance and continuity, we propose Competence Manifold Projection (CMP). Specifically, we utilize a Frame-Wise Safety Scheme that transforms the infinite-horizon safety constraint into a computationally efficient single-step manifold inclusion. To instantiate this competence manifold, we employ a Lower-Bounded Safety Estimator that distinguishes unmastered intentions from the training distribution. We then introduce an Isomorphic Latent Space (ILS) that aligns manifold geometry with safety probability, enabling efficient O(1) seamless defense against arbitrary OOD intents. Experiments demonstrate that CMP achieves up to a 10-fold survival rate improvement in typical OOD scenarios where baselines suffer catastrophic failure, incurring under 10% tracking degradation. Notably, the system exhibits emergent ``best-effort'' generalization behaviors to progressively accomplish OOD goals by adhering to the competence boundaries. Result videos are available at: https://shepherd1226.github.io/CMP.

analysis.tldr: 提出能力流形投影(CMP)方法，通过安全估计和等变潜空间实现腿式移动操作器全身跟踪的鲁棒性，在OOD场景下生存率提升10倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 腿式移动操作器的解耦控制方案已展现鲁棒性，但学习全身控制策略在传感器噪声或不可行用户命令导致的分布外(OOD)输入下仍然脆弱，需要在不牺牲任务性能和连续性的前提下提升鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 解决腿式移动操作器全身跟踪策略对OOD输入（如传感器噪声、不可行指令）的鲁棒性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出能力流形投影(CMP)，包括：帧级安全方案将无限时域安全约束转化为单步流形包含；下界安全估计器区分未掌握意图与训练分布；等变潜空间(ILS)对齐流形几何与安全概率，实现O(1)的OOD意图防御。
contributions: 提出CMP方法，通过能力流形投影提升全身跟踪的鲁棒性。
设计帧级安全方案和下界安全估计器，实现高效的安全约束转化和意图区分。
引入等变潜空间，实现O(1)的OOD防御，并在实验中展示10倍生存率提升和最佳努力泛化行为。
analysis.experiments: 在典型OOD场景中，CMP相比基线方法生存率提升10倍，跟踪性能下降低于10%，并展现出渐进完成OOD目标的泛化行为。
limitations: 可能对复杂动态环境适应性有限。

papers.title: Munkres' General Topology Autoformalized in Isabelle/HOL
papers.abstract: We describe an experiment in LLM-assisted autoformalization that produced over 85,000 lines of Isabelle/HOL code covering all 39 sections of Munkres' Topology (general topology, Chapters 2--8), from topological spaces through dimension theory. The LLM-based coding agents (initially ChatGPT 5.2 and then Claude Opus 4.6) used 24 active days for that. The formalization is complete: all 806 formal results are fully proved with zero sorry's. Proved results include the Tychonoff theorem, the Baire category theorem, the Nagata--Smirnov and Smirnov metrization theorems, the Stone--Čech compactification, Ascoli's theorem, the space-filling curve, and others. The methodology is based on a "sorry-first" declarative proof workflow combined with bulk use of sledgehammer - two of Isabelle major strengths. This leads to relatively fast autoformalization progress. We analyze the resulting formalization in detail, analyze the human--LLM interaction patterns from the session log, and briefly compare with related autoformalization efforts in Megalodon, HOL Light, and Naproche. The results indicate that LLM-assisted formalization of standard mathematical textbooks in Isabelle/HOL is quite feasible, cheap and fast, even if some human supervision is useful.

analysis.tldr: 利用LLM辅助将Munkres拓扑学教材自动形式化为Isabelle/HOL代码，生成超8.5万行且全部证明完成。

papers.title: Fast Spatial Memory with Elastic Test-Time Training
papers.abstract: Large Chunk Test-Time Training (LaCT) has shown strong performance on long-context 3D reconstruction, but its fully plastic inference-time updates remain vulnerable to catastrophic forgetting and overfitting. As a result, LaCT is typically instantiated with a single large chunk spanning the full input sequence, falling short of the broader goal of handling arbitrarily long sequences in a single pass. We propose Elastic Test-Time Training inspired by elastic weight consolidation, that stabilizes LaCT fast-weight updates with a Fisher-weighted elastic prior around a maintained anchor state. The anchor evolves as an exponential moving average of past fast weights to balance stability and plasticity. Based on this updated architecture, we introduce Fast Spatial Memory (FSM), an efficient and scalable model for 4D reconstruction that learns spatiotemporal representations from long observation sequences and renders novel view-time combinations. We pre-trained FSM on large-scale curated 3D/4D data to capture the dynamics and semantics of complex spatial environments. Extensive experiments show that FSM supports fast adaptation over long sequences and delivers high-quality 3D/4D reconstruction with smaller chunks and mitigating the camera-interpolation shortcut. Overall, we hope to advance LaCT beyond the bounded single-chunk setting toward robust multi-chunk adaptation, a necessary step for generalization to genuinely longer sequences, while substantially alleviating the activation-memory bottleneck.

analysis.tldr: 提出弹性测试时训练（ET3）和快速空间记忆（FSM）模型，用于长序列4D重建，缓解灾难性遗忘和过拟合。
analysis.research_motivation: 大块测试时训练（LaCT）在长上下文3D重建中表现强劲，但其全塑性推理时更新易受灾难性遗忘和过拟合影响，且通常限于单一大块处理完整序列，无法处理任意长序列。
analysis.problem: 如何稳定LaCT的快速权重更新，使其能够处理任意长序列的4D重建，同时缓解灾难性遗忘和过拟合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LaCT的全塑性更新易导致灾难性遗忘和过拟合，且通常需要单一大块处理完整序列，限制了其处理更长序列的能力。
analysis.method: 受弹性权重巩固启发，提出弹性测试时训练（ET3），通过Fisher加权的弹性先验稳定LaCT快速权重更新，并维护一个指数移动平均的锚点状态以平衡稳定性与可塑性。基于此架构，引入快速空间记忆（FSM）模型，从长观测序列学习时空表示并渲染新视角-时间组合。
contributions: 提出弹性测试时训练（ET3），利用Fisher加权弹性先验稳定LaCT快速权重更新。
引入快速空间记忆（FSM），一种高效可扩展的4D重建模型，支持长序列快速适应。
在大规模3D/4D数据上预训练FSM，实验证明其支持长序列快速适应，缓解相机插值捷径，并减轻激活内存瓶颈。

limitations: 可能依赖大规模预训练数据，数据获取成本高。

papers.title: HY-Embodied-0.5: Embodied Foundation Models for Real-World Agents
papers.abstract: We introduce HY-Embodied-0.5, a family of foundation models specifically designed for real-world embodied agents. To bridge the gap between general Vision-Language Models (VLMs) and the demands of embodied agents, our models are developed to enhance the core capabilities required by embodied intelligence: spatial and temporal visual perception, alongside advanced embodied reasoning for prediction, interaction, and planning. The HY-Embodied-0.5 suite comprises two primary variants: an efficient model with 2B activated parameters designed for edge deployment, and a powerful model with 32B activated parameters targeted for complex reasoning. To support the fine-grained visual perception essential for embodied tasks, we adopt a Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) architecture to enable modality-specific computing. By incorporating latent tokens, this design effectively enhances the perceptual representation of the models. To improve reasoning capabilities, we introduce an iterative, self-evolving post-training paradigm. Furthermore, we employ on-policy distillation to transfer the advanced capabilities of the large model to the smaller variant, thereby maximizing the performance potential of the compact model. Extensive evaluations across 22 benchmarks, spanning visual perception, spatial reasoning, and embodied understanding, demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. Our MoT-2B model outperforms similarly sized state-of-the-art models on 16 benchmarks, while the 32B variant achieves performance comparable to frontier models such as Gemini 3.0 Pro. In downstream robot control experiments, we leverage our robust VLM foundation to train an effective Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model, achieving compelling results in real-world physical evaluations. Code and models are open-sourced at https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/HY-Embodied.

analysis.tldr: HY-Embodied-0.5 是一系列面向真实世界具身智能体的基础模型，通过 MoT 架构和自进化后训练范式提升空间/时间感知与推理能力，在 22 个基准上表现优异。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用视觉语言模型（VLM）难以满足具身智能体对空间/时间感知和复杂推理的需求，亟需专门设计的基础模型。
analysis.problem: 如何构建兼具高效视觉感知和高级推理能力的具身基础模型，并实现从大模型到小模型的能力迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用 Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) 架构实现模态特定计算，引入潜在令牌增强感知表征；提出迭代自进化后训练范式提升推理能力；使用 on-policy 蒸馏将大模型能力迁移至小模型。
contributions: 提出 HY-Embodied-0.5 系列模型，包含 2B 和 32B 两种规模，分别面向边缘部署和复杂推理。
设计 MoT 架构和自进化后训练范式，显著提升具身智能所需的空间/时间感知与推理能力。
通过 on-policy 蒸馏实现大模型到小模型的有效能力迁移，并在 22 个基准和真实机器人控制实验中验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在 22 个基准上评估，涵盖视觉感知、空间推理和具身理解；MoT-2B 在 16 个基准上超越同规模 SOTA，32B 版本性能接近 Gemini 3.0 Pro；下游机器人控制实验训练 VLA 模型并在真实物理评估中取得有说服力的结果。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在极端边缘设备上的实际推理延迟和能耗。
未讨论模型在未见过的环境或任务上的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 论文针对具身智能体提出专门的基础模型，方法创新（MoT+自进化训练）且实验充分（22基准+真实机器人），与VLM/具身方向高度相关，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HY-Embodied-0.5 是一系列面向真实世界具身智能体的基础模型，通过 MoT 架构和自进化后训练范式提升空间/时间感知与推理能力，在 22 个基准上表现优异。

papers.title: Exact Structural Abstraction and Tractability Limits
papers.abstract: Any rigorously specified problem determines an admissible-output relation $R$, and exact correctness depends only on the induced decision quotient relation $s \sim_R s' \iff \operatorname{Adm}_R(s)=\operatorname{Adm}_R(s')$. Exact relevance certification asks which coordinates recover those classes. Decision, counting, search, approximation, PAC/regret/risk, randomized-output guarantees, anytime or finite-horizon guarantees, and distributional guarantees all reduce to this quotient-recovery problem. Universal exact-semantics reduction identifies admissible-output quotient recovery as the canonical object. Optimizer-quotient realizability is maximal, so quotient shape alone cannot mark a tractability frontier. Orbit gaps are the exact obstruction to classification by closure-law-invariant structural predicates. Exact classification by closure-law-invariant predicates succeeds exactly when the target is constant on closure orbits; on a closure-closed domain, equivalently, when the positive and negative orbit hulls are disjoint, in which case there is a least exact closure-invariant classifier. Across four natural candidate structural tractability criteria, a uniform pair-targeted affine witness produces same-orbit disagreements and rules out exact structural classification on the full binary pairwise domain. Because that witness class already sits inside the universal semantic framework, the same obstruction applies to any universal exact-certification characterization over rigorously specified problems. Restricting the domain helps only by removing orbit gaps. Without explicit margin control, arbitrarily small utility perturbations can flip relevance and sufficiency.

analysis.tldr: 本文提出精确结构抽象框架，证明可容许输出商恢复是通用问题，并揭示轨道间隙是精确结构分类的根本障碍。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器学习中许多问题（决策、计数、搜索等）的精确正确性依赖于可容许输出关系，但缺乏统一的抽象框架来理解其结构可分类性及易处理性边界。
analysis.problem: 研究精确结构抽象与易处理性极限，即确定哪些坐标能恢复可容许输出商，以及结构谓词能否精确分类问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出轨道间隙是精确分类的障碍，且在没有显式边界控制时，任意小的效用扰动会翻转相关性和充分性。
analysis.method: 提出通用精确语义归约，将可容许输出商恢复作为规范对象，并利用轨道间隙分析结构分类的极限。
contributions: 建立了精确语义归约框架，统一了多种问题类型（决策、计数、搜索等）的精确正确性分析。
证明了轨道间隙是精确结构分类的根本障碍，并给出了分类成功的充要条件。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论框架可能难以直接应用于实际大规模问题。
未提供具体算法或实现细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.reason: 理论贡献深刻但高度抽象，与当前重点方向（VLM/生成模型等）关联较弱，适合理论研究者深入阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文提出精确结构抽象框架，证明可容许输出商恢复是通用问题，并揭示轨道间隙是精确结构分类的根本障碍。

papers.title: MoRight: Motion Control Done Right
papers.abstract: Generating motion-controlled videos--where user-specified actions drive physically plausible scene dynamics under freely chosen viewpoints--demands two capabilities: (1) disentangled motion control, allowing users to separately control the object motion and adjust camera viewpoint; and (2) motion causality, ensuring that user-driven actions trigger coherent reactions from other objects rather than merely displacing pixels. Existing methods fall short on both fronts: they entangle camera and object motion into a single tracking signal and treat motion as kinematic displacement without modeling causal relationships between object motion. We introduce MoRight, a unified framework that addresses both limitations through disentangled motion modeling. Object motion is specified in a canonical static-view and transferred to an arbitrary target camera viewpoint via temporal cross-view attention, enabling disentangled camera and object control. We further decompose motion into active (user-driven) and passive (consequence) components, training the model to learn motion causality from data. At inference, users can either supply active motion and MoRight predicts consequences (forward reasoning), or specify desired passive outcomes and MoRight recovers plausible driving actions (inverse reasoning), all while freely adjusting the camera viewpoint. Experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in generation quality, motion controllability, and interaction awareness.

analysis.tldr: MoRight通过解耦运动建模和因果推理，实现了用户可控且物理合理的运动驱动视频生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有运动控制视频生成方法将相机与物体运动纠缠，且仅将运动视为像素位移，缺乏因果建模，导致无法生成物理合理的交互。
analysis.problem: 如何实现解耦的相机与物体运动控制，并建模物体间的运动因果关系，以生成用户指定动作驱动的、物理合理的视频。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法将相机和物体运动纠缠为单一跟踪信号，且将运动视为运动学位移而不建模物体间的因果关系。
analysis.method: 提出MoRight框架，通过规范静态视角指定物体运动，并利用时间交叉视角注意力将其迁移到任意目标相机视角，实现解耦控制；将运动分解为主动（用户驱动）和被动（结果）成分，从数据中学习运动因果关系。推理时支持正向推理（给定主动运动预测被动结果）和逆向推理（给定被动结果恢复主动运动）。
contributions: 提出解耦的相机与物体运动控制方法，通过规范静态视角和时间交叉视角注意力实现。
引入运动因果分解，将运动分为主动和被动成分，学习运动因果关系，支持正向和逆向推理。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准上展示了生成质量、运动可控性和交互感知方面的最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的运动标注数据。
复杂场景中因果推理的准确性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验表明SOTA，与视频生成方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MoRight通过解耦运动建模和因果推理，实现了用户可控且物理合理的运动驱动视频生成。

papers.title: TC-AE: Unlocking Token Capacity for Deep Compression Autoencoders
papers.abstract: We propose TC-AE, a ViT-based architecture for deep compression autoencoders. Existing methods commonly increase the channel number of latent representations to maintain reconstruction quality under high compression ratios. However, this strategy often leads to latent representation collapse, which degrades generative performance. Instead of relying on increasingly complex architectures or multi-stage training schemes, TC-AE addresses this challenge from the perspective of the token space, the key bridge between pixels and image latents, through two complementary innovations: Firstly, we study token number scaling by adjusting the patch size in ViT under a fixed latent budget, and identify aggressive token-to-latent compression as the key factor that limits effective scaling. To address this issue, we decompose token-to-latent compression into two stages, reducing structural information loss and enabling effective token number scaling for generation. Secondly, to further mitigate latent representation collapse, we enhance the semantic structure of image tokens via joint self-supervised training, leading to more generative-friendly latents. With these designs, TC-AE achieves substantially improved reconstruction and generative performance under deep compression. We hope our research will advance ViT-based tokenizer for visual generation.

analysis.tldr: TC-AE通过令牌空间视角改进深度压缩自编码器，缓解潜在表示崩溃，提升重建与生成性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度压缩自编码器在高压缩比下常通过增加通道数来维持重建质量，但导致潜在表示崩溃，损害生成性能。
analysis.problem: 解决深度压缩自编码器中潜在表示崩溃的问题，在不依赖复杂架构或多阶段训练下提升重建与生成性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出增加通道数会导致潜在表示崩溃，且令牌到潜在表示的激进压缩限制了令牌数量缩放的有效性。
analysis.method: 提出TC-AE架构，包含两项创新：1) 将令牌到潜在压缩分解为两阶段以减少结构信息损失；2) 通过联合自监督训练增强图像令牌的语义结构。
contributions: 提出令牌数量缩放方法，通过调整ViT补丁大小并分解压缩阶段，实现有效缩放。
引入自监督训练增强令牌语义结构，缓解潜在表示崩溃。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定压缩比下有效，未讨论极端压缩情况。
自监督训练的计算开销未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但摘要未提供实验证据，影响评估。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TC-AE通过令牌空间视角改进深度压缩自编码器，缓解潜在表示崩溃，提升重建与生成性能。

papers.title: Appear2Meaning: A Cross-Cultural Benchmark for Structured Cultural Metadata Inference from Images
papers.abstract: Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) have improved image captioning for cultural heritage. However, inferring structured cultural metadata (e.g., creator, origin, period) from visual input remains underexplored. We introduce a multi-category, cross-cultural benchmark for this task and evaluate VLMs using an LLM-as-Judge framework that measures semantic alignment with reference annotations. To assess cultural reasoning, we report exact-match, partial-match, and attribute-level accuracy across cultural regions. Results show that models capture fragmented signals and exhibit substantial performance variation across cultures and metadata types, leading to inconsistent and weakly grounded predictions. These findings highlight the limitations of current VLMs in structured cultural metadata inference beyond visual perception.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨文化结构化文化元数据推断基准，发现VLM在文化推理上表现不一致且弱。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM在文化遗产图像描述方面有进展，但从视觉输入推断结构化文化元数据（如创作者、起源、时期）仍未被充分探索，且缺乏跨文化评估基准。
analysis.problem: 评估VLM从图像中推断结构化文化元数据的能力，并揭示其跨文化推理的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型能捕捉碎片化信号，但在不同文化和元数据类型上表现差异大，导致预测不一致且缺乏可靠依据。
analysis.method: 构建多类别跨文化基准，使用LLM-as-Judge框架评估语义对齐，并报告精确匹配、部分匹配和属性级准确率。
contributions: 提出首个跨文化结构化文化元数据推断基准Appear2Meaning
揭示当前VLM在文化推理上的不一致性和弱基础性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准覆盖的文化和元数据类型可能有限
LLM-as-Judge框架的可靠性需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 跨文化基准有创新性，但实验细节不足，适合精读方法。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨文化结构化文化元数据推断基准，发现VLM在文化推理上表现不一致且弱。

papers.title: From Blobs to Spokes: High-Fidelity Surface Reconstruction via Oriented Gaussians
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has revolutionized fast novel view synthesis, yet its opacity-based formulation makes surface extraction fundamentally difficult. Unlike implicit methods built on Signed Distance Fields or occupancy, 3DGS lacks a global geometric field, forcing existing approaches to resort to heuristics such as TSDF fusion of blended depth maps. Inspired by the Objects as Volumes framework, we derive a principled occupancy field for Gaussian Splatting and show how it can be used to extract highly accurate watertight meshes of complex scenes. Our key contribution is to introduce a learnable oriented normal at each Gaussian element and to define an adapted attenuation formulation, which leads to closed-form expressions for both the normal and occupancy fields at arbitrary locations in space. We further introduce a novel consistency loss and a dedicated densification strategy to enforce Gaussians to wrap the entire surface by closing geometric holes, ensuring a complete shell of oriented primitives. We modify the differentiable rasterizer to output depth as an isosurface of our continuous model, and introduce Primal Adaptive Meshing for Region-of-Interest meshing at arbitrary resolution. We additionally expose fundamental biases in standard surface evaluation protocols and propose two more rigorous alternatives. Overall, our method Gaussian Wrapping sets a new state-of-the-art on DTU and Tanks and Temples, producing complete, watertight meshes at a fraction of the size of concurrent work-recovering thin structures such as the notoriously elusive bicycle spokes.

analysis.tldr: 通过引入可学习定向法线和改进的衰减公式，在3D高斯泼溅中实现高保真水密表面重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D高斯泼溅在快速新视角合成上表现优异，但其基于不透明度的公式使得表面提取困难，现有方法依赖TSDF融合等启发式方法，精度有限。
analysis.problem: 从3D高斯泼溅表示中提取高精度、水密的表面网格。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 为每个高斯元素引入可学习定向法线，定义适配的衰减公式，推导出空间任意位置的法线和占据场的闭式表达式；提出一致性损失和专用致密化策略以闭合几何孔洞；修改可微分光栅化器输出连续模型的等值面深度；引入原始自适应网格划分用于感兴趣区域网格化。
contributions: 提出基于定向高斯的占据场，实现从3DGS中提取水密网格。
引入可学习定向法线和闭式表达式，提升表面重建精度。
提出一致性损失和致密化策略，确保完整表面覆盖。
暴露标准表面评估协议的偏差并提出更严格的替代方案。
analysis.experiments: 在DTU和Tanks and Temples数据集上达到新SOTA，生成完整水密网格，且网格尺寸远小于现有工作，能恢复细薄结构如自行车辐条。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量初始点云。
计算开销可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且达到SOTA，与3D视觉方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过引入可学习定向法线和改进的衰减公式，在3D高斯泼溅中实现高保真水密表面重建。

papers.title: GameWorld: Towards Standardized and Verifiable Evaluation of Multimodal Game Agents
papers.abstract: Towards an embodied generalist for real-world interaction, Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) agents still suffer from challenging latency, sparse feedback, and irreversible mistakes. Video games offer an ideal testbed with rich visual observations and closed-loop interaction, demanding fine-grained perception, long-horizon planning, and precise control. However, systematically evaluating these capabilities is currently hindered by heterogeneous action interfaces and heuristic verification. To this end, we introduce GameWorld, a benchmark designed for standardized and verifiable evaluation of MLLMs as generalist game agents in browser environments. Two game agent interfaces are studied: (i) computer-use agents that directly emit keyboard and mouse controls, and (ii) generalist multimodal agents that act in a semantic action space via deterministic Semantic Action Parsing. GameWorld contains 34 diverse games and 170 tasks, each paired with state-verifiable metrics for outcome-based evaluation. The results across 18 model-interface pairs suggest that even the best performing agent is far from achieving human capabilities on video games. Extensive experiments of repeated full-benchmark reruns demonstrate the robustness of the benchmark, while further studies on real-time interaction, context-memory sensitivity, and action validity expose more challenges ahead for game agents. Together, by offering a standardized, verifiable, and reproducible evaluation framework, GameWorld lays a robust foundation for advancing research on multimodal game agents and beyond. The project page is at https://gameworld-bench.github.io.

analysis.tldr: GameWorld 是一个标准化、可验证的多模态游戏智能体评测基准，包含 34 款游戏和 170 个任务，揭示了当前 MLLM 智能体与人类能力的差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大语言模型智能体在真实交互中面临延迟、稀疏反馈和不可逆错误等挑战，视频游戏作为理想测试平台，但现有评测受限于异构动作接口和启发式验证，缺乏标准化和可验证的评估框架。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个标准化、可验证的评测基准，以系统评估多模态大语言模型作为通用游戏智能体的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出最佳智能体仍远未达到人类在视频游戏上的能力，且实时交互、上下文记忆敏感性和动作有效性等研究暴露了更多挑战。
analysis.method: GameWorld 基准包含 34 款多样化的游戏和 170 个任务，每个任务配有状态可验证的指标用于基于结果的评估；研究了两种智能体接口：直接发射键盘鼠标控制的计算机使用智能体和通过确定性语义动作解析在语义动作空间中行动的通用多模态智能体。
contributions: 提出了 GameWorld，一个标准化、可验证的多模态游戏智能体评测基准。
通过 18 个模型-接口对的实验揭示了当前最佳智能体与人类能力的差距，并验证了基准的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在 18 个模型-接口对上进行了实验，包括重复全基准运行以验证鲁棒性，以及实时交互、上下文记忆敏感性和动作有效性的进一步研究。
limitations: 基准仅包含 34 款游戏，可能无法覆盖所有游戏类型。
未提供人类基线性能的具体数值。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 该基准针对多模态游戏智能体评测，标准化和可验证性强，与 VLM/MLLM 和 Agent 方向高度相关，但方法创新性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GameWorld 是一个标准化、可验证的多模态游戏智能体评测基准，包含 34 款游戏和 170 个任务，揭示了当前 MLLM 智能体与人类能力的差距。

papers.title: RoSHI: A Versatile Robot-oriented Suit for Human Data In-the-Wild
papers.abstract: Scaling up robot learning will likely require human data containing rich and long-horizon interactions in the wild. Existing approaches for collecting such data trade off portability, robustness to occlusion, and global consistency. We introduce RoSHI, a hybrid wearable that fuses low-cost sparse IMUs with the Project Aria glasses to estimate the full 3D pose and body shape of the wearer in a metric global coordinate frame from egocentric perception. This system is motivated by the complementarity of the two sensors: IMUs provide robustness to occlusions and high-speed motions, while egocentric SLAM anchors long-horizon motion and stabilizes upper body pose. We collect a dataset of agile activities to evaluate RoSHI. On this dataset, we generally outperform other egocentric baselines and perform comparably to a state-of-the-art exocentric baseline (SAM3D). Finally, we demonstrate that the motion data recorded from our system are suitable for real-world humanoid policy learning. For videos, data and more, visit the project webpage: https://roshi-mocap.github.io/

analysis.tldr: RoSHI 是一种融合稀疏 IMU 和 Project Aria 眼镜的混合可穿戴系统，用于在野外估计人体 3D 姿态和形状，并支持人形机器人策略学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人学习需要包含丰富、长程交互的野外人体数据，但现有方法在便携性、遮挡鲁棒性和全局一致性之间存在权衡。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种可穿戴系统，能够在野外环境中鲁棒地估计人体 3D 姿态和形状，同时保持全局一致性和便携性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: RoSHI 混合可穿戴系统：融合低成本稀疏 IMU 和 Project Aria 眼镜的自我中心感知，利用 IMU 的遮挡鲁棒性和高速运动捕捉能力，以及自我中心 SLAM 的长程运动锚定和上身姿态稳定能力，在度量全局坐标系中估计穿戴者的完整 3D 姿态和体型。
contributions: 提出 RoSHI，一种结合稀疏 IMU 和自我中心视觉的混合可穿戴系统，用于野外人体 3D 姿态和形状估计。
在敏捷活动数据集上，RoSHI 优于其他自我中心基线，并与最先进的非自我中心基线 (SAM3D) 性能相当。
展示了 RoSHI 记录的运动数据可用于真实世界的人形机器人策略学习。
analysis.experiments: 在自收集的敏捷活动数据集上评估 RoSHI，与自我中心基线和 SAM3D 进行比较，并展示了在人形机器人策略学习中的应用。
limitations: 可能依赖特定硬件（Project Aria 眼镜），通用性受限。
仅在有限的活动类型上进行了评估，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合 IMU 和视觉实现野外人体姿态估计，对机器人学习有实际应用价值，但摘要未提供详细实验对比。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RoSHI 是一种融合稀疏 IMU 和 Project Aria 眼镜的混合可穿戴系统，用于在野外估计人体 3D 姿态和形状，并支持人形机器人策略学习。

papers.title: Distilling Photon-Counting CT into Routine Chest CT through Clinically Validated Degradation Modeling
papers.abstract: Photon-counting CT (PCCT) provides superior image quality with higher spatial resolution and lower noise compared to conventional energy-integrating CT (EICT), but its limited clinical availability restricts large-scale research and clinical deployment. To bridge this gap, we propose SUMI, a simulated degradation-to-enhancement method that learns to reverse realistic acquisition artifacts in low-quality EICT by leveraging high-quality PCCT as reference. Our central insight is to explicitly model realistic acquisition degradations, transforming PCCT into clinically plausible lower-quality counterparts and learning to invert this process. The simulated degradations were validated for clinical realism by board-certified radiologists, enabling faithful supervision without requiring paired acquisitions at scale. As outcomes of this technical contribution, we: (1) train a latent diffusion model on 1,046 PCCTs, using an autoencoder first pre-trained on both these PCCTs and 405,379 EICTs from 145 hospitals to extract general CT latent features that we release for reuse in other generative medical imaging tasks; (2) construct a large-scale dataset of over 17,316 publicly available EICTs enhanced to PCCT-like quality, with radiologist-validated voxel-wise annotations of airway trees, arteries, veins, lungs, and lobes; and (3) demonstrate substantial improvements: across external data, SUMI outperforms state-of-the-art image translation methods by 15% in SSIM and 20% in PSNR, improves radiologist-rated clinical utility in reader studies, and enhances downstream top-ranking lesion detection performance, increasing sensitivity by up to 15% and F1 score by up to 10%. Our results suggest that emerging imaging advances can be systematically distilled into routine EICT using limited high-quality scans as reference.

analysis.tldr: 通过临床验证的降质建模，将光子计数CT的高质量蒸馏到常规CT中，显著提升图像质量和下游任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 光子计数CT（PCCT）图像质量高但临床可用性有限，而常规CT（EICT）广泛使用但质量较低，亟需一种方法将PCCT的优势迁移到EICT中，以提升大规模临床影像质量。
analysis.problem: 如何利用有限的PCCT数据，将高质量PCCT图像的特征迁移到大量常规EICT图像中，提升其图像质量和临床实用性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析，但核心洞察是：通过显式建模真实的采集降质过程，将PCCT转化为临床合理的低质量EICT，并学习逆过程，可以实现有效的质量提升。
analysis.method: 提出SUMI方法，一种模拟降质到增强的方法：先显式建模PCCT到EICT的降质过程（经放射科医生验证临床真实性），然后训练潜在扩散模型学习逆过程，将低质量EICT增强为PCCT-like质量。
contributions: 提出SUMI方法，通过临床验证的降质建模实现PCCT到EICT的质量蒸馏。
构建大规模增强数据集（17,316张EICT增强为PCCT-like质量），并附带放射科医生验证的体素级标注。
在外部数据上，SUMI在SSIM和PSNR上分别超越SOTA方法15%和20%，提升放射科医生评定的临床效用，并提高下游病灶检测灵敏度（最高15%）和F1分数（最高10%）。
analysis.experiments: 在外部数据上，SUMI在SSIM和PSNR上分别超越SOTA图像翻译方法15%和20%；读者研究中提升放射科医生评定的临床效用；下游病灶检测灵敏度提升最高15%，F1分数提升最高10%。
limitations: 依赖PCCT数据的可用性，可能在其他成像模态上泛化性有限。
降质模型需要放射科医生验证，可能引入主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（临床验证的降质建模），实验充分且效果显著，对医学影像领域有重要应用价值，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过临床验证的降质建模，将光子计数CT的高质量蒸馏到常规CT中，显著提升图像质量和下游任务性能。

papers.title: Regret-Aware Policy Optimization: Environment-Level Memory for Replay Suppression under Delayed Harm
papers.abstract: Safety in reinforcement learning (RL) is typically enforced through objective shaping while keeping environment dynamics stationary with respect to observable state-action pairs. Under delayed harm, this can lead to replay: after a washout period, reintroducing the same stimulus under matched observable conditions reproduces a similar harmful cascade. We introduce the Replay Suppression Diagnostic (RSD), a controlled exposure-decay-replay protocol that isolates this failure mode under frozen-policy evaluation. We show that, under stationary observable transition kernels, replay cannot be structurally suppressed without inducing a persistent shift in replay-time action distributions. Motivated by platform-mediated systems, we propose Regret-Aware Policy Optimization (RAPO), which augments the environment with persistent harm-trace and scar fields and applies a bounded, mass-preserving transition reweighting to reduce reachability of historically harmful regions. On graph diffusion tasks (50-1000 nodes), RAPO suppresses replay, reducing re-amplification gain (RAG) from 0.98 to 0.33 on 250-node graphs while retaining 82\% of task return. Disabling transition deformation only during replay restores re-amplification (RAG 0.91), isolating environment-level deformation as the causal mechanism.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种环境级记忆方法，通过持久化伤害痕迹和转移重加权来抑制延迟伤害下的强化学习回放问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 在延迟伤害场景下，标准安全强化学习方法因环境动态对可观测状态-动作对保持平稳，导致有害行为在洗脱期后重新出现（回放），威胁系统安全。
analysis.problem: 解决延迟伤害下强化学习中的回放问题，即相同刺激在可观测条件匹配时重复引发有害级联。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在平稳可观测转移核下，回放无法被结构性抑制而不引起回放时动作分布的持续偏移。
analysis.method: 提出遗憾感知策略优化（RAPO），通过向环境添加持久化伤害痕迹和疤痕字段，并应用有界、质量保持的转移重加权，减少历史上有害区域的可达性。
contributions: 提出回放抑制诊断（RSD）协议，用于隔离冻结策略评估下的回放失败模式。
提出RAPO算法，通过环境级记忆和转移重加权有效抑制回放，在250节点图上将再放大增益从0.98降至0.33，同时保留82%任务回报。
analysis.experiments: 在图扩散任务（50-1000节点）上评估，RAPO抑制了回放，再放大增益从0.98降至0.33（250节点图），保留82%任务回报；禁用转移变形后回放恢复（RAG 0.91），验证了环境级变形为因果机制。
limitations: 方法可能依赖图结构，泛化到其他延迟伤害场景需验证。
持久化伤害痕迹可能增加状态空间复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，实验验证充分，但应用场景较特定，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种环境级记忆方法，通过持久化伤害痕迹和转移重加权来抑制延迟伤害下的强化学习回放问题。

papers.title: Syntax Is Easy, Semantics Is Hard: Evaluating LLMs for LTL Translation
papers.abstract: Propositional Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) is a popular formalism for specifying desirable requirements and security and privacy policies for software, networks, and systems. Yet expressing such requirements and policies in LTL remains challenging because of its intricate semantics. Since many security and privacy analysis tools require LTL formulas as input, this difficulty places them out of reach for many developers and analysts. Large Language Models (LLMs) could broaden access to such tools by translating natural language fragments into LTL formulas. This paper evaluates that premise by assessing how effectively several representative LLMs translate assertive English sentences into LTL formulas. Using both human-generated and synthetic ground-truth data, we evaluate effectiveness along syntactic and semantic dimensions. The results reveal three findings: (1) in line with prior findings, LLMs perform better on syntactic aspects of LTL than on semantic ones; (2) they generally benefit from more detailed prompts; and (3) reformulating the task as a Python code-completion problem substantially improves overall performance. We also discuss challenges in conducting a fair evaluation on this task and conclude with recommendations for future work.

analysis.tldr: LLM在将自然语言翻译为LTL公式时，语法表现优于语义，详细提示和代码补全任务形式可提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LTL公式在安全与隐私策略指定中广泛应用，但其复杂语义使非专家难以使用，LLM有望降低使用门槛。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM将自然语言句子翻译为LTL公式的能力，特别是语法与语义维度的表现差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在语法方面表现更好，语义理解是瓶颈；详细提示和将任务重构为Python代码补全可提升性能。
analysis.method: 使用人工生成和合成真实数据，从语法和语义两个维度评估多个代表性LLM的翻译效果。
contributions: 系统评估了LLM在LTL翻译任务上的语法与语义表现，发现语法易、语义难。
揭示了详细提示和任务重构（代码补全）对性能的提升作用。
讨论了公平评估的挑战并给出未来工作建议。
analysis.experiments: 使用人工生成和合成真实数据，评估多个LLM在语法和语义维度上的表现。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅评估了断言性英语句子，未涵盖其他自然语言类型或复杂句式。
未深入分析语义错误的具体类型或原因。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 评估工作有实际意义，但方法创新有限，实验细节不足，适合了解LLM在形式化翻译任务上的表现。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在将自然语言翻译为LTL公式时，语法表现优于语义，详细提示和代码补全任务形式可提升性能。

papers.title: Evaluating In-Context Translation with Synchronous Context-Free Grammar Transduction
papers.abstract: Low-resource languages pose a challenge for machine translation with large language models (LLMs), which require large amounts of training data. One potential way to circumvent this data dependence is to rely on LLMs' ability to use in-context descriptions of languages, like textbooks and dictionaries. To do so, LLMs must be able to infer the link between the languages' grammatical descriptions and the sentences in question. Here we isolate this skill using a formal analogue of the task: string transduction based on a formal grammar provided in-context. We construct synchronous context-free grammars which define pairs of formal languages designed to model particular aspects of natural language grammar, morphology, and written representation. Using these grammars, we measure how well LLMs can translate sentences from one formal language into another when given both the grammar and the source-language sentence. We vary the size of the grammar, the lengths of the sentences, the syntactic and morphological properties of the languages, and their written script. We note three key findings. First, LLMs' translation accuracy decreases markedly as a function of grammar size and sentence length. Second, differences in morphology and written representation between the source and target languages can strongly diminish model performance. Third, we examine the types of errors committed by models and find they are most prone to recall the wrong words from the target language vocabulary, hallucinate new words, or leave source-language words untranslated.

analysis.tldr: 通过同步上下文无关文法形式化评估LLM的上下文翻译能力，发现语法大小、句子长度及形态/书写差异显著影响性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 低资源语言翻译依赖LLM的上下文学习能力，但现有研究缺乏对模型从语法描述中推断翻译规则这一核心技能的隔离评估。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化地测量LLM在给定上下文语法描述时，将源语言句子翻译为目标语言句子的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM翻译准确率随语法大小和句子长度增加而显著下降；源语言与目标语言在形态和书写表示上的差异会严重削弱性能；模型错误类型包括目标词汇召回错误、幻觉新词和未翻译源语言词。
analysis.method: 构建同步上下文无关文法对，定义形式语言对以模拟自然语言的语法、形态和书写表示，在给定文法和源语言句子条件下评估LLM的翻译准确率。
contributions: 提出一种形式化框架，通过同步上下文无关文法隔离评估LLM的上下文翻译能力。
系统分析了语法大小、句子长度、形态和书写差异对翻译性能的影响。
分类了LLM在形式翻译任务中的主要错误类型。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 形式语言与自然语言存在差距，结论可能不完全适用于真实低资源翻译场景。
仅评估了单一任务（形式语言翻译），未涉及多步推理或复杂语义。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，形式化评估框架有理论价值，但实验细节缺失，影响实际应用判断。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过同步上下文无关文法形式化评估LLM的上下文翻译能力，发现语法大小、句子长度及形态/书写差异显著影响性能。

papers.title: Personalizing Text-to-Image Generation to Individual Taste
papers.abstract: Modern text-to-image (T2I) models generate high-fidelity visuals but remain indifferent to individual user preferences. While existing reward models optimize for "average" human appeal, they fail to capture the inherent subjectivity of aesthetic judgment. In this work, we introduce a novel dataset and predictive framework, called PAMELA, designed to model personalized image evaluations. Our dataset comprises 70,000 ratings across 5,000 diverse images generated by state-of-the-art models (Flux 2 and Nano Banana). Each image is evaluated by 15 unique users, providing a rich distribution of subjective preferences across domains such as art, design, fashion, and cinematic photography. Leveraging this data, we propose a personalized reward model trained jointly on our high-quality annotations and existing aesthetic assessment subsets. We demonstrate that our model predicts individual liking with higher accuracy than the majority of current state-of-the-art methods predict population-level preferences. Using our personalized predictor, we demonstrate how simple prompt optimization methods can be used to steer generations towards individual user preferences. Our results highlight the importance of data quality and personalization to handle the subjectivity of user preferences. We release our dataset and model to facilitate standardized research in personalized T2I alignment and subjective visual quality assessment.

analysis.tldr: 提出个性化奖励模型PAMELA，利用70k主观评分数据集实现文本到图像生成中的个体偏好对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有T2I模型和奖励模型只优化平均偏好，忽略审美判断的主观性，无法满足个体用户品味。
analysis.problem: 如何建模和预测个体用户对生成图像的个性化偏好，并利用该偏好引导生成。

contributions: 构建了大规模个性化图像偏好数据集PAMELA，覆盖多种风格和用户群体。
提出个性化奖励模型，在预测个体喜好上超越现有方法预测群体偏好的准确率。
展示提示优化方法可利用个性化模型实现面向个体品味的生成。
