papers.title: Beyond Loss Values: Robust Dynamic Pruning via Loss Trajectory Alignment
papers.abstract: Existing dynamic data pruning methods often fail under noisy-label settings, as they typically rely on per-sample loss as the ranking criterion. This could mistakenly lead to preserving noisy samples due to their high loss values, resulting in significant performance drop. To address this, we propose AlignPrune, a noise-robust module designed to enhance the reliability of dynamic pruning under label noise. Specifically, AlignPrune introduces the Dynamic Alignment Score (DAS), which is a loss-trajectory-based criterion that enables more accurate identification of noisy samples, thereby improving pruning effectiveness. As a simple yet effective plug-and-play module, AlignPrune can be seamlessly integrated into state-of-the-art dynamic pruning frameworks, consistently outperforming them without modifying either the model architecture or the training pipeline. Extensive experiments on five widely-used benchmarks across various noise types and pruning ratios demonstrate the effectiveness of AlignPrune, boosting accuracy by up to 6.3\% over state-of-the-art baselines. Our results offer a generalizable solution for pruning under noisy data, encouraging further exploration of learning in real-world scenarios. Code is available at: https://github.com/leonqin430/AlignPrune.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于损失轨迹的动态剪枝方法 AlignPrune，在标签噪声下提升鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有动态剪枝方法依赖单样本损失作为排序标准，在标签噪声场景下会错误保留高损失的噪声样本，导致性能显著下降。
analysis.problem: 解决标签噪声下动态数据剪枝的可靠性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 AlignPrune 模块，引入基于损失轨迹的动态对齐分数（DAS），更准确识别噪声样本，作为即插即用模块集成到现有动态剪枝框架中。
contributions: 提出噪声鲁棒的动态剪枝模块 AlignPrune，基于损失轨迹对齐分数（DAS）识别噪声样本。
在五个基准数据集上，多种噪声类型和剪枝比例下，准确率提升最高达 6.3%。
analysis.experiments: 在五个广泛使用的基准数据集上，针对多种噪声类型和剪枝比例进行实验，与最先进基线相比准确率提升最高 6.3%。
limitations: 可能对极端噪声比例或非对称噪声的鲁棒性有待验证。
损失轨迹计算可能增加额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，对噪声场景下的剪枝有实际价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于损失轨迹的动态剪枝方法 AlignPrune，在标签噪声下提升鲁棒性。

papers.title: GIRL: Generative Imagination Reinforcement Learning via Information-Theoretic Hallucination Control
papers.abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) improves sample efficiency by optimizing policies inside imagined rollouts, but long-horizon planning degrades when model errors compound and imagined trajectories drift off the training manifold. We introduce GIRL (Generative Imagination Reinforcement Learning), a latent world-model framework that addresses this failure mode with two key components. First, a cross-modal grounding signal derived from a frozen foundation model (DINOv2) anchors the latent transition prior to a semantically consistent embedding space, penalizing inconsistent or implausible predictions. Second, an uncertainty-adaptive trust-region bottleneck interprets the KL regularizer as the Lagrange multiplier of a constrained optimization problem, restricting imagination drift within a learned region calibrated by Expected Information Gain and a Relative Performance Loss signal. We re-derive a value-gap bound using the Performance Difference Lemma and Integral Probability Metrics, yielding a bound that remains informative as the discount factor approaches one and connects the objective to real-environment regret. Experiments across three benchmark suites, including DeepMind Control, Adroit Hand Manipulation, and Meta-World with visual distractors, show that GIRL reduces latent rollout drift by 38 to 61 percent across tasks relative to DreamerV3, improves asymptotic return, and requires fewer environment interactions on long-horizon tasks. GIRL also outperforms TD-MPC2 on sparse-reward and high-contact settings under standard evaluation metrics. A distilled-prior variant reduces inference overhead and improves computational efficiency relative to the full model.

analysis.tldr: GIRL通过信息论幻觉控制约束潜在想象漂移，提升基于模型的强化学习在长时域任务中的样本效率与性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）通过想象轨迹提升样本效率，但模型误差累积会导致想象轨迹偏离训练流形，尤其在长时域规划中性能严重退化。
analysis.problem: 解决MBRL中长时域规划时想象轨迹漂移（imagination drift）导致的性能下降问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出模型误差累积使想象轨迹偏离训练流形，导致长时域规划性能退化；GIRL通过跨模态锚定和不确定性自适应瓶颈有效减少漂移。
analysis.method: 提出GIRL框架，包含两个关键组件：1）利用冻结基础模型（DINOv2）的跨模态接地信号将潜在转移先验锚定到语义一致的嵌入空间；2）不确定性自适应信任区域瓶颈，将KL正则化解释为约束优化的拉格朗日乘子，通过期望信息增益和相对性能损失信号校准漂移限制。
contributions: 提出GIRL框架，通过信息论幻觉控制减少潜在想象漂移，提升长时域规划性能。
推导了在折扣因子接近1时仍保持信息量的值间隙界，连接目标与真实环境遗憾。
在DeepMind Control、Adroit Hand Manipulation和Meta-World三个基准套件上验证，相比DreamerV3减少38%-61%的潜在漂移，提升渐近回报和样本效率。
analysis.experiments: 在DeepMind Control、Adroit Hand Manipulation和Meta-World（含视觉干扰）三个基准套件上评估，与DreamerV3和TD-MPC2对比，报告了潜在漂移减少百分比、渐近回报和环境交互次数等指标。
limitations: 依赖冻结基础模型（DINOv2）的跨模态信号，可能限制在无预训练模型场景的适用性。
蒸馏先验变体虽降低推理开销，但可能牺牲部分性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（信息论约束+跨模态锚定），实验充分且效果显著，与强化学习核心方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GIRL通过信息论幻觉控制约束潜在想象漂移，提升基于模型的强化学习在长时域任务中的样本效率与性能。

papers.title: Chatbot-Based Assessment of Code Understanding in Automated Programming Assessment Systems
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) challenge conventional automated programming assessment because students can now produce functionally correct code without demonstrating corresponding understanding. This paper makes two contributions. First, it reports a saturation-based scoping review of conversational assessment approaches in programming education. The review identifies three dominant architectural families: rule-based or template-driven systems, LLM-based systems, and hybrid systems. Across the literature, conversational agents appear promising for scalable feedback and deeper probing of code understanding, but important limitations remain around hallucinations, over-reliance, privacy, integrity, and deployment constraints. Second, the paper synthesizes these findings into a Hybrid Socratic Framework for integrating conversational verification into Automated Programming Assessment Systems (APASs). The framework combines deterministic code analysis with a dual-agent conversational layer, knowledge tracking, scaffolded questioning, and guardrails that tie prompts to runtime facts. The paper also discusses practical safeguards against LLM-generated explanations, including proctored deployment modes, randomized trace questions, stepwise reasoning tied to concrete execution states, and local-model deployment options for privacy-sensitive settings. Rather than replacing conventional testing, the framework is intended as a complementary layer for verifying whether students understand the code they submit.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合苏格拉底框架，将对话式验证集成到自动编程评估系统中，以检测学生是否真正理解代码。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM使学生能生成功能正确的代码而不展示理解，传统自动编程评估无法检测这种理解缺失，需要新的验证方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在自动编程评估系统中有效评估学生对提交代码的理解程度，防止LLM辅助下的作弊。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过饱和性范围综述识别三类对话评估架构（规则/模板驱动、LLM基础、混合），并综合提出混合苏格拉底框架，结合确定性代码分析、双智能体对话层、知识追踪、支架式提问和护栏机制。
contributions: 报告了编程教育中对话评估方法的饱和性范围综述，识别三种架构家族。
提出了混合苏格拉底框架，用于将对话验证集成到自动编程评估系统中。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架尚未经过实证验证。
可能面临LLM幻觉和隐私问题的实际挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 综述+框架设计，无实验验证，创新中等，对编程教育评估有参考价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合苏格拉底框架，将对话式验证集成到自动编程评估系统中，以检测学生是否真正理解代码。

papers.title: An Analysis of Artificial Intelligence Adoption in NIH-Funded Research
papers.abstract: Understanding the landscape of artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) adoption across the National Institutes of Health (NIH) portfolio is critical for research funding strategy, institutional planning, and health policy. The advent of large language models (LLMs) has fundamentally transformed research landscape analysis, enabling researchers to perform large-scale semantic extraction from thousands of unstructured research documents. In this paper, we illustrate a human-in-the-loop research methodology for LLMs to automatically classify and summarize research descriptions at scale. Using our methodology, we present a comprehensive analysis of 58,746 NIH-funded biomedical research projects from 2025. We show that: (1) AI constitutes 15.9% of the NIH portfolio with a 13.4% funding premium, concentrated in discovery, prediction, and data integration across disease domains; (2) a critical research-to-deployment gap exists, with 79% of AI projects remaining in research/development stages while only 14.7% engage in clinical deployment or implementation; and (3) health disparities research is severely underrepresented at just 5.7% of AI-funded work despite its importance to NIH's equity mission. These findings establish a framework for evidence-based policy interventions to align the NIH AI portfolio with health equity goals and strategic research priorities.

analysis.tldr: 利用LLM分析NIH资助的58,746个生物医学项目，揭示AI占比15.9%但临床部署仅14.7%，健康差异研究严重不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解NIH资助研究中AI/ML的采用情况对资金策略、机构规划和健康政策至关重要，但传统分析方法难以处理大规模非结构化文档。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM自动分类和总结大规模研究描述，以系统分析NIH资助项目中AI的采用现状、资金分布和部署差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：AI项目占NIH组合的15.9%且享有13.4%的资金溢价；79%的AI项目停留在研究/开发阶段，仅14.7%进入临床部署；健康差异研究仅占AI资助工作的5.7%，严重不足。
analysis.method: 提出一种人机协同的研究方法，利用LLM对58,746个NIH资助项目描述进行自动分类和总结。
contributions: 首次大规模量化分析NIH资助项目中AI的采用率、资金溢价和部署差距。
揭示健康差异研究在AI资助中的严重不足，为政策干预提供证据基础。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了基于58,746个项目的分析发现。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM分类的准确性，未提及验证或误差分析。
仅分析2025年数据，未考虑时间趋势或历史对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法创新性一般，但分析结果对政策制定有较高参考价值，适合关注AI政策与生物医学交叉的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用LLM分析NIH资助的58,746个生物医学项目，揭示AI占比15.9%但临床部署仅14.7%，健康差异研究严重不足。

papers.title: Region-Graph Optimal Transport Routing for Mixture-of-Experts Whole-Slide Image Classification
papers.abstract: Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) is the dominant framework for gigapixel whole-slide image (WSI) classification in computational pathology. However, current MIL aggregators route all instances through a shared pathway, constraining their capacity to specialise across the pathological heterogeneity inherent in each slide. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) methods offer a natural remedy by partitioning instances across specialised expert subnetworks; yet unconstrained softmax routing may yield highly imbalanced utilisation, where one or a few experts absorb most routing mass, collapsing the mixture back to a near-single-pathway solution. To address these limitations, we propose ROAM (Region-graph OptimAl-transport Mixture-of-experts), a spatially aware MoE-MIL aggregator that routes region tokens to expert poolers via capacity-constrained entropic optimal transport, promoting balanced expert utilisation by construction. ROAM operates on spatial region tokens, obtained by compressing dense patch bags into spatially binned units that align routing with local tissue neighbourhoods and introduces two key mechanisms: (i) region-to-expert assignment formulated as entropic optimal transport (Sinkhorn) with explicit per slide capacity marginals, enforcing balanced expert utilisation without auxiliary load-balancing losses; and (ii) graph-regularised Sinkhorn iterations that diffuse routing assignments over the spatial region graph, encouraging neighbouring regions to coherently route to the same experts. Evaluated on four WSI benchmarks with frozen foundation-model patch embeddings, ROAM achieves performance competitive against strong MIL and MoE baselines, and on NSCLC generalisation (TCGA-CPTAC) reaches external AUC 0.845 +- 0.019.

analysis.tldr: 提出ROAM，用最优传输实现混合专家模型中的均衡路由，用于全切片图像分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MIL聚合器将所有实例通过共享路径处理，无法适应病理异质性；MoE方法虽能缓解，但无约束的softmax路由导致专家利用不平衡，退化为单一路径。
analysis.problem: 解决MoE-MIL中专家路由不平衡问题，实现空间感知的均衡专家分配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 无约束softmax路由导致少数专家吸收大部分路由质量，专家利用高度不平衡。
analysis.method: 提出ROAM，基于空间区域token，通过容量约束的熵最优传输（Sinkhorn）进行区域到专家的分配，并引入图正则化Sinkhorn迭代以鼓励相邻区域路由到相同专家。
contributions: 提出基于最优传输的MoE-MIL聚合器，通过显式容量边际实现均衡专家利用，无需辅助负载均衡损失。
引入图正则化Sinkhorn迭代，利用空间区域图扩散路由分配，增强局部一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在四个WSI基准上评估，使用冻结基础模型补丁嵌入，ROAM在NSCLC泛化（TCGA-CPTAC）上达到外部AUC 0.845±0.019，与强MIL和MoE基线竞争。
limitations: 可能依赖空间区域划分的质量。
最优传输计算可能带来额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高（最优传输+图正则化），实验显示竞争力，但摘要未提供全面SOTA对比。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ROAM，用最优传输实现混合专家模型中的均衡路由，用于全切片图像分类。

papers.title: CADENCE: Context-Adaptive Depth Estimation for Navigation and Computational Efficiency
papers.abstract: Autonomous vehicles deployed in remote environments typically rely on embedded processors, compact batteries, and lightweight sensors. These hardware limitations conflict with the need to derive robust representations of the environment, which often requires executing computationally intensive deep neural networks for perception. To address this challenge, we present CADENCE, an adaptive system that dynamically scales the computational complexity of a slimmable monocular depth estimation network in response to navigation needs and environmental context. By closing the loop between perception fidelity and actuation requirements, CADENCE ensures high-precision computing is only used when mission-critical. We conduct evaluations on our released open-source testbed that integrates Microsoft AirSim with an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano. As compared to a state-of-the-art static approach, CADENCE decreases sensor acquisitions, power consumption, and inference latency by 9.67%, 16.1%, and 74.8%, respectively. The results demonstrate an overall reduction in energy expenditure by 75.0%, along with an increase in navigation accuracy by 7.43%.

analysis.tldr: CADENCE通过自适应缩放单目深度估计网络的计算复杂度，在导航任务中降低能耗和延迟，同时提升精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 远程环境中的自动驾驶车辆受限于嵌入式处理器、紧凑电池和轻量传感器，而高精度感知需要计算密集的深度神经网络，两者存在矛盾。
analysis.problem: 如何在资源受限的嵌入式平台上，根据导航需求和环境上下文动态调整感知模型的计算复杂度，以平衡精度与效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CADENCE自适应系统，使用可缩放（slimmable）的单目深度估计网络，根据导航需求和环境上下文动态调整计算复杂度，仅在任务关键时使用高精度计算。
contributions: 提出CADENCE自适应系统，动态缩放深度估计网络复杂度以匹配导航需求。
发布集成Microsoft AirSim与NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano的开源测试平台。
实验表明相比静态方法，传感器采集减少9.67%，功耗降低16.1%，推理延迟降低74.8%，总能耗降低75.0%，导航精度提升7.43%。
analysis.experiments: 在集成AirSim与Jetson Orin Nano的开源测试平台上评估，与最先进静态方法对比，报告了传感器采集、功耗、推理延迟、能耗和导航精度的量化结果。
limitations: 仅在仿真环境中评估，未在真实车辆上验证。
方法依赖单目深度估计，可能受光照和纹理影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，实验充分且效果显著，与导航应用强相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CADENCE通过自适应缩放单目深度估计网络的计算复杂度，在导航任务中降低能耗和延迟，同时提升精度。

papers.title: Are Face Embeddings Compatible Across Deep Neural Network Models?
papers.abstract: Automated face recognition has made rapid strides over the past decade due to the unprecedented rise of deep neural network (DNN) models that can be trained for domain-specific tasks. At the same time, foundation models that are pretrained on broad vision or vision-language tasks have shown impressive generalization across diverse domains, including biometrics. This raises an important question: Do different DNN models--both domain-specific and foundation models--encode facial identity in similar ways, despite being trained on different datasets, loss functions, and architectures? In this regard, we directly analyze the geometric structure of embedding spaces imputed by different DNN models. Treating embeddings of face images as point clouds, we study whether simple affine transformations can align face representations of one model with another. Our findings reveal surprising cross-model compatibility: low-capacity linear mappings substantially improve cross-model face recognition over unaligned baselines for both face identification and verification tasks. Alignment patterns generalize across datasets and vary systematically across model families, indicating representational convergence in facial identity encoding. These findings have implications for model interoperability, ensemble design, and biometric template security.

analysis.tldr: 不同深度神经网络模型的人脸嵌入在几何结构上存在兼容性，可通过简单仿射变换对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 不同DNN模型（包括领域专用模型和基础模型）在训练数据、损失函数和架构上差异巨大，但它们在编码人脸身份时是否具有相似的表征方式尚不清楚，这影响模型互操作性和集成设计。
analysis.problem: 研究不同DNN模型的人脸嵌入空间是否可以通过简单变换对齐，以及跨模型兼容性的程度和规律。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现低容量线性映射能显著提升跨模型人脸识别性能，对齐模式在不同数据集间泛化，且在不同模型族中呈现系统性变化，表明人脸身份编码存在表征收敛。
analysis.method: 将不同模型的人脸嵌入视为点云，通过仿射变换（线性映射）对齐嵌入空间，并评估对齐后的人脸识别性能。
contributions: 首次系统研究不同DNN模型（包括基础模型）人脸嵌入的跨模型兼容性。
发现简单线性映射即可实现有效对齐，揭示表征收敛现象。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅分析仿射变换，未探索非线性对齐方法。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 不同深度神经网络模型的人脸嵌入在几何结构上存在兼容性，可通过简单仿射变换对齐。

papers.title: Mem3R: Streaming 3D Reconstruction with Hybrid Memory via Test-Time Training
papers.abstract: Streaming 3D perception is well suited to robotics and augmented reality, where long visual streams must be processed efficiently and consistently. Recent recurrent models offer a promising solution by maintaining fixed-size states and enabling linear-time inference, but they often suffer from drift accumulation and temporal forgetting over long sequences due to the limited capacity of compressed latent memories. We propose Mem3R, a streaming 3D reconstruction model with a hybrid memory design that decouples camera tracking from geometric mapping to improve temporal consistency over long sequences. For camera tracking, Mem3R employs an implicit fast-weight memory implemented as a lightweight Multi-Layer Perceptron updated via Test-Time Training. For geometric mapping, Mem3R maintains an explicit token-based fixed-size state. Compared with CUT3R, this design not only significantly improves long-sequence performance but also reduces the model size from 793M to 644M parameters. Mem3R supports existing improved plug-and-play state update strategies developed for CUT3R. Specifically, integrating it with TTT3R decreases Absolute Trajectory Error by up to 39% over the base implementation on 500 to 1000 frame sequences. The resulting improvements also extend to other downstream tasks, including video depth estimation and 3D reconstruction, while preserving constant GPU memory usage and comparable inference throughput. Project page: https://lck666666.github.io/Mem3R/

analysis.tldr: Mem3R通过混合记忆设计（隐式快速权重+显式固定状态）提升长序列流式3D重建的时序一致性，在500-1000帧序列上绝对轨迹误差降低39%。
analysis.research_motivation: 流式3D感知在机器人和增强现实中至关重要，但现有递归模型因压缩潜在记忆容量有限，在长序列中面临漂移累积和时间遗忘问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种流式3D重建模型，在保持固定大小状态和线性时间推理的同时，克服长序列中的漂移累积和时间遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有递归模型（如CUT3R）因压缩潜在记忆容量有限，在长序列中遭受漂移累积和时间遗忘。
analysis.method: 提出混合记忆设计：相机跟踪使用隐式快速权重记忆（通过测试时训练更新的轻量MLP），几何建图使用显式基于token的固定大小状态。
contributions: 提出混合记忆架构，将相机跟踪与几何建图解耦，提升长序列时序一致性。
在500-1000帧序列上，结合TTT3R使绝对轨迹误差降低39%，模型参数从793M减至644M。
analysis.experiments: 在500至1000帧序列上评估，与CUT3R和TTT3R对比，绝对轨迹误差降低39%，并扩展到视频深度估计和3D重建下游任务，GPU内存恒定，推理吞吐量相当。
limitations: 可能对极长序列（>1000帧）的泛化能力未充分验证。
测试时训练可能增加计算开销，实时性需进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（混合记忆+测试时训练）且实验充分，长序列性能提升显著，与重点方向3D视觉强相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Mem3R通过混合记忆设计（隐式快速权重+显式固定状态）提升长序列流式3D重建的时序一致性，在500-1000帧序列上绝对轨迹误差降低39%。

papers.title: Android Coach: Improve Online Agentic Training Efficiency with Single State Multiple Actions
papers.abstract: Online reinforcement learning (RL) serves as an effective method for enhancing the capabilities of Android agents. However, guiding agents to learn through online interaction is prohibitively expensive due to the high latency of emulators and the sample inefficiency of existing RL algorithms. We identify a fundamental limitation in current approaches: the Single State Single Action paradigm, which updates the policy with one-to-one state-action pairs from online one-way rollouts without fully exploring each costly emulator state. In this paper, we propose Android Coach, a novel framework that shifts the training paradigm to Single State Multiple Actions, allowing the agent to sample and utilize multiple actions for a single online state. We enable this without additional emulator overhead by learning a critic that estimates action values. To ensure the critic serves as a reliable coach, we integrate a process reward model and introduce a group-wise advantage estimator based on the averaged critic outputs. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of Android Coach: it achieves 7.5% and 8.3% success rate improvements on AndroidLab and AndroidWorld over UI-TARS-1.5-7B, and attains 1.4x higher training efficiency than Single State Single Action methods PPO and GRPO at matched success rates.

analysis.tldr: 提出Android Coach框架，通过单状态多动作范式提升Android智能体在线训练效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线强化学习能提升Android智能体能力，但模拟器延迟高和现有算法样本效率低导致训练成本过高。
analysis.problem: 当前方法采用单状态单动作范式，未充分利用每个昂贵的模拟器状态，导致样本效率低下。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Android Coach框架，将训练范式转变为单状态多动作，通过学习动作值估计的评论家，结合过程奖励模型和基于平均评论家输出的组优势估计器，无需额外模拟器开销。
contributions: 识别了单状态单动作范式的局限性，并提出单状态多动作范式。
设计了Android Coach框架，利用评论家实现多动作采样，并集成过程奖励模型和组优势估计器。
analysis.experiments: 在AndroidLab和AndroidWorld上，Android Coach相比UI-TARS-1.5-7B分别提升7.5%和8.3%的成功率，且在匹配成功率下训练效率比PPO和GRPO高1.4倍。
limitations: 可能依赖评论家的准确性，若估计偏差大可能影响性能。
框架在更复杂或动态性更强的环境中可能需调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，实验效果显著，与Agent方向相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Android Coach框架，通过单状态多动作范式提升Android智能体在线训练效率。

papers.title: Making Room for AI: Multi-GPU Molecular Dynamics with Deep Potentials in GROMACS
papers.abstract: GROMACS is a de-facto standard for classical Molecular Dynamics (MD). The rise of AI-driven interatomic potentials that pursue near-quantum accuracy at MD throughput now poses a significant challenge: embedding neural-network inference into multi-GPU simulations retaining high-performance. In this work, we integrate the MLIP framework DeePMD-kit into GROMACS, enabling domain-decomposed, GPU-accelerated inference across multi-node systems. We extend the GROMACS NNPot interface with a DeePMD backend, and we introduce a domain decomposition layer decoupled from the main simulation. The inference is executed concurrently on all processes, with two MPI collectives used each step to broadcast coordinates and to aggregate and redistribute forces. We train an in-house DPA-1 model (1.6 M parameters) on a dataset of solvated protein fragments. We validate the implementation on a small protein system, then we benchmark the GROMACS-DeePMD integration with a 15,668 atom protein on NVIDIA A100 and AMD MI250x GPUs up to 32 devices. Strong-scaling efficiency reaches 66% at 16 devices and 40% at 32; weak-scaling efficiency is 80% to 16 devices and reaches 48% (MI250x) and 40% (A100) at 32 devices. Profiling with the ROCm System profiler shows that >90% of the wall time is spent in DeePMD inference, while MPI collectives contribute <10%, primarily since they act as a global synchronization point. The principal bottlenecks are the irreducible ghost-atom cost set by the cutoff radius, confirmed by a simple throughput model, and load imbalance across ranks. These results demonstrate that production MD with near ab initio fidelity is feasible at scale in GROMACS.

analysis.tldr: 将DeePMD-kit集成到GROMACS中，实现多GPU分子动力学模拟，在32设备上达到66%强扩展效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 经典分子动力学模拟广泛使用GROMACS，但AI驱动的近量子精度势函数需要高效的多GPU推理，现有集成面临性能挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何在GROMACS中高效集成神经网络势函数（DeePMD-kit），实现多节点多GPU的域分解加速推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 在GROMACS中集成DeePMD-kit，支持多GPU域分解推理。
提出解耦的域分解层和高效的MPI通信策略。
在A100和MI250x上验证了强/弱扩展效率，并分析了瓶颈。

papers.title: A Systematic Study of Retrieval Pipeline Design for Retrieval-Augmented Medical Question Answering
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in medical question answering; however, purely parametric models often suffer from knowledge gaps and limited factual grounding. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) addresses this limitation by integrating external knowledge retrieval into the reasoning process. Despite increasing interest in RAG-based medical systems, the impact of individual retrieval components on performance remains insufficiently understood. This study presents a systematic evaluation of retrieval-augmented medical question answering using the MedQA USMLE benchmark and a structured textbook-based knowledge corpus. We analyze the interaction between language models, embedding models, retrieval strategies, query reformulation, and cross-encoder reranking within a unified experimental framework comprising forty configurations. Results show that retrieval augmentation significantly improves zero-shot medical question answering performance. The best-performing configuration was dense retrieval with query reformulation and reranking achieved 60.49% accuracy. Domain-specialized language models were also found to better utilize retrieved medical evidence than general-purpose models. The analysis further reveals a clear tradeoff between retrieval effectiveness and computational cost, with simpler dense retrieval configurations providing strong performance while maintaining higher throughput. All experiments were conducted on a single consumer-grade GPU, demonstrating that systematic evaluation of retrieval-augmented medical QA systems can be performed under modest computational resources.

analysis.tldr: 系统评估检索增强生成（RAG）在医学问答中的各组件影响，发现密集检索+查询重写+重排序最佳，领域专用模型更优。
analysis.research_motivation: 纯参数化LLM在医学问答中存在知识缺口和事实性不足，RAG通过外部检索弥补，但各检索组件对性能的影响尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 系统评估检索增强医学问答中不同检索组件（嵌入模型、检索策略、查询重写、重排序）对性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 检索增强显著提升零样本医学问答性能；领域专用模型比通用模型更好地利用检索证据；检索效果与计算成本存在权衡。
analysis.method: 在MedQA USMLE基准和结构化教科书知识语料上，构建包含40种配置的统一实验框架，系统评估语言模型、嵌入模型、检索策略、查询重写和交叉编码器重排序的交互。
contributions: 首次系统评估RAG医学问答中检索管道的各组件影响
发现密集检索+查询重写+重排序达到60.49%准确率的最佳配置
揭示领域专用模型在利用检索证据方面的优势及检索效果与计算成本的权衡
analysis.experiments: 在MedQA USMLE基准上评估40种配置，最佳配置准确率60.49%，所有实验在单消费级GPU上完成。
limitations: 仅使用单一基准（MedQA）和教科书语料，泛化性待验证
未探索更多检索策略或更大规模模型
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 系统评估有实用价值，但方法创新有限，实验规模中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统评估检索增强生成（RAG）在医学问答中的各组件影响，发现密集检索+查询重写+重排序最佳，领域专用模型更优。

papers.title: GenLCA: 3D Diffusion for Full-Body Avatars from In-the-Wild Videos
papers.abstract: We present GenLCA, a diffusion-based generative model for generating and editing photorealistic full-body avatars from text and image inputs. The generated avatars are faithful to the inputs, while supporting high-fidelity facial and full-body animations. The core idea is a novel paradigm that enables training a full-body 3D diffusion model from partially observable 2D data, allowing the training dataset to scale to millions of real-world videos. This scalability contributes to the superior photorealism and generalizability of GenLCA. Specifically, we scale up the dataset by repurposing a pretrained feed-forward avatar reconstruction model as an animatable 3D tokenizer, which encodes unstructured video frames into structured 3D tokens. However, most real-world videos only provide partial observations of body parts, resulting in excessive blurring or transparency artifacts in the 3D tokens. To address this, we propose a novel visibility-aware diffusion training strategy that replaces invalid regions with learnable tokens and computes losses only over valid regions. We then train a flow-based diffusion model on the token dataset, inherently maintaining the photorealism and animatability provided by the pretrained avatar reconstruction model. Our approach effectively enables the use of large-scale real-world video data to train a diffusion model natively in 3D. We demonstrate the efficacy of our method through diverse and high-fidelity generation and editing results, outperforming existing solutions by a large margin. The project page is available at https://onethousandwu.com/GenLCA-Page.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种从野外视频训练3D全身化身扩散模型的方法，通过可见性感知训练策略解决部分观测问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D化身生成方法受限于小规模数据集，难以实现高真实感和泛化性，而大规模真实视频数据存在部分观测和伪影问题。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大规模野外视频数据训练3D全身化身扩散模型，同时处理部分观测导致的模糊和透明伪影。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 真实世界视频通常只提供身体部位的部分观测，导致3D token出现过度模糊或透明伪影。
analysis.method: 提出GenLCA，包括：1) 利用预训练前馈化身重建模型作为可动画3D分词器，将视频帧编码为结构化3D token；2) 可见性感知扩散训练策略，用可学习token替换无效区域并仅在有效区域计算损失；3) 在token数据集上训练流匹配扩散模型。
contributions: 提出一种从部分观测2D数据训练全身3D扩散模型的新范式，使训练数据集可扩展到数百万真实视频。
提出可见性感知扩散训练策略，有效处理部分观测导致的伪影问题。
在文本和图像驱动的全身化身生成与编辑任务上达到SOTA，支持高保真面部和全身动画。
analysis.experiments: 通过多样化的生成和编辑结果展示了方法的有效性，在真实感和泛化性上显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 依赖预训练化身重建模型的质量，可能引入其固有偏差。
训练和推理计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，利用大规模视频数据训练3D扩散模型，解决部分观测问题，实验效果显著，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种从野外视频训练3D全身化身扩散模型的方法，通过可见性感知训练策略解决部分观测问题。

papers.title: Validated Intent Compilation for Constrained Routing in LEO Mega-Constellations
papers.abstract: Operating LEO mega-constellations requires translating high-level operator intents ("reroute financial traffic away from polar links under 80 ms") into low-level routing constraints -- a task that demands both natural language understanding and network-domain expertise. We present an end-to-end system comprising three components: (1) a GNN cost-to-go router that distills Dijkstra-quality routing into a 152K-parameter graph attention network achieving 99.8% packet delivery ratio with 17x inference speedup; (2) an LLM intent compiler that converts natural language to a typed constraint intermediate representation using few-shot prompting with a verifier-feedback repair loop, achieving 98.4% compilation rate and 87.6% full semantic match on feasible intents in a 240-intent benchmark (193 feasible, 47 infeasible); and (3) an 8-pass deterministic validator with constructive feasibility certification that achieves 0% unsafe acceptance on all 47 infeasible intents (30 labeled + 17 discovered by Pass 8), with 100% corruption detection across 240 structural corruption tests and 100% on 15 targeted adversarial attacks. End-to-end evaluation across four constrained routing scenarios confirms zero constraint violations with both routers. We further demonstrate that apparent performance gaps in polar-avoidance scenarios are largely explained by topological reachability ceilings rather than routing quality, and that the LLM compiler outperforms a rule-based baseline by 46.2 percentage points on compositional intents. Our system bridges the semantic gap between operator intent and network configuration while maintaining the safety guarantees required for operational deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个端到端系统，结合GNN路由器和LLM意图编译器，实现LEO星座中自然语言意图到路由约束的可靠编译与验证。
analysis.research_motivation: LEO巨型星座的操作需要将高级操作员意图（如自然语言描述）转换为低层路由约束，这一任务既需要自然语言理解又需要网络领域专业知识，现有方法缺乏端到端的安全保证。
analysis.problem: 如何将自然语言表达的操作意图准确、安全地编译为LEO星座的路由约束，并确保编译结果的可执行性和安全性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三组件系统：1) GNN成本到路由器，用152K参数图注意力网络实现Dijkstra质量路由，17倍推理加速；2) LLM意图编译器，通过少样本提示和验证器反馈修复循环将自然语言转换为类型化约束中间表示；3) 8遍确定性验证器，提供构造性可行性认证。
contributions: 提出首个端到端系统，将自然语言意图编译为LEO星座路由约束，并保证安全。
GNN路由器在极低参数量下达到99.8%包投递率，推理速度提升17倍。
LLM编译器在240意图基准上达到98.4%编译率和87.6%语义匹配率，验证器对不可行意图实现0%不安全接受。
analysis.experiments: 在240意图基准（193可行，47不可行）上评估，LLM编译器编译率98.4%，语义匹配率87.6%；验证器对47个不可行意图0%不安全接受，100%检测结构破坏和对抗攻击；端到端评估在四个约束路由场景中零约束违反。
limitations: 系统依赖LLM的少样本能力，可能对罕见或复杂意图泛化不足。
验证器为8遍确定性算法，可能无法覆盖所有动态网络条件。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 系统创新性强，但应用领域（卫星网络）与主流ML方向距离较远，推荐保存以备后续参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个端到端系统，结合GNN路由器和LLM意图编译器，实现LEO星座中自然语言意图到路由约束的可靠编译与验证。

papers.title: BATON: A Multimodal Benchmark for Bidirectional Automation Transition Observation in Naturalistic Driving
papers.abstract: Existing driving automation (DA) systems on production vehicles rely on human drivers to decide when to engage DA while requiring them to remain continuously attentive and ready to intervene. This design demands substantial situational judgment and imposes significant cognitive load, leading to steep learning curves, suboptimal user experience, and safety risks from both over-reliance and delayed takeover. Predicting when drivers hand over control to DA and when they take it back is therefore critical for designing proactive, context-aware HMI, yet existing datasets rarely capture the multimodal context, including road scene, driver state, vehicle dynamics, and route environment. To fill this gap, we introduce BATON, a large-scale naturalistic dataset capturing real-world DA usage across 127 drivers, and 136.6 hours of driving. The dataset synchronizes front-view video, in-cabin video, decoded CAN bus signals, radar-based lead-vehicle interaction, and GPS-derived route context, forming a closed-loop multimodal record around each control transition. We define three benchmark tasks: driving action understanding, handover prediction, and takeover prediction, and evaluate baselines spanning sequence models, classical classifiers, and zero-shot VLMs. Results show that visual input alone is insufficient for reliable transition prediction: front-view video captures road context but not driver state, while in-cabin video reflects driver readiness but not the external scene. Incorporating CAN and route-context signals substantially improves performance over video-only settings, indicating strong complementarity across modalities. We further find takeover events develop more gradually and benefit from longer prediction horizons, whereas handover events depend more on immediate contextual cues, revealing an asymmetry with direct implications for HMI design in assisted driving systems.

analysis.tldr: BATON是一个大规模自然驾驶数据集，用于预测驾驶员与驾驶自动化系统之间的控制权交接，揭示了多模态信息互补的重要性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有驾驶自动化系统依赖驾驶员决定何时启用，并要求持续保持注意力，导致认知负荷高、学习曲线陡峭，且存在过度依赖和延迟接管的安全风险。预测控制权交接对设计主动式人机界面至关重要，但现有数据集缺乏多模态上下文信息。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多模态数据（道路场景、驾驶员状态、车辆动力学、路线环境）准确预测驾驶员与驾驶自动化系统之间的控制权交接（包括手动作和接管动作）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：仅靠视觉输入不足以可靠预测控制权交接；前视视频捕捉道路上下文但无法反映驾驶员状态，舱内视频反映驾驶员准备状态但无法捕捉外部场景。结合CAN信号和路线上下文信号显著提升性能，表明多模态互补性。此外，接管事件发展更渐进，受益于更长的预测窗口，而手动作更依赖即时上下文线索，呈现不对称性。
analysis.method: 构建了包含127名驾驶员、136.6小时驾驶数据的大规模自然驾驶数据集BATON，同步采集前视视频、舱内视频、CAN总线信号、雷达前车交互和GPS路线上下文。定义了三个基准任务：驾驶动作理解、手动作预测和接管预测，并评估了序列模型、经典分类器和零样本VLM。
contributions: 提出了BATON数据集，首个大规模多模态自然驾驶数据集，覆盖真实驾驶自动化使用场景。
定义了三个基准任务（驾驶动作理解、手动作预测、接管预测），并提供了多模态基线评估。
揭示了多模态信息互补性以及手动作与接管事件的不对称性，为HMI设计提供指导。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及评估了序列模型、经典分类器和零样本VLM，并比较了不同模态组合的性能。
limitations: 数据集可能受限于特定驾驶场景和驾驶员群体，泛化性有待验证。
零样本VLM性能可能有限，未提及微调或领域适应。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 数据集新颖且针对实际驾驶安全问题，多模态设计有应用价值，但实验细节有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BATON是一个大规模自然驾驶数据集，用于预测驾驶员与驾驶自动化系统之间的控制权交接，揭示了多模态信息互补的重要性。

papers.title: Playing Games with My Heart: An Evaluation of AI Companion Apps
papers.abstract: The use of chatbots for various forms of companionship is growing rapidly, raising a myriad of questions about simulated relationships, emotional dependence, and psychological harm. While major platforms such as ChatGPT, Grok, and Character.AI are the subject of a growing body of research and legal inquiries, apps explicitly built for simulating intimate interpersonal relationships remain under-explored. In this work, we evaluate the five most popular AI companion mobile applications in the EU and UK markets for factors that encourage parasocial interaction and may manipulate users. We do this by manually annotating the user experience each offers. Specifically, we systematically record and quantify design dark patterns, anthropomorphism, stereotypes, erotica, and technical performance issues. We find that all apps contain substantial dark patterns aimed at increasing monetisation and user engagement. Erotica and gamification features such as levelling are also prevalent, and although other features vary considerably between applications, all apps have highly anthropomorphic design. These findings shed light on the mechanics used to leverage users' simulated relationships. On that basis, we put forward concrete recommendations for regulators to strengthen consumer protection in this rapidly emerging market. Content warning: This article contains objectifying images of women, erotic images, textual references to incest, and other potentially sensitive, offensive, and distressing text.

analysis.tldr: 评估五款主流AI伴侣应用，发现普遍存在暗黑模式、拟人化设计和色情内容，可能操纵用户情感。
analysis.research_motivation: AI伴侣应用快速增长，但针对模拟亲密关系的应用研究不足，存在情感依赖和心理伤害风险。
analysis.problem: 评估AI伴侣应用中的暗黑模式、拟人化、刻板印象、色情内容和技术性能问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有应用均包含大量暗黑模式以增加变现和用户参与；色情和游戏化功能普遍；拟人化设计高度一致。
analysis.method: 手动标注五款流行AI伴侣应用的用户体验，系统记录和量化暗黑模式、拟人化、刻板印象、色情内容和技术性能。
contributions: 首次系统评估AI伴侣应用中的暗黑模式和操纵性设计。
提出针对监管机构的具体建议以加强消费者保护。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅评估五款应用，可能不具全面代表性。
手动标注可能存在主观性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 研究主题新颖且具有社会影响，但方法为手动标注，技术深度一般。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 评估五款主流AI伴侣应用，发现普遍存在暗黑模式、拟人化设计和色情内容，可能操纵用户情感。

papers.title: Non-identifiability of Explanations from Model Behavior in Deep Networks of Image Authenticity Judgments
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks can predict human judgments, but this does not imply that they rely on human-like information or reveal the cues underlying those judgments. Prior work has addressed this issue using attribution heatmaps, but their explanatory value in itself depends on robustness. Here we tested the robustness of such explanations by evaluating whether models that predict human authenticity ratings also produce consistent explanations within and across architectures. We fit lightweight regression heads to multiple frozen pretrained vision models and generated attribution maps using Grad-CAM, LIME, and multiscale pixel masking. Several architectures predicted ratings well, reaching about 80% of the noise ceiling. VGG models achieved this by tracking image quality rather than authenticity-specific variance, limiting the relevance of their attributions. Among the remaining models, attribution maps were generally stable across random seeds within an architecture, especially for EfficientNetB3 and Barlow Twins, and consistency was higher for images judged as more authentic. Crucially, agreement in attribution across architectures was weak even when predictive performance was similar. To address this, we combined models in ensembles, which improved prediction of human authenticity judgments and enabled image-level attribution via pixel masking. We conclude that while deep networks can predict human authenticity judgments well, they do not produce identifiable explanations for those judgments. More broadly, our findings suggest that post hoc explanations from successful models of behavior should be treated as weak evidence for cognitive mechanism.

analysis.tldr: 深度网络预测人类真实性判断时，不同架构的解释不一致，说明事后解释不能可靠揭示认知机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度神经网络能预测人类判断，但并不意味着它们使用了类似人类的信息或揭示了判断背后的线索，需要验证解释方法的鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 评估预测人类真实性判断的深度网络是否产生一致且可识别的解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VGG模型通过跟踪图像质量而非真实性特定方差来预测，限制了归因的相关性；不同架构间的归因一致性弱，即使预测性能相似。
analysis.method: 在多个冻结的预训练视觉模型上拟合轻量级回归头，使用Grad-CAM、LIME和多尺度像素掩码生成归因图，并集成模型以提高预测和解释。
contributions: 发现深度网络预测人类真实性判断时，解释在不同架构间不可识别。
提出集成模型可改善预测和图像级归因。
analysis.experiments: 在人类真实性评分数据集上测试多个架构，预测达到约80%噪声上限，但归因一致性仅在架构内稳定，跨架构弱。
limitations: 仅使用有限数量的架构和解释方法。
未探索其他解释技术或更复杂的模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法常规但发现重要，适合关注可解释性的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 深度网络预测人类真实性判断时，不同架构的解释不一致，说明事后解释不能可靠揭示认知机制。

papers.title: Designing Safe and Accountable GenAI as a Learning Companion with Women Banned from Formal Education
papers.abstract: In gender-restrictive and surveilled contexts, where access to formal education may be restricted for women, pursuing education involves safety and privacy risks. When women are excluded from schools and universities, they often turn to online self-learning and generative AI (GenAI) to pursue their educational and career aspirations. However, we know little about what safe and accountable GenAI support is required in the context of surveillance, household responsibilities, and the absence of learning communities. We present a remote participatory design study with 20 women in Afghanistan, informed by a recruitment survey (n = 140), examining how participants envision GenAI for learning and employability. Participants describe using GenAI less as an information source and more as an always-available peer, mentor, and source of career guidance that helps compensate for the absence of learning communities. At the same time, they emphasize that this companionship is constrained by privacy and surveillance risks, contextually unrealistic and culturally unsafe support, and direct-answer interactions that can undermine learning by creating an illusion of progress. Beyond eliciting requirements, envisioning the future with GenAI through participatory design was positively associated with significant increases in participants' aspirations (p=.01), perceived agency (p=.01), and perceived avenues (p=.03). These outcomes show that accountable and safe GenAI is not only about harm reduction but can also actively enable women to imagine and pursue viable learning and employment futures. Building on this, we translate participants' proposals into accountability-focused design directions that center on safety-first interaction and user control, context-grounded support under constrained resources, and offer pedagogically aligned assistance that supports genuine learning rather than quick answers.

analysis.tldr: 针对被禁止接受正规教育的阿富汗女性，通过参与式设计探索安全、负责任的生成式AI学习伴侣需求。
analysis.research_motivation: 在性别限制和监控环境下，女性无法接受正规教育，转而依赖在线自学和生成式AI，但现有AI缺乏针对此类高风险、资源受限场景的安全与问责设计。
analysis.problem: 如何设计安全、负责任且符合文化背景的生成式AI学习伴侣，以支持被禁止接受正规教育的女性的学习和就业需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 参与者将GenAI视为同伴和导师而非信息源，但强调陪伴受隐私风险、不切实际的文化不安全支持以及直接答案交互（造成进步幻觉）的制约。
analysis.method: 远程参与式设计研究，包括招募调查（n=140）和与20名阿富汗女性的深度设计会话。
contributions: 揭示了在性别限制和监控环境下女性对GenAI学习伴侣的独特需求（如同伴、导师角色）及安全/隐私约束。
通过参与式设计显著提升了参与者的抱负、能动性和感知途径（p<0.05），表明负责任的AI可主动赋能。
提出了以问责为中心的设计方向：安全优先交互与用户控制、资源受限下的情境化支持、促进真实学习的教学对齐辅助。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及参与式设计后抱负（p=.01）、能动性（p=.01）和感知途径（p=.03）显著提升。
limitations: 样本仅限阿富汗女性，结论可能不适用于其他性别限制环境。
参与式设计结果可能受文化表达偏差影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 研究聚焦高风险场景下的AI安全与问责，方法新颖（参与式设计），但技术深度较低，适合关注AI伦理与社会影响的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对被禁止接受正规教育的阿富汗女性，通过参与式设计探索安全、负责任的生成式AI学习伴侣需求。

papers.title: Geo-EVS: Geometry-Conditioned Extrapolative View Synthesis for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Extrapolative novel view synthesis can reduce camera-rig dependency in autonomous driving by generating standardized virtual views from heterogeneous sensors. Existing methods degrade outside recorded trajectories because extrapolated poses provide weak geometric support and no dense target-view supervision. The key is to explicitly expose the model to out-of-trajectory condition defects during training. We propose Geo-EVS, a geometry-conditioned framework under sparse supervision. Geo-EVS has two components. Geometry-Aware Reprojection (GAR) uses fine-tuned VGGT to reconstruct colored point clouds and reproject them to observed and virtual target poses, producing geometric condition maps. This design unifies the reprojection path between training and inference. Artifact-Guided Latent Diffusion (AGLD) injects reprojection-derived artifact masks during training so the model learns to recover structure under missing support. For evaluation, we use a LiDAR-Projected Sparse-Reference (LPSR) protocol when dense extrapolated-view ground truth is unavailable. On Waymo, Geo-EVS improves sparse-view synthesis quality and geometric accuracy, especially in high-angle and low-coverage settings. It also improves downstream 3D detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出几何条件外推视图合成框架Geo-EVS，通过统一重投影路径和伪影引导扩散，提升自动驾驶中稀疏监督下的外推视图质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶中不同传感器配置导致相机视角不一致，外推视图合成可生成标准化虚拟视图，但现有方法在轨迹外区域因几何支撑弱且缺乏密集真值监督而性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在外推姿态下，仅利用稀疏监督实现高质量的新视图合成，并提升下游3D检测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 外推姿态缺乏密集目标视图真值，且几何支撑弱，导致现有方法在轨迹外区域退化。
analysis.method: Geo-EVS包含两个组件：几何感知重投影（GAR）利用微调VGGT重建彩色点云并重投影到观测和虚拟目标姿态，生成几何条件图；伪影引导潜在扩散（AGLD）在训练时注入重投影导出的伪影掩码，使模型学会在缺失支撑下恢复结构。
contributions: 提出Geo-EVS框架，通过统一重投影路径解决训练与推理的差异。
设计伪影引导扩散机制，使模型适应外推条件下的几何缺陷。
提出LiDAR投影稀疏参考（LPSR）评估协议，用于无密集真值时的外推视图评估。
在Waymo数据集上，Geo-EVS在稀疏视图合成质量和几何精度上取得提升，并改善下游3D检测。
analysis.experiments: 在Waymo数据集上评估，使用LPSR协议，结果显示Geo-EVS在高角度和低覆盖场景下提升稀疏视图合成质量和几何精度，并改善下游3D检测。
limitations: 依赖LiDAR点云进行LPSR评估，可能不适用于无LiDAR场景。
方法在极稀疏监督下性能可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对自动驾驶外推视图合成痛点，实验验证有效，但依赖LiDAR评估可能限制通用性。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出几何条件外推视图合成框架Geo-EVS，通过统一重投影路径和伪影引导扩散，提升自动驾驶中稀疏监督下的外推视图质量。

papers.title: TurPy: a physics-based and differentiable optical turbulence simulator for algorithmic development and system optimization
papers.abstract: Developing optical systems for free-space applications requires simulation tools that accurately capture turbulence-induced wavefront distortions and support gradient-based optimization. Here we introduce TurPy, a GPU-accelerated, fully differentiable wave optics turbulence simulator to bridge high fidelity simulation with end-to-end optical system design. TurPy incorporates subharmonic phase screen generation, autoregressive temporal evolution, and an automated screen placement routine balancing Fourier aliasing constraints and weak-turbulence approximations into a unified, user-ready framework. Because TurPy's phase screen generation is parameterized through a media-specific power spectral density, the framework extends to atmospheric, oceanic, and biological propagation environments with minimal modification. We validate TurPy against established atmospheric turbulence theory by matching 2nd order Gaussian beam broadening and 4th order plane wave scintillation to closed-form models with 98% accuracy across weak to strong turbulence regimes, requiring only the medium's refractive index structure constant and power spectral density as inputs. To demonstrate TurPy as a gradient-based training platform, we optimize a dual-domain diffractive deep neural network (D2NN) in a two-mask dual-domain architecture to recover a Gaussian beam from a weakly turbulent path and achieving over 20x reduction in scintillation relative to an uncompensated receiver in simulation. TurPy is released as an open-source package to support synthetic data generation, turbulence-informed algorithm development, and the end-to-end design of optical platforms operating in turbulent environments.

analysis.tldr: TurPy 是一个基于物理、可微分的 GPU 加速光学湍流模拟器，支持端到端梯度优化，在弱到强湍流下与理论模型匹配精度达 98%，并用于优化双域衍射深度神经网络实现 20 倍以上闪烁抑制。
analysis.research_motivation: 自由空间光学系统设计需要高保真湍流模拟工具，但现有模拟器要么不可微分（无法支持梯度优化），要么在物理精度和计算效率之间难以平衡，限制了端到端系统优化。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个既高保真又完全可微分的湍流模拟器，以支持光学系统的梯度优化和算法开发。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出 TurPy 通过亚谐波相位屏生成、自回归时间演化和自动屏放置例程，平衡了傅里叶混叠约束和弱湍流近似。
analysis.method: TurPy 采用 GPU 加速、完全可微分的波光学湍流模拟框架，包含亚谐波相位屏生成、自回归时间演化、自动屏放置例程，并通过介质特定功率谱密度参数化扩展到大气、海洋和生物传播环境。
contributions: 提出 TurPy：首个 GPU 加速、完全可微分的波光学湍流模拟器，支持梯度优化。
在弱到强湍流下，二阶高斯光束展宽和四阶平面波闪烁与理论模型匹配精度达 98%。
通过优化双域衍射深度神经网络（D2NN），在模拟中实现 20 倍以上的闪烁抑制。
开源发布，支持合成数据生成、湍流感知算法开发和端到端光学系统设计。
analysis.experiments: 验证了 TurPy 在弱到强湍流下与理论模型的匹配精度（二阶高斯光束展宽和四阶平面波闪烁达 98%），并展示了在双域 D2NN 优化中实现 20 倍闪烁抑制。
limitations: 模拟精度依赖于介质折射率结构常数和功率谱密度的准确输入。
目前仅验证了大气湍流场景，海洋和生物环境的验证可能需额外工作。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（可微分湍流模拟器），实验验证充分，开源发布，但应用领域较专（光学湍流），与主流 ML 方向距离稍远。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TurPy 是一个基于物理、可微分的 GPU 加速光学湍流模拟器，支持端到端梯度优化，在弱到强湍流下与理论模型匹配精度达 98%，并用于优化双域衍射深度神经网络实现 20 倍以上闪烁抑制。

papers.title: $k$-server-bench: Automating Potential Discovery for the $k$-Server Conjecture
papers.abstract: We introduce a code-based challenge for automated, open-ended mathematical discovery based on the $k$-server conjecture, a central open problem in competitive analysis. The task is to discover a potential function satisfying a large graph-structured system of simple linear inequalities. The resulting evaluation procedure is sound but incomplete: any violated inequality definitively refutes a candidate, whereas satisfying all inequalities does not by itself constitute a proof of the corresponding conjecture's special case. Nevertheless, a candidate that passes all constraints would be strong evidence toward a valid proof and, to the best of our knowledge, no currently known potential achieves this under our formulation in the open $k=4$ circle case. As such, a successful candidate would already be an interesting contribution to the $k$-server conjecture, and could become a substantial theoretical result when paired with a full proof. Experiments on the resolved $k=3$ regime show that current agentic methods can solve nontrivial instances, and in the open $k=4$ regime they reduce the number of violations relative to existing potentials without fully resolving the task. Taken together, these results suggest that the task is challenging but plausibly within reach of current methods. Beyond its relevance to the $k$-server community, where the developed tooling enables researchers to test new hypotheses and potentially improve on the current record, the task also serves as a useful \emph{benchmark} for developing code-based discovery agents. In particular, our $k=3$ results show that it mitigates important limitations of existing open-ended code-based benchmarks, including early saturation and the weak separation between naive random baselines and more sophisticated methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基于代码的数学发现基准，用于自动化探索k-server猜想中的势函数。
analysis.research_motivation: k-server猜想是竞争分析中的核心开放问题，手动构造势函数极其困难，而现有自动化基准存在早期饱和与基线区分度弱的问题。
analysis.problem: 设计一个可自动评估的数学发现任务，通过线性不等式系统验证势函数候选，以推动k-server猜想的解决。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在已解决的k=3情形下，当前智能体方法能解决非平凡实例；在开放的k=4情形下，它们减少了违反次数但未完全解决。
analysis.method: 将势函数发现转化为图结构线性不等式系统的验证问题，提供代码化评估流程（sound但不complete）。
contributions: 提出了一个基于k-server猜想的自动化数学发现基准，具有明确的评估标准。
实验表明该基准能缓解现有代码发现基准的早期饱和与基线区分度弱的问题。
analysis.experiments: 在k=3（已解决）和k=4（开放）情形下测试了当前智能体方法，k=3可解决非平凡实例，k=4减少了违反次数。
limitations: 评估是sound但不complete的，通过所有约束并不构成严格证明。
当前方法在k=4开放情形下尚未完全解决任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准设计新颖，但主题与主流ML方向距离较远，适合对数学发现和自动化推理感兴趣的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基于代码的数学发现基准，用于自动化探索k-server猜想中的势函数。

papers.title: How Much Heavy Lifting Can an Agent Harness Do?: Measuring the LLM's Residual Role in a Planning Agent
papers.abstract: Agent harnesses -- the stateful programs that wrap a language model and decide what it sees at each step -- are now known to change end-to-end performance on a fixed model by as much as six times. That raises a question asked less often than it should be: how much of an agent's competence does the harness itself already carry, and how much genuinely still needs the LLM? We externalize a planning harness for noisy Collaborative Battleship into four progressively richer layers -- posterior belief tracking, declarative planning, symbolic reflec tion, and an LLM-backed revision gate -- under a common runtime, taking \emph{win rate} as the primary metric and \emph{F1} as secondary, and pre-specifying \emph{heavy lifting} as the single largest positive marginal to the primary metric. Across 54 games, declarative pla nning carries the heavy lifting ($+24.1$pp win rate over a belief-only harness, zero LLM calls); symbolic reflection is mechanistically real but calibration-sensitive, with signed board-level effects up to $\pm0.140$ F1 that cancel on aggregate; and LLM-backed revision ac tivates on only $4.3\%$ of turns with a bounded, non-monotonic effect. The contribution is methodological: once harness layers are made externally measurable, the LLM's role can be quantified as residual rather than assumed central.

analysis.tldr: 通过将规划智能体框架分层测量，发现声明式规划承担了主要性能提升，LLM的作用是残差性的而非核心。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能体框架（harness）对固定LLM的端到端性能影响可达6倍，但框架本身贡献了多少、LLM真正需要多少却很少被量化。
analysis.problem: 量化智能体框架中不同组件（尤其是LLM）对整体性能的边际贡献，区分框架与LLM各自的作用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 声明式规划层贡献了最大性能提升（+24.1pp胜率，零LLM调用）；符号反射层有机制性效果但校准敏感，聚合后抵消；LLM修订层仅在4.3%的回合激活且效果有界非单调。
analysis.method: 将规划框架外化为四个渐进层（后验信念追踪、声明式规划、符号反射、LLM修订门），在统一运行时下测量各层对胜率和F1的边际贡献。
contributions: 提出一种方法论，将智能体框架分层并量化各组件贡献，使LLM的作用可被测量为残差。
通过实验揭示声明式规划承担了主要性能提升，LLM的作用有限且非核心。
analysis.experiments: 在噪声协作战舰任务上进行54局游戏，以胜率为主要指标、F1为次要指标，测量各层边际贡献。
limitations: 实验仅基于单一任务（Collaborative Battleship），泛化性未知。
框架分层方式可能不适用于所有智能体设计。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，量化了LLM在智能体中的真实作用，但实验规模较小，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过将规划智能体框架分层测量，发现声明式规划承担了主要性能提升，LLM的作用是残差性的而非核心。

papers.title: PhyEdit: Towards Real-World Object Manipulation via Physically-Grounded Image Editing
papers.abstract: Achieving physically accurate object manipulation in image editing is essential for its potential applications in interactive world models. However, existing visual generative models often fail at precise spatial manipulation, resulting in incorrect scaling and positioning of objects. This limitation primarily stems from the lack of explicit mechanisms to incorporate 3D geometry and perspective projection. To achieve accurate manipulation, we develop PhyEdit, an image editing framework that leverages explicit geometric simulation as contextual 3D-aware visual guidance. By combining this plug-and-play 3D prior with joint 2D--3D supervision, our method effectively improves physical accuracy and manipulation consistency. To support this method and evaluate performance, we present a real-world dataset, RealManip-10K, for 3D-aware object manipulation featuring paired images and depth annotations. We also propose ManipEval, a benchmark with multi-dimensional metrics to evaluate 3D spatial control and geometric consistency. Extensive experiments show that our approach outperforms existing methods, including strong closed-source models, in both 3D geometric accuracy and manipulation consistency.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于显式几何模拟的物理感知图像编辑框架PhyEdit，结合3D先验与2D-3D联合监督，提升物体操控的物理准确性和一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉生成模型在图像编辑中缺乏显式3D几何与透视投影机制，导致物体缩放和定位不准确，限制了其在交互式世界模型中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何实现图像编辑中物理准确的物体操控，避免错误的缩放和定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有模型在精确空间操控上失败，主要原因是缺乏显式3D几何和透视投影的建模机制。
analysis.method: 开发PhyEdit框架，利用显式几何模拟作为上下文3D感知视觉引导，结合即插即用的3D先验与联合2D-3D监督。
contributions: 提出PhyEdit，一个基于显式几何模拟的物理感知图像编辑框架。
构建RealManip-10K数据集和ManipEval基准，用于3D感知物体操控的评估。
analysis.experiments: 在RealManip-10K数据集上进行了大量实验，结果显示方法在3D几何准确性和操控一致性上优于现有方法，包括强闭源模型。
limitations: 可能依赖深度标注数据，泛化性受限。
几何模拟的精度可能影响最终编辑效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合3D几何先验提升物理准确性，实验充分，与VLM/图像编辑方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于显式几何模拟的物理感知图像编辑框架PhyEdit，结合3D先验与2D-3D联合监督，提升物体操控的物理准确性和一致性。

papers.title: TraceSafe: A Systematic Assessment of LLM Guardrails on Multi-Step Tool-Calling Trajectories
papers.abstract: As large language models (LLMs) evolve from static chatbots into autonomous agents, the primary vulnerability surface shifts from final outputs to intermediate execution traces. While safety guardrails are well-benchmarked for natural language responses, their efficacy remains largely unexplored within multi-step tool-use trajectories. To address this gap, we introduce TraceSafe-Bench, the first comprehensive benchmark specifically designed to assess mid-trajectory safety. It encompasses 12 risk categories, ranging from security threats (e.g., prompt injection, privacy leaks) to operational failures (e.g., hallucinations, interface inconsistencies), featuring over 1,000 unique execution instances. Our evaluation of 13 LLM-as-a-guard models and 7 specialized guardrails yields three critical findings: 1) Structural Bottleneck: Guardrail efficacy is driven more by structural data competence (e.g., JSON parsing) than semantic safety alignment. Performance correlates strongly with structured-to-text benchmarks ($ρ=0.79$) but shows near-zero correlation with standard jailbreak robustness. 2) Architecture over Scale: Model architecture influences risk detection performance more significantly than model size, with general-purpose LLMs consistently outperforming specialized safety guardrails in trajectory analysis. 3) Temporal Stability: Accuracy remains resilient across extended trajectories. Increased execution steps allow models to pivot from static tool definitions to dynamic execution behaviors, actually improving risk detection performance in later stages. Our findings suggest that securing agentic workflows requires jointly optimizing for structural reasoning and safety alignment to effectively mitigate mid-trajectory risks.

analysis.tldr: 首个系统评估LLM护栏在多步工具调用轨迹中安全性的基准，揭示结构能力比语义对齐更关键。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM从静态聊天机器人演变为自主智能体，安全风险从最终输出转移到中间执行轨迹，但现有护栏主要针对自然语言响应，缺乏对多步工具调用轨迹安全性的评估。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM护栏在多步工具调用轨迹中的有效性，并识别影响性能的关键因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 护栏有效性更多依赖结构数据处理能力（如JSON解析）而非语义安全对齐；模型架构比规模更影响风险检测性能；准确率在长轨迹中保持稳定，后期甚至提升。
analysis.method: 构建TraceSafe-Bench基准，包含12个风险类别和1000+执行实例，评估13个LLM-as-a-guard模型和7个专用护栏。
contributions: 提出首个针对多步工具调用轨迹安全性的基准TraceSafe-Bench
揭示结构能力比语义对齐更关键、架构比规模更重要、时间稳定性等关键发现
analysis.experiments: 在TraceSafe-Bench上评估13个LLM-as-a-guard模型和7个专用护栏，报告了相关性分析和性能对比。
limitations: 基准规模有限（1000+实例），可能未覆盖所有风险场景
未探讨护栏在真实部署中的延迟和计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 聚焦LLM智能体安全这一前沿问题，提出首个轨迹安全基准，发现具有实践指导意义，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个系统评估LLM护栏在多步工具调用轨迹中安全性的基准，揭示结构能力比语义对齐更关键。

papers.title: VersaVogue: Visual Expert Orchestration and Preference Alignment for Unified Fashion Synthesis
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have driven remarkable advancements in fashion image generation, yet prior works usually treat garment generation and virtual dressing as separate problems, limiting their flexibility in real-world fashion workflows. Moreover, fashion image synthesis under multi-source heterogeneous conditions remains challenging, as existing methods typically rely on simple feature concatenation or static layer-wise injection, which often causes attribute entanglement and semantic interference. To address these issues, we propose VersaVogue, a unified framework for multi-condition controllable fashion synthesis that jointly supports garment generation and virtual dressing, corresponding to the design and showcase stages of the fashion lifecycle. Specifically, we introduce a trait-routing attention (TA) module that leverages a mixture-of-experts mechanism to dynamically route condition features to the most compatible experts and generative layers, enabling disentangled injection of visual attributes such as texture, shape, and color. To further improve realism and controllability, we develop an automated multi-perspective preference optimization (MPO) pipeline that constructs preference data without human annotation or task-specific reward models. By combining evaluators of content fidelity, textual alignment, and perceptual quality, MPO identifies reliable preference pairs, which are then used to optimize the model via direct preference optimization (DPO). Extensive experiments on both garment generation and virtual dressing benchmarks demonstrate that VersaVogue consistently outperforms existing methods in visual fidelity, semantic consistency, and fine-grained controllability.

analysis.tldr: VersaVogue 提出统一框架，通过专家混合注意力与自动偏好优化实现多条件可控时尚图像生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有时尚图像生成方法通常将服装生成和虚拟试穿视为独立任务，缺乏灵活性；且多源异构条件下的生成常因简单特征拼接或静态注入导致属性纠缠和语义干扰。
analysis.problem: 如何实现统一的多条件可控时尚图像生成，同时支持服装生成和虚拟试穿，并解决多条件注入时的属性解耦与语义干扰问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法在多源异构条件下存在属性纠缠和语义干扰，且偏好优化依赖人工标注或任务特定奖励模型。
analysis.method: 提出 VersaVogue 框架，包含特征路由注意力模块（TA）和自动多视角偏好优化（MPO）流水线。TA 利用混合专家机制动态路由条件特征到最兼容的专家和生成层；MPO 结合内容保真度、文本对齐和感知质量评估器自动构建偏好数据，并通过 DPO 优化模型。
contributions: 提出统一框架同时支持服装生成和虚拟试穿，覆盖时尚生命周期设计到展示阶段。
设计特征路由注意力模块实现多条件特征的解耦注入。
开发无需人工标注的自动多视角偏好优化流水线。
analysis.experiments: 在服装生成和虚拟试穿基准上，VersaVogue 在视觉保真度、语义一致性和细粒度可控性上持续优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定扩散模型架构，泛化性需验证。
偏好优化中评估器的设计可能影响最终效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高（专家路由+自动偏好优化），实验充分，与图像生成方向相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VersaVogue 提出统一框架，通过专家混合注意力与自动偏好优化实现多条件可控时尚图像生成。

papers.title: INSPATIO-WORLD: A Real-Time 4D World Simulator via Spatiotemporal Autoregressive Modeling
papers.abstract: Building world models with spatial consistency and real-time interactivity remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision. Current video generation paradigms often struggle with a lack of spatial persistence and insufficient visual realism, making it difficult to support seamless navigation in complex environments. To address these challenges, we propose INSPATIO-WORLD, a novel real-time framework capable of recovering and generating high-fidelity, dynamic interactive scenes from a single reference video. At the core of our approach is a Spatiotemporal Autoregressive (STAR) architecture, which enables consistent and controllable scene evolution through two tightly coupled components: Implicit Spatiotemporal Cache aggregates reference and historical observations into a latent world representation, ensuring global consistency during long-horizon navigation; Explicit Spatial Constraint Module enforces geometric structure and translates user interactions into precise and physically plausible camera trajectories. Furthermore, we introduce Joint Distribution Matching Distillation (JDMD). By using real-world data distributions as a regularizing guide, JDMD effectively overcomes the fidelity degradation typically caused by over-reliance on synthetic data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that INSPATIO-WORLD significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) models in spatial consistency and interaction precision, ranking first among real-time interactive methods on the WorldScore-Dynamic benchmark, and establishing a practical pipeline for navigating 4D environments reconstructed from monocular videos.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于时空自回归建模的实时4D世界模拟器，能从单参考视频生成高保真动态交互场景。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成范式缺乏空间一致性和视觉真实感，难以支持复杂环境中的无缝导航，亟需兼具空间一致性与实时交互性的世界模型。
analysis.problem: 如何从单参考视频实时恢复并生成具有空间一致性和物理合理性的高保真动态交互场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出时空自回归（STAR）架构，包含隐式时空缓存（维持全局一致性）和显式空间约束模块（保证几何结构并转换用户交互为相机轨迹）；并引入联合分布匹配蒸馏（JDMD）克服合成数据导致的保真度下降。
contributions: 提出INSPATIO-WORLD框架，实现从单参考视频实时生成高保真4D动态交互场景。
设计时空自回归（STAR）架构，通过隐式时空缓存和显式空间约束模块保证空间一致性与交互精度。
引入联合分布匹配蒸馏（JDMD）方法，利用真实数据分布缓解合成数据带来的保真度退化。
analysis.experiments: 在WorldScore-Dynamic基准上，INSPATIO-WORLD在空间一致性和交互精度上显著超越现有SOTA模型，在实时交互方法中排名第一。
limitations: 可能依赖单参考视频的质量和多样性。
实时性可能受限于复杂场景的计算资源需求。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验在标准基准上取得SOTA，与视频生成和世界模型方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于时空自回归建模的实时4D世界模拟器，能从单参考视频生成高保真动态交互场景。

papers.title: BRIDGE: Multimodal-to-Text Retrieval via Reinforcement-Learned Query Alignment
papers.abstract: Multimodal retrieval systems struggle to resolve image-text queries against text-only corpora: the best vision-language encoder achieves only 27.6 nDCG@10 on MM-BRIGHT, underperforming strong text-only retrievers. We argue the bottleneck is not the retriever but the query -- raw multimodal queries entangle visual descriptions, conversational noise, and retrieval intent in ways that systematically degrade embedding similarity. We present \textbf{BRIDGE}, a two-component system that resolves this mismatch without multimodal encoders. \textbf{FORGE} (\textbf{F}ocused Retrieval Query Generato\textbf{r}) is a query alignment model trained via reinforcement learning, which distills noisy multimodal queries into compact, retrieval-optimized search strings. \textbf{LENS} (\textbf{L}anguage-\textbf{E}nhanced \textbf{N}eural \textbf{S}earch) is a reasoning-enhanced dense retriever fine-tuned on reasoning-intensive retrieval data to handle the intent-rich queries FORGE produces. Evaluated on MM-BRIGHT (2,803 queries, 29 domains), BRIDGE achieves \textbf{29.7} nDCG@10, surpassing all multimodal encoder baselines including Nomic-Vision (27.6). When FORGE is applied as a plug-and-play aligner on top of Nomic-Vision, the combined system reaches \textbf{33.3} nDCG@10 -- exceeding the best text-only retriever (32.2) -- demonstrating that \textit{query alignment} is the key bottleneck in multimodal-to-text retrieval. https://github.com/mm-bright/multimodal-reasoning-retrieval

analysis.tldr: 提出BRIDGE系统，通过强化学习对齐多模态查询与文本检索，无需多模态编码器即可超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态检索系统在处理图像-文本查询与纯文本语料库时性能不佳，最佳视觉-语言编码器在MM-BRIGHT上仅达到27.6 nDCG@10，落后于强文本检索器，表明瓶颈在于查询而非检索器。
analysis.problem: 多模态查询中视觉描述、对话噪声和检索意图纠缠，导致嵌入相似度系统性下降，需要将多模态查询对齐为检索优化的文本字符串。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出原始多模态查询是性能瓶颈，通过实验证明查询对齐比多模态编码器更重要。
analysis.method: BRIDGE包含两个组件：FORGE（基于强化学习的查询对齐模型，将噪声多模态查询蒸馏为紧凑检索字符串）和LENS（推理增强的密集检索器，微调于推理密集型数据）。
contributions: 提出BRIDGE系统，通过强化学习对齐多模态查询，无需多模态编码器即可提升检索性能。
在MM-BRIGHT基准上达到29.7 nDCG@10，超越所有多模态编码器基线；与Nomic-Vision结合达到33.3，超过最佳文本检索器。
analysis.experiments: 在MM-BRIGHT（2803个查询，29个领域）上评估，报告了nDCG@10指标。
limitations: 可能依赖特定检索器架构（LENS），泛化性需验证。
强化学习训练可能对超参数敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，但属于特定任务改进，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BRIDGE系统，通过强化学习对齐多模态查询与文本检索，无需多模态编码器即可超越现有方法。

papers.title: Mixture Proportion Estimation and Weakly-supervised Kernel Test for Conditional Independence
papers.abstract: Mixture proportion estimation (MPE) aims to estimate class priors from unlabeled data. This task is a critical component in weakly supervised learning, such as PU learning, learning with label noise, and domain adaptation. Existing MPE methods rely on the \textit{irreducibility} assumption or its variant for identifiability. In this paper, we propose novel assumptions based on conditional independence (CI) given the class label, which ensure identifiability even when irreducibility does not hold. We develop method of moments estimators under these assumptions and analyze their asymptotic properties. Furthermore, we present weakly-supervised kernel tests to validate the CI assumptions, which are of independent interest in applications such as causal discovery and fairness evaluation. Empirically, we demonstrate the improved performance of our estimators compared with existing methods and that our tests successfully control both type I and type II errors.\label{key}

analysis.tldr: 提出基于条件独立性的混合比例估计新假设与弱监督核检验方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有混合比例估计方法依赖不可约性假设，在不可约性不成立时无法识别，限制了应用范围。

analysis.method: 提出基于条件独立性的新假设，并开发矩估计方法；同时提出弱监督核检验来验证条件独立性假设。
contributions: 提出基于条件独立性的混合比例估计新假设，确保在不可约性不成立时的可识别性。
开发矩估计方法并分析渐近性质，同时提出弱监督核检验用于验证假设。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明所提估计器优于现有方法，且检验能有效控制第一类和第二类错误。
limitations: 假设条件独立性可能在实际中难以完全满足。
矩估计方法可能对高维数据计算效率较低。

analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论分析扎实，实验验证有效，但应用范围较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于条件独立性的混合比例估计新假设与弱监督核检验方法。

papers.title: The ATOM Report: Measuring the Open Language Model Ecosystem
papers.abstract: We present a comprehensive adoption snapshot of the leading open language models and who is building them, focusing on the ~1.5K mainline open models from the likes of Alibaba's Qwen, DeepSeek, Meta's Llama, that are the foundation of an ecosystem crucial to researchers, entrepreneurs, and policy advisors. We document a clear trend where Chinese models overtook their counterparts built in the U.S. in the summer of 2025 and subsequently widened the gap over their western counterparts. We study a mix of Hugging Face downloads and model derivatives, inference market share, performance metrics and more to make a comprehensive picture of the ecosystem.

analysis.tldr: 对开源语言模型生态系统的全面测量，发现中国模型在2025年夏季超越美国模型并持续扩大差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 开源语言模型对研究者、创业者和政策制定者至关重要，但缺乏对其生态系统的系统性测量和趋势分析。
analysis.problem: 如何全面测量开源语言模型生态系统的采用情况，并揭示不同地区模型的发展趋势。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到中国模型在2025年夏季超越美国模型，并随后扩大差距。
analysis.method: 综合使用Hugging Face下载量、模型衍生品、推理市场份额和性能指标等多种数据源进行生态分析。
contributions: 提供了开源语言模型生态系统的全面采用快照。
揭示了中美模型在生态系统中的动态变化趋势。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未涵盖所有开源模型，如非主流平台上的模型。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对开源语言模型生态系统的全面测量，发现中国模型在2025年夏季超越美国模型并持续扩大差距。

papers.title: TeaLeafVision: An Explainable and Robust Deep Learning Framework for Tea Leaf Disease Classification
papers.abstract: As the worlds second most consumed beverage after water, tea is not just a cultural staple but a global economic force of profound scale and influence. More than a mere drink, it represents a quiet negotiation between nature, culture, and the human desire for a moment of reflection. So, the precise identification and detection of tea leaf disease is crucial. With this goal, we have evaluated several Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) models, among them three shows noticeable performance including DenseNet201, MobileNetV2, InceptionV3 on the teaLeafBD dataset. teaLeafBD dataset contains seven classes, six disease classes and one healthy class, collected under various field conditions reflecting real world challenges. Among the CNN models, DenseNet201 has achieved the highest test accuracy of 99%. In order to enhance the model reliability and interpretability, we have implemented Gradient weighted Class Activation Mapping (Grad CAM), occlusion sensitivity analysis and adversarial training techniques to increase the noise resistance of the model. Finally, we have developed a prototype in order to leverage the models capabilities on real life agriculture. This paper illustrates the deep learning models capabilities to classify the disease in real life tea leaf disease detection and management.

analysis.tldr: 提出TeaLeafVision框架，使用DenseNet201在茶树叶病数据集上达到99%准确率，并结合Grad-CAM、遮挡敏感性和对抗训练增强可解释性与鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 茶叶是全球重要经济作物，精确识别茶树叶病对保障产量和质量至关重要，但现有方法在真实田间条件下的鲁棒性和可解释性不足。
analysis.problem: 解决茶树叶病分类中模型准确率、可解释性和噪声鲁棒性不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 评估多种CNN模型（DenseNet201、MobileNetV2、InceptionV3），选择最优模型DenseNet201，并集成Grad-CAM、遮挡敏感性分析和对抗训练以提升可解释性和抗噪能力。
contributions: 在teaLeafBD数据集上系统评估多种CNN模型，DenseNet201达到99%测试准确率
引入Grad-CAM、遮挡敏感性和对抗训练增强模型可解释性与鲁棒性
开发原型系统用于实际农业场景
analysis.experiments: 在teaLeafBD数据集（7类，含6种病害和1类健康）上评估，DenseNet201达到99%测试准确率。摘要未提供更多实验细节。

papers.title: Energy-based Tissue Manifolds for Longitudinal Multiparametric MRI Analysis
papers.abstract: We propose a geometric framework for longitudinal multi-parametric MRI analysis based on patient-specific energy modelling in sequence space. Rather than operating on images with spatial networks, each voxel is represented by its multi-sequence intensity vector ($T1$, $T1c$, $T2$, FLAIR, ADC), and a compact implicit neural representation is trained via denoising score matching to learn an energy function $E_θ(\mathbf{u})$ over $\mathbb{R}^d$ from a single baseline scan. The learned energy landscape provides a differential-geometric description of tissue regimes without segmentation labels. Local minima define tissue basins, gradient magnitude reflects proximity to regime boundaries, and Laplacian curvature characterises local constraint structure. Importantly, this baseline energy manifold is treated as a fixed geometric reference: it encodes the set of contrast combinations observed at diagnosis and is not retrained at follow-up. Longitudinal assessment is therefore formulated as evaluation of subsequent scans relative to this baseline geometry. Rather than comparing anatomical segmentations, we analyse how the distribution of MRI sequence vectors evolves under the baseline energy function. In a paediatric case with later recurrence, follow-up scans show progressive deviation in energy and directional displacement in sequence space toward the baseline tumour-associated regime before clear radiological reappearance. In a case with stable disease, voxel distributions remain confined to established low-energy basins without systematic drift. The presented cases serve as proof-of-concept that patient-specific energy manifolds can function as geometric reference systems for longitudinal mpMRI analysis without explicit segmentation or supervised classification, providing a foundation for further investigation of manifold-based tissue-at-risk tracking in neuro-oncology.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于能量流形的纵向多参数MRI分析框架，无需分割标签即可追踪组织变化。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统纵向MRI分析依赖空间网络或分割标签，难以捕捉细微组织变化且需要大量标注。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖分割标签和监督分类的情况下，对纵向多参数MRI进行定量分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将每个体素表示为多序列强度向量，通过去噪分数匹配训练隐式神经表示学习能量函数，构建患者特定的能量流形作为几何参考，后续扫描通过评估相对于该流形的能量和方向位移进行分析。
contributions: 提出基于能量流形的无分割纵向mpMRI分析框架
通过病例验证了该方法在肿瘤复发检测中的可行性
