papers.title: Enhanced Self-Supervised Multi-Image Super-Resolution for Camera Array Images
papers.abstract: Conventional multi-image super-resolution (MISR) methods, such as burst and video SR, rely on sequential frames from a single camera. Consequently, they suffer from complex image degradation and severe occlusion, increasing the difficulty of accurate image restoration. In contrast, multi-aperture camera-array imaging captures spatially distributed views with sampling offsets forming a stable disk-like distribution, which enhances the non-redundancy of observed data. Existing MISR algorithms fail to fully exploit these unique properties. Supervised MISR methods tend to overfit the degradation patterns in training data, and current self-supervised learning (SSL) techniques struggle to recover fine-grained details. To address these issues, this paper thoroughly investigates the strengths, limitations and applicability boundaries of multi-image-to-single-image (Multi-to-Single) and multi-image-to-multi-image (Multi-to-Multi) SSL methods. We propose the Multi-to-Single-Guided Multi-to-Multi SSL framework that combines the advantages of Multi-to-Single and Multi-to-Multi to generate visually appealing and high-fidelity images rich in texture details. The Multi-to-Single-Guided Multi-to-Multi SSL framework provides a new paradigm for integrating deep neural network with classical physics-based variational methods. To enhance the ability of MISR network to recover high-frequency details from aliased artifacts, this paper proposes a novel camera-array SR network called dual Transformer suitable for SSL. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method.

analysis.tldr: 提出多图引导多图自监督框架与双Transformer网络，用于相机阵列图像超分辨率。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统多图超分辨率依赖单相机连续帧，存在复杂退化与严重遮挡问题；现有方法未能充分利用相机阵列成像的稳定盘状分布特性，监督方法易过拟合，自监督方法难以恢复细节。
analysis.problem: 如何设计自监督多图超分辨率方法，充分利用相机阵列图像的非冗余特性，恢复高保真纹理细节。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 相机阵列图像具有稳定盘状分布采样偏移，增强数据非冗余性；现有监督方法过拟合退化模式，自监督方法难以恢复细粒度细节。
analysis.method: 提出Multi-to-Single-Guided Multi-to-Multi SSL框架，结合多图到单图与多图到多图自监督方法的优势，并设计适用于自监督的双Transformer网络。
contributions: 提出Multi-to-Single-Guided Multi-to-Multi SSL框架，融合两种自监督范式并集成深度神经网络与经典变分方法。
设计双Transformer网络，增强从混叠伪影中恢复高频细节的能力。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据集上验证了方法的优越性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定的相机阵列配置。
双Transformer网络计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，结合自监督与双Transformer，但实验细节有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多图引导多图自监督框架与双Transformer网络，用于相机阵列图像超分辨率。

papers.title: OmniTabBench: Mapping the Empirical Frontiers of GBDTs, Neural Networks, and Foundation Models for Tabular Data at Scale
papers.abstract: While traditional tree-based ensemble methods have long dominated tabular tasks, deep neural networks and emerging foundation models have challenged this primacy, yet no consensus exists on a universally superior paradigm. Existing benchmarks typically contain fewer than 100 datasets, raising concerns about evaluation sufficiency and potential selection biases. To address these limitations, we introduce OmniTabBench, the largest tabular benchmark to date, comprising 3030 datasets spanning diverse tasks that are comprehensively collected from diverse sources and categorized by industry using large language models. We conduct an unprecedented large-scale empirical evaluation of state-of-the-art models from all model families on OmniTabBench, confirming the absence of a dominant winner. Furthermore, through a decoupled metafeature analysis, which examines individual properties such as dataset size, feature types, feature and target skewness/kurtosis, we elucidate conditions favoring specific model categories, providing clearer, more actionable guidance than prior compound-metric studies.

analysis.tldr: 构建最大表格数据基准OmniTabBench（3030数据集），大规模实证发现GBDT、神经网络和基础模型无绝对优劣，并通过解耦元特征分析提供模型选择指导。
analysis.research_motivation: 表格数据任务中，传统树集成方法与深度神经网络、基础模型孰优孰劣尚无共识，现有基准数据集少（<100），存在评估不足和选择偏差。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、多样化的表格数据基准来公平比较不同模型家族，并揭示各自优势条件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 大规模实验确认不存在普遍最优的模型类别；不同模型在特定数据特征（如规模、特征类型、偏度/峰度）下表现各异。
analysis.method: 构建包含3030个数据集的OmniTabBench基准，对GBDT、神经网络和基础模型进行大规模实证评估，并通过解耦元特征分析（单独考察数据集大小、特征类型、偏度/峰度等属性）揭示模型偏好条件。
contributions: 构建了迄今最大的表格数据基准OmniTabBench（3030数据集），覆盖多样任务并利用LLM按行业分类。
通过大规模实证确认无模型家族绝对占优，并通过解耦元特征分析提供更清晰、可操作的模型选择指导。
analysis.experiments: 在3030个数据集上对多个SOTA模型（来自GBDT、神经网络、基础模型家族）进行大规模实证评估，并进行了解耦元特征分析。
limitations: 基准数据集虽大，但可能仍存在未覆盖的领域或任务类型。
解耦元特征分析仅考察单个属性，未考虑属性间交互作用。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 大规模基准构建和系统实证有较高价值，但方法本身为基准和元分析，创新性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建最大表格数据基准OmniTabBench（3030数据集），大规模实证发现GBDT、神经网络和基础模型无绝对优劣，并通过解耦元特征分析提供模型选择指导。

papers.title: SkillTrojan: Backdoor Attacks on Skill-Based Agent Systems
papers.abstract: Skill-based agent systems tackle complex tasks by composing reusable skills, improving modularity and scalability while introducing a largely unexamined security attack surface. We propose SkillTrojan, a backdoor attack that targets skill implementations rather than model parameters or training data. SkillTrojan embeds malicious logic inside otherwise plausible skills and leverages standard skill composition to reconstruct and execute an attacker-specified payload. The attack partitions an encrypted payload across multiple benign-looking skill invocations and activates only under a predefined trigger. SkillTrojan also supports automated synthesis of backdoored skills from arbitrary skill templates, enabling scalable propagation across skill-based agent ecosystems. To enable systematic evaluation, we release a dataset of 3,000+ curated backdoored skills spanning diverse skill patterns and trigger-payload configurations. We instantiate SkillTrojan in a representative code-based agent setting and evaluate both clean-task utility and attack success rate. Our results show that skill-level backdoors can be highly effective with minimal degradation of benign behavior, exposing a critical blind spot in current skill-based agent architectures and motivating defenses that explicitly reason about skill composition and execution. Concretely, on EHR SQL, SkillTrojan attains up to 97.2% ASR while maintaining 89.3% clean ACC on GPT-5.2-1211-Global.

analysis.tldr: 提出SkillTrojan，一种针对基于技能智能体系统的后门攻击方法，通过恶意技能实现高成功率攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于技能的智能体系统通过组合可复用技能提升模块化和可扩展性，但引入了未充分检查的安全攻击面。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改模型参数或训练数据的情况下，通过恶意技能实现后门攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 技能级后门可以非常有效，且对良性行为影响极小，暴露了当前技能架构的盲点。
analysis.method: 将加密载荷分割到多个良性外观的技能调用中，仅在预定义触发器下激活；支持从任意技能模板自动合成后门技能。
contributions: 提出SkillTrojan，一种针对技能实现而非模型参数的后门攻击方法。
发布包含3000+精心策划的后门技能数据集，支持系统评估。
analysis.experiments: 在代码型智能体设置中评估，EHR SQL任务上攻击成功率高达97.2%，同时保持89.3%的干净准确率。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的技能系统。
未讨论防御机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，针对技能系统安全盲点，实验有效，但技术细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SkillTrojan，一种针对基于技能智能体系统的后门攻击方法，通过恶意技能实现高成功率攻击。

papers.title: Riemann-Bench: A Benchmark for Moonshot Mathematics
papers.abstract: Recent AI systems have achieved gold-medal-level performance on the International Mathematical Olympiad, demonstrating remarkable proficiency at competition-style problem solving. However, competition mathematics represents only a narrow slice of mathematical reasoning: problems are drawn from limited domains, require minimal advanced machinery, and can often reward insightful tricks over deep theoretical knowledge. We introduce \bench{}, a private benchmark of 25 expert-curated problems designed to evaluate AI systems on research-level mathematics that goes far beyond the olympiad frontier. Problems are authored by Ivy League mathematics professors, graduate students, and PhD-holding IMO medalists, and routinely took their authors weeks to solve independently. Each problem undergoes double-blind verification by two independent domain experts who must solve the problem from scratch, and yields a unique, closed-form solution assessed by programmatic verifiers. We evaluate frontier models as unconstrained research agents, with full access to coding tools, search, and open-ended reasoning, using an unbiased statistical estimator computed over 100 independent runs per problem. Our results reveal that all frontier models currently score below 10\%, exposing a substantial gap between olympiad-level problem solving and genuine research-level mathematical reasoning. By keeping the benchmark fully private, we ensure that measured performance reflects authentic mathematical capability rather than memorization of training data.

analysis.tldr: Riemann-Bench 是一个由专家设计的 25 道研究级数学难题基准，用于评估 AI 系统超越奥数水平的数学推理能力，结果显示前沿模型得分均低于 10%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 AI 在奥数竞赛中表现出色，但竞赛数学仅涵盖有限领域，缺乏深度理论要求，无法衡量研究级数学推理能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估 AI 系统在真正研究级数学推理上能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前沿模型在奥数级别表现优异，但在研究级数学难题上得分低于 10%，表明存在显著差距。
analysis.method: 构建包含 25 道专家设计难题的私有基准，每道题经双盲验证，使用程序化验证器评估唯一闭式解，并通过 100 次独立运行的无偏统计估计器评估模型。
contributions: 提出了 Riemann-Bench，一个评估研究级数学推理的私有基准。
揭示了前沿模型在奥数级与研究级数学推理之间的巨大差距。
analysis.experiments: 在 25 道难题上对前沿模型进行 100 次独立运行评估，所有模型得分低于 10%。
limitations: 基准规模较小（25 道题），可能不足以全面覆盖研究级数学。
私有性限制了外部验证和复现。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准设计严谨，问题难度高，揭示了重要差距，但规模较小且私有。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Riemann-Bench 是一个由专家设计的 25 道研究级数学难题基准，用于评估 AI 系统超越奥数水平的数学推理能力，结果显示前沿模型得分均低于 10%。

papers.title: MoBiE: Efficient Inference of Mixture of Binary Experts under Post-Training Quantization
papers.abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) based large language models (LLMs) offer strong performance but suffer from high memory and computation costs. Weight binarization provides extreme efficiency, yet existing binary methods designed for dense LLMs struggle with MoE-specific issues, including cross-expert redundancy, task-agnostic importance estimation, and quantization-induced routing shifts. To this end, we propose MoBiE, the first binarization framework tailored for MoE-based LLMs. MoBiE is built on three core innovations: 1. using joint SVD decomposition to reduce cross-expert redundancy; 2. integrating global loss gradients into local Hessian metrics to enhance weight importance estimation; 3. introducing an error constraint guided by the input null space to mitigate routing distortion. Notably, MoBiE achieves these optimizations while incurring no additional storage overhead, striking a balance between efficiency and model performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MoBiE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art binary methods across multiple MoE-based LLMs and benchmarks. For example, on Qwen3-30B-A3B, MoBiE reduces perplexity by 52.2$\%$, improves average zero-shot performance by 43.4$\%$, achieves over 2 $\times$ inference speedup, and further shortens quantization time. The code is available at https://github.com/Kishon-zzx/MoBiE.

analysis.tldr: MoBiE 是首个针对 MoE 大语言模型的二值化框架，通过联合 SVD 分解、全局梯度增强的 Hessian 估计和输入零空间误差约束，在无额外存储开销下显著提升量化后模型性能与推理速度。
analysis.research_motivation: MoE 大语言模型性能强但内存和计算成本高，权重二值化可提供极致效率，但现有二值化方法专为稠密模型设计，无法处理 MoE 特有的跨专家冗余、任务无关重要性估计和量化导致的路由偏移问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个针对 MoE 大语言模型的高效二值化框架，解决跨专家冗余、重要性估计不准确和路由偏移问题，同时不增加存储开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有二值化方法在 MoE 模型上表现不佳，原因包括：跨专家冗余导致信息重复；任务无关的重要性估计无法捕捉全局损失影响；量化后路由机制发生偏移，影响模型输出。
analysis.method: 提出 MoBiE 框架，包含三个核心创新：1) 联合 SVD 分解减少跨专家冗余；2) 将全局损失梯度融入局部 Hessian 度量以增强权重重要性估计；3) 引入基于输入零空间的误差约束来缓解路由失真。所有优化均不引入额外存储开销。
contributions: 首个针对 MoE 大语言模型的二值化框架 MoBiE，有效解决跨专家冗余、重要性估计和路由偏移问题。
提出联合 SVD 分解、全局梯度增强的 Hessian 估计和输入零空间误差约束三项创新，在无额外存储开销下提升性能。
在多个 MoE 模型和基准上显著优于现有二值化方法，例如 Qwen3-30B-A3B 上困惑度降低 52.2%，零样本性能提升 43.4%，推理速度提升 2 倍以上。
analysis.experiments: 在多个 MoE 大语言模型（如 Qwen3-30B-A3B）和基准上进行了实验，与最先进二值化方法对比，报告了困惑度、零样本性能、推理加速和量化时间等指标。
limitations: 可能仅适用于 MoE 架构，对非 MoE 模型效果未知。
二值化本身可能带来精度损失，尽管文中通过优化缓解，但极端压缩下仍有上限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 针对 MoE 模型二值化问题提出系统解决方案，创新性高，实验充分且效果显著，与 LLM 压缩方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MoBiE 是首个针对 MoE 大语言模型的二值化框架，通过联合 SVD 分解、全局梯度增强的 Hessian 估计和输入零空间误差约束，在无额外存储开销下显著提升量化后模型性能与推理速度。

papers.title: Instance-Adaptive Parametrization for Amortized Variational Inference
papers.abstract: Variational autoencoders (VAEs) rely on amortized variational inference to enable efficient posterior approximation, but this efficiency comes at the cost of a shared parametrization, giving rise to the amortization gap. We propose the instance-adaptive variational autoencoder (IA-VAE), an amortized inference framework in which a hypernetwork generates input-dependent modulations of a shared encoder. This enables input-specific adaptation of the inference model while preserving the efficiency of a single forward pass. From a theoretical perspective, we show that the variational family induced by IA-VAE contains that of standard amortized inference, implying that IA-VAE cannot yield a worse optimal ELBO. By leveraging instance-specific parameter modulations, the proposed approach can achieve performance comparable to standard encoders with substantially fewer parameters, indicating a more efficient use of model capacity. Experiments on synthetic data, where the true posterior is known, show that IA-VAE yields more accurate posterior approximations and reduces the amortization gap. Similarly, on standard image benchmarks, IA-VAE consistently improves held-out ELBO over baseline VAEs, with statistically significant gains across multiple runs. These results suggest that increasing the flexibility of the inference parametrization through instance-adaptive modulation is an effective strategy for mitigating amortization-induced suboptimality in deep generative models.

analysis.tldr: 通过超网络生成实例自适应的编码器调制，缩小变分自编码器的摊销差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准VAE使用共享参数进行摊销推断，虽然高效但导致摊销差距，即近似后验不如实例最优后验准确。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲单次前向传播效率的前提下，减少摊销推断带来的近似后验次优性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摊销差距源于共享参数无法适应每个实例的特定后验分布，导致模型容量利用效率低。
analysis.method: 提出IA-VAE，使用超网络为共享编码器生成输入依赖的调制参数，实现实例自适应的推断模型。
contributions: 提出实例自适应变分自编码器（IA-VAE），通过超网络调制编码器参数，缩小摊销差距。
理论证明IA-VAE的变分族包含标准摊销推断的变分族，因此最优ELBO不会更差。
实验表明IA-VAE在合成数据和图像基准上均能提高后验近似精度和ELBO，且参数效率更高。
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据（已知真实后验）上验证了更准确的后验近似和更小的摊销差距；在标准图像基准上，IA-VAE在多次运行中一致提升了留出ELBO，且统计显著。
limitations: 超网络增加了模型复杂度和训练开销。
可能对超网络的设计和训练稳定性敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: probabilistic methods (Bayesian methods, variational inference, sampling, UQ, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且理论扎实，实验充分，但属于概率方法领域，与核心方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过超网络生成实例自适应的编码器调制，缩小变分自编码器的摊销差距。

papers.title: FedDAP: Domain-Aware Prototype Learning for Federated Learning under Domain Shift
papers.abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables decentralized model training across multiple clients without exposing private data, making it ideal for privacy-sensitive applications. However, in real-world FL scenarios, clients often hold data from distinct domains, leading to severe domain shift and degraded global model performance. To address this, prototype learning has been emerged as a promising solution, which leverages class-wise feature representations. Yet, existing methods face two key limitations: (1) Existing prototype-based FL methods typically construct a $\textit{single global prototype}$ per class by aggregating local prototypes from all clients without preserving domain information. (2) Current feature-prototype alignment is $\textit{domain-agnostic}$, forcing clients to align with global prototypes regardless of domain origin. To address these challenges, we propose Federated Domain-Aware Prototypes (FedDAP) to construct domain-specific global prototypes by aggregating local client prototypes within the same domain using a similarity-weighted fusion mechanism. These global domain-specific prototypes are then used to guide local training by aligning local features with prototypes from the same domain, while encouraging separation from prototypes of different domains. This dual alignment enhances domain-specific learning at the local level and enables the global model to generalize across diverse domains. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments on three different datasets: DomainNet, Office-10, and PACS to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework to address the domain shift challenges. The code is available at https://github.com/quanghuy6997/FedDAP.

analysis.tldr: 提出FedDAP，通过域感知原型学习缓解联邦学习中的域偏移问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习中客户端数据来自不同域，导致域偏移和全局模型性能下降，现有原型方法忽略域信息且对齐方式与域无关。
analysis.problem: 联邦学习中客户端数据存在域偏移，现有原型方法无法有效处理域特异性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有原型方法构建单一全局原型且域无关对齐，限制了域特定学习。
analysis.method: 构建域特定全局原型（通过相似度加权融合同域客户端原型），并采用双对齐：局部特征与同域原型对齐，与异域原型分离。
contributions: 提出域感知原型构建方法，保留域信息。
设计域感知特征-原型对齐策略，增强域特定学习与全局泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在DomainNet、Office-10和PACS三个数据集上验证有效性，代码已开源。
limitations: 依赖域标签或域识别机制。
可能增加通信和计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但实验规模一般，与隐私方向相关但非核心。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FedDAP，通过域感知原型学习缓解联邦学习中的域偏移问题。

papers.title: A Physical Agentic Loop for Language-Guided Grasping with Execution-State Monitoring
papers.abstract: Robotic manipulation systems that follow language instructions often execute grasp primitives in a largely single-shot manner: a model proposes an action, the robot executes it, and failures such as empty grasps, slips, stalls, timeouts, or semantically wrong grasps are not surfaced to the decision layer in a structured way. Inspired by agentic loops in digital tool-using agents, we reformulate language-guided grasping as a bounded embodied agent operating over grounded execution states, where physical actions expose an explicit tool-state stream. We introduce a physical agentic loop that wraps an unmodified learned manipulation primitive (grasp-and-lift) with (i) an event-based interface and (ii) an execution monitoring layer, Watchdog, which converts noisy gripper telemetry into discrete outcome labels using contact-aware fusion and temporal stabilization. These outcome events, optionally combined with post-grasp semantic verification, are consumed by a deterministic bounded policy that finalizes, retries, or escalates to the user for clarification, guaranteeing finite termination. We validate the resulting loop on a mobile manipulator with an eye-in-hand D405 camera, keeping the underlying grasp model unchanged and evaluating representative scenarios involving visual ambiguity, distractors, and induced execution failures. Results show that explicit execution-state monitoring and bounded recovery enable more robust and interpretable behavior than open-loop execution, while adding minimal architectural overhead. For the source code and demo refer to our project page: https://wenzewwz123.github.io/Agentic-Loop/

analysis.tldr: 提出一种物理智能体循环，通过执行状态监控使语言引导的抓取更鲁棒和可解释。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语言引导的机器人抓取系统多为单次执行，无法结构化地检测和处理空抓、滑落、超时等失败，导致鲁棒性差。
analysis.problem: 如何让语言引导的抓取系统在物理执行中感知失败状态并自主恢复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建物理智能体循环：在未修改的抓取原语外包裹事件接口和执行监控层Watchdog，利用接触感知融合和时间稳定化将噪声夹持器遥测转换为离散结果标签，结合确定性有界策略决定完成、重试或向用户澄清。
contributions: 提出物理智能体循环框架，将数字智能体循环思想引入物理抓取任务。
设计Watchdog执行监控层，从噪声遥测中提取离散执行状态。
在移动机械臂上验证，显示显式状态监控和有界恢复比开环执行更鲁棒和可解释。
analysis.experiments: 在配备眼在手D405相机的移动机械臂上，保持底层抓取模型不变，评估视觉模糊、干扰物和诱导执行失败场景。
limitations: 仅针对抓取-抬起原语，未推广到其他操作原语。
确定性策略可能无法处理所有意外情况。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，将agentic loop引入物理抓取，实验验证有效，但仅针对单一原语。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种物理智能体循环，通过执行状态监控使语言引导的抓取更鲁棒和可解释。

papers.title: Evaluating Repository-level Software Documentation via Question Answering and Feature-Driven Development
papers.abstract: Software documentation is crucial for repository comprehension. While Large Language Models (LLMs) advance documentation generation from code snippets to entire repositories, existing benchmarks have two key limitations: (1) they lack a holistic, repository-level assessment, and (2) they rely on unreliable evaluation strategies, such as LLM-as-a-judge, which suffers from vague criteria and limited repository-level knowledge. To address these issues, we introduce SWD-Bench, a novel benchmark for evaluating repository-level software documentation. Inspired by documentation-driven development, our strategy evaluates documentation quality by assessing an LLM's ability to understand and implement functionalities using the documentation, rather than by directly scoring it. This is measured through function-driven Question Answering (QA) tasks. SWD-Bench comprises three interconnected QA tasks: (1) Functionality Detection, to determine if a functionality is described; (2) Functionality Localization, to evaluate the accuracy of locating related files; and (3) Functionality Completion, to measure the comprehensiveness of implementation details. We construct the benchmark, containing 4,170 entries, by mining high-quality Pull Requests and enriching them with repository-level context. Experiments reveal limitations in current documentation generation methods and show that source code provides complementary value. Notably, documentation from the best-performing method improves the issue-solving rate of SWE-Agent by 20.00%, which demonstrates the practical value of high-quality documentation in supporting documentation-driven development.

analysis.tldr: 提出 SWD-Bench 基准，通过问答任务评估仓库级软件文档质量，发现现有方法局限并验证高质量文档对开发的实际价值。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文档生成评估缺乏仓库级整体评估，且依赖 LLM-as-a-judge 等不可靠策略，标准模糊且缺乏仓库级知识。
analysis.problem: 如何可靠地评估仓库级软件文档的质量，避免直接评分的主观性和局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 受文档驱动开发启发，通过函数驱动的问答任务评估文档质量，包括功能检测、功能定位和功能完成三个任务，并利用高质量 Pull Request 构建包含 4170 条条目的基准。
contributions: 提出 SWD-Bench，首个仓库级软件文档评估基准，包含三个互相关联的问答任务。
通过实验揭示当前文档生成方法的局限性，并证明源代码的互补价值。
analysis.experiments: 在 SWD-Bench 上评估多种文档生成方法，最佳方法使 SWE-Agent 的问题解决率提升 20.00%。
limitations: 基准可能受 Pull Request 质量影响，存在偏差。
问答任务设计可能无法覆盖所有文档质量维度。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 提出新颖的仓库级文档评估基准，实验显示实际应用价值，但技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 SWD-Bench 基准，通过问答任务评估仓库级软件文档质量，发现现有方法局限并验证高质量文档对开发的实际价值。

papers.title: Video-guided Machine Translation with Global Video Context
papers.abstract: Video-guided Multimodal Translation (VMT) has advanced significantly in recent years. However, most existing methods rely on locally aligned video segments paired one-to-one with subtitles, limiting their ability to capture global narrative context across multiple segments in long videos. To overcome this limitation, we propose a globally video-guided multimodal translation framework that leverages a pretrained semantic encoder and vector database-based subtitle retrieval to construct a context set of video segments closely related to the target subtitle semantics. An attention mechanism is employed to focus on highly relevant visual content, while preserving the remaining video features to retain broader contextual information. Furthermore, we design a region-aware cross-modal attention mechanism to enhance semantic alignment during translation. Experiments on a large-scale documentary translation dataset demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms baseline models, highlighting its effectiveness in long-video scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出全局视频上下文引导的多模态翻译框架，通过检索相关视频片段和区域感知跨模态注意力提升长视频翻译效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频引导多模态翻译方法依赖局部对齐的视频片段，无法捕捉长视频中的全局叙事上下文，限制了翻译质量。
analysis.problem: 如何利用全局视频上下文信息提升长视频场景下的多模态翻译性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出全局视频引导的多模态翻译框架，使用预训练语义编码器和向量数据库检索与目标字幕语义相关的视频片段，通过注意力机制聚焦高相关视觉内容并保留其余特征，同时设计区域感知跨模态注意力增强语义对齐。
contributions: 提出全局视频上下文引导的多模态翻译框架，解决长视频中局部对齐的局限性。
设计区域感知跨模态注意力机制，提升视觉与文本的语义对齐。
analysis.experiments: 在大规模纪录片翻译数据集上实验，方法显著优于基线模型。
limitations: 依赖预训练语义编码器和向量数据库，可能引入额外计算开销。
仅在纪录片数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步探索。

papers.title: Insights from Visual Cognition: Understanding Human Action Dynamics with Overall Glance and Refined Gaze Transformer
papers.abstract: Recently, Transformer has made significant progress in various vision tasks. To balance computation and efficiency in video tasks, recent works heavily rely on factorized or window-based self-attention. However, these approaches split spatiotemporal correlations between regions of interest in videos, limiting the models' ability to capture motion and long-range dependencies. In this paper, we argue that, similar to the human visual system, the importance of temporal and spatial information varies across different time scales, and attention is allocated sparsely over time through glance and gaze behavior. Is equal consideration of time and space crucial for success in video tasks? Motivated by this understanding, we propose a dual-path network called the Overall Glance and Refined Gaze (OG-ReG) Transformer. The Glance path extracts coarse-grained overall spatiotemporal information, while the Gaze path supplements the Glance path by providing local details. Our model achieves state-of-the-art results on the Kinetics-400, Something-Something v2, and Diving-48, demonstrating its competitive performance. The code will be available at https://github.com/linuxsino/OG-ReG.

analysis.tldr: 受人类视觉认知启发，提出双路径OG-ReG Transformer，通过粗粒度全局浏览和细粒度局部凝视捕捉视频时空依赖，在三个动作识别基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频Transformer依赖分解或窗口自注意力，割裂了感兴趣区域的时空关联，限制了模型捕捉运动与长程依赖的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计视频Transformer架构，使其能像人类视觉系统一样在不同时间尺度上稀疏分配注意力，同时兼顾全局和局部时空信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，时空信息的重要性在不同时间尺度上不同，注意力通过扫视和凝视行为随时间稀疏分配，均匀对待时空维度可能并非最优。
analysis.method: 提出双路径OG-ReG Transformer：Glance路径提取粗粒度全局时空信息，Gaze路径补充局部细节。
contributions: 受人类视觉认知启发，提出双路径视频Transformer架构OG-ReG。
在Kinetics-400、Something-Something v2和Diving-48上达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在Kinetics-400、Something-Something v2和Diving-48三个动作识别基准上评估，达到SOTA。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在长视频或实时场景下的效率。
可能对细粒度动作区分能力有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有认知启发性，在多个基准上SOTA，但技术细节未完全展开，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 受人类视觉认知启发，提出双路径OG-ReG Transformer，通过粗粒度全局浏览和细粒度局部凝视捕捉视频时空依赖，在三个动作识别基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: EventFace: Event-Based Face Recognition via Structure-Driven Spatiotemporal Modeling
papers.abstract: Event cameras offer a promising sensing modality for face recognition due to their inherent advantages in illumination robustness and privacy-friendliness. However, because event streams lack the stable photometric appearance relied upon by conventional RGB-based face recognition systems, we argue that event-based face recognition should model structure-driven spatiotemporal identity representations shaped by rigid facial motion and individual facial geometry. Since dedicated datasets for event-based face recognition remain lacking, we construct EFace, a small-scale event-based face dataset captured under rigid facial motion. To learn effectively from this limited event data, we further propose EventFace, a framework for event-based face recognition that integrates spatial structure and temporal dynamics for identity modeling. Specifically, we employ Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) to transfer structural facial priors from pretrained RGB face models to the event domain, thereby establishing a reliable spatial basis for identity modeling. Building on this foundation, we further introduce a Motion Prompt Encoder (MPE) to explicitly encode temporal features and a Spatiotemporal Modulator (STM) to fuse them with spatial features, thereby enhancing the representation of identity-relevant event patterns. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EventFace achieves the best performance among the evaluated baselines, with a Rank-1 identification rate of 94.19% and an equal error rate (EER) of 5.35%. Results further indicate that EventFace exhibits stronger robustness under degraded illumination than the competing methods. In addition, the learned representations exhibit reduced template reconstructability.

analysis.tldr: 提出EventFace框架，利用结构驱动时空建模实现事件相机人脸识别，并构建小规模数据集EFace。
analysis.research_motivation: 事件相机具有光照鲁棒性和隐私友好性，但缺乏稳定外观信息，传统RGB方法无法直接应用，且缺少专用数据集。
analysis.problem: 如何从事件流中建模结构驱动的时空身份表征，并在小样本数据下有效学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 事件流缺乏RGB中的稳定光度外观，需依赖刚性面部运动和个体几何结构来建模身份。
analysis.method: 使用LoRA从预训练RGB人脸模型迁移结构先验，引入运动提示编码器（MPE）编码时序特征，并通过时空调制器（STM）融合空间与时间特征。
contributions: 构建了首个事件相机人脸识别数据集EFace
提出EventFace框架，结合LoRA迁移、运动提示编码器和时空调制器
analysis.experiments: 在EFace数据集上，Rank-1识别率94.19%，等错误率5.35%，光照退化下鲁棒性优于对比方法，且表征可重构性降低。
limitations: 数据集规模小，可能限制泛化性
仅针对刚性面部运动，非刚性表情变化未考虑
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合事件相机与LoRA迁移，实验效果显著，但数据集较小，适合关注事件视觉的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EventFace框架，利用结构驱动时空建模实现事件相机人脸识别，并构建小规模数据集EFace。

papers.title: FVD: Inference-Time Alignment of Diffusion Models via Fleming-Viot Resampling
papers.abstract: We introduce Fleming-Viot Diffusion (FVD), an inference-time alignment method that resolves the diversity collapse commonly observed in Sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) based diffusion samplers. Existing SMC-based diffusion samplers often rely on multinomial resampling or closely related resampling schemes, which can still reduce diversity and lead to lineage collapse under strong selection pressure. Inspired by Fleming-Viot population dynamics, FVD replaces multinomial resampling with a specialized birth-death mechanism designed for diffusion alignment. To handle cases where rewards are only approximately available and naive rebirth would collapse deterministic trajectories, FVD integrates independent reward-based survival decisions with stochastic rebirth noise. This yields flexible population dynamics that preserve broader trajectory support while effectively exploring reward-tilted distributions, all without requiring value function approximation or costly rollouts. FVD is fully parallelizable and scales efficiently with inference compute. Empirically, it achieves substantial gains across settings: on DrawBench it outperforms prior methods by 7% in ImageReward, while on class-conditional tasks it improves FID by roughly 14-20% over strong baselines and is up to 66 times faster than value-based approaches.

analysis.tldr: FVD 通过 Fleming-Viot 重采样在推理时对齐扩散模型，解决了多样性崩溃问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于 SMC 的扩散采样器在强选择压力下多样性下降，导致生成结果单一，需要一种保持多样性的对齐方法。
analysis.problem: 扩散模型推理时对齐中的多样性崩溃问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: FVD 用 Fleming-Viot 出生-死亡机制替代多项式重采样，结合随机重生噪声保持轨迹多样性。
contributions: 提出 FVD 方法，在推理时对齐扩散模型并保持多样性。
在 DrawBench 和类条件任务上取得显著提升，且速度比基于价值的方法快 66 倍。
analysis.experiments: 在 DrawBench 上 ImageReward 提升 7%，类条件任务上 FID 改善 14-20%，速度提升 66 倍。
limitations: 可能对奖励函数质量敏感。
需要调整出生-死亡机制的超参数。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验效果好，与扩散模型对齐方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FVD 通过 Fleming-Viot 重采样在推理时对齐扩散模型，解决了多样性崩溃问题。

papers.title: Walk the Talk: Bridging the Reasoning-Action Gap for Thinking with Images via Multimodal Agentic Policy Optimization
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have incentivized models to ``think with images'' by actively invoking visual tools during multi-turn reasoning. The common Reinforcement Learning (RL) practice of relying on outcome-based rewards ignores the fact that textual plausibility often masks executive failure, meaning that models may exhibit intuitive textual reasoning while executing imprecise or irrelevant visual actions within their agentic reasoning trajectories. This reasoning-action discrepancy introduces noise that accumulates throughout the multi-turn reasoning process, severely degrading the model's multimodal reasoning capabilities and potentially leading to training collapse. In this paper, we introduce Multimodal Agentic Policy Optimization (MAPO), bridging the gap between textual reasoning and visual actions generated by models within their Multimodal Chain-of-Thought (MCoT). Specifically, MAPO mandates the model to generate explicit textual descriptions for the visual content obtained via tool usage. We then employ a novel advantage estimation that couples the semantic alignment between these descriptions and the actual observations with the task reward. Theoretical findings are provided to justify the rationale behind MAPO, which inherently reduces the variance of gradients, and extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance across multiple visual reasoning benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出MAPO方法，通过语义对齐奖励弥合多模态推理中的推理-动作差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有强化学习方法仅依赖结果奖励，忽略了多步推理中文本推理与视觉动作之间的不一致，导致噪声累积和训练崩溃。
analysis.problem: 多模态大模型在链式推理中，文本推理与视觉工具调用产生的动作之间存在差距，需要弥合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型可能表现出直观的文本推理，但执行不精确或无关的视觉动作，这种推理-动作差异在多步推理中累积噪声。
analysis.method: 提出多模态智能体策略优化（MAPO），要求模型为工具获取的视觉内容生成显式文本描述，并利用描述与真实观测的语义对齐与任务奖励耦合进行优势估计。
contributions: 提出MAPO方法，弥合多模态链式推理中的推理-动作差距。
理论证明MAPO能降低梯度方差，并在多个视觉推理基准上取得优越性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个视觉推理基准上进行实验，方法取得优越性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量文本描述生成能力。
语义对齐奖励的设计可能需针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论分析扎实，实验验证有效，与多模态推理和RL方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MAPO方法，通过语义对齐奖励弥合多模态推理中的推理-动作差距。

papers.title: From Inheritance to Saturation: Disentangling the Evolution of Visual Redundancy for Architecture-Aware MLLM Inference Acceleration
papers.abstract: High-resolution Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) face prohibitive computational costs during inference due to the explosion of visual tokens. Existing acceleration strategies, such as token pruning or layer sparsity, suffer from severe "backbone dependency", performing well on Vicuna or Mistral architectures (e.g., LLaVA) but causing significant performance degradation when transferred to architectures like Qwen. To address this, we leverage truncated matrix entropy to uncover a universal three-stage inference lifecycle, decoupling visual redundancy into universal Intrinsic Visual Redundancy (IVR) and architecture-dependent Secondary Saturation Redundancy (SSR). Guided by this insight, we propose HalfV, a framework that first mitigates IVR via a unified pruning strategy and then adaptively handles SSR based on its specific manifestation. Experiments demonstrate that HalfV achieves superior efficiency-performance trade-offs across diverse backbones. Notably, on Qwen25-VL, it retains 96.8\% performance at a 4.1$\times$ FLOPs speedup, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art baselines. Our code is available at https://github.com/civilizwa/HalfV.

analysis.tldr: 提出HalfV框架，通过解耦视觉冗余为架构无关的IVR和架构依赖的SSR，实现多架构MLLM推理加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率多模态大模型推理时视觉token爆炸导致计算成本高昂，现有加速策略存在严重的骨干网络依赖性，在不同架构间迁移时性能显著下降。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种架构感知的视觉冗余消除方法，在保持性能的同时实现跨架构的高效推理加速。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过截断矩阵熵发现MLLM推理存在通用的三阶段生命周期，视觉冗余可解耦为通用的内在视觉冗余（IVR）和架构依赖的二次饱和冗余（SSR）。
analysis.method: 提出HalfV框架，首先通过统一剪枝策略缓解IVR，然后根据SSR的具体表现自适应处理。
contributions: 揭示了MLLM推理中视觉冗余的演化规律，将其解耦为IVR和SSR。
提出HalfV框架，实现跨架构的高效推理加速，在Qwen2.5-VL上以4.1倍FLOPs加速保留96.8%性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多种骨干网络（如Vicuna、Mistral、Qwen）上进行实验，与SOTA基线对比，Qwen2.5-VL上达到4.1倍FLOPs加速且性能保留96.8%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的视觉冗余模式，对极端低资源场景的泛化性未知。
自适应处理SSR的机制可能增加额外开销，在极低延迟要求下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与VLM/MLLM方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HalfV框架，通过解耦视觉冗余为架构无关的IVR和架构依赖的SSR，实现多架构MLLM推理加速。

papers.title: Sparse-Aware Neural Networks for Nonlinear Functionals: Mitigating the Exponential Dependence on Dimension
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks have emerged as powerful tools for learning operators defined over infinite-dimensional function spaces. However, existing theories frequently encounter difficulties related to dimensionality and limited interpretability. This work investigates how sparsity can help address these challenges in functional learning, a central ingredient in operator learning. We propose a framework that employs convolutional architectures to extract sparse features from a finite number of samples, together with deep fully connected networks to effectively approximate nonlinear functionals. Using universal discretization methods, we show that sparse approximators enable stable recovery from discrete samples. In addition, both the deterministic and the random sampling schemes are sufficient for our analysis. These findings lead to improved approximation rates and reduced sample sizes in various function spaces, including those with fast frequency decay and mixed smoothness. They also provide new theoretical insights into how sparsity can alleviate the curse of dimensionality in functional learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出稀疏感知神经网络框架，利用卷积提取稀疏特征，缓解函数学习中维度灾难问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度神经网络在函数空间学习（如算子学习）中面临维度灾难和可解释性不足的挑战，现有理论难以处理高维问题。
analysis.problem: 如何利用稀疏性改善非线性泛函的逼近效率，降低对样本量的指数依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合卷积架构提取稀疏特征与全连接网络逼近非线性泛函，并采用通用离散化方法实现稳定恢复。
contributions: 提出稀疏感知神经网络框架，缓解函数学习中的维度灾难。
理论证明稀疏逼近器在确定性/随机采样下均能实现稳定恢复，并改进逼近速率与样本复杂度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定函数空间（如快速频率衰减、混合光滑性）。

analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出稀疏感知神经网络框架，利用卷积提取稀疏特征，缓解函数学习中维度灾难问题。

papers.title: Multi-Faceted Self-Consistent Preference Alignment for Query Rewriting in Conversational Search
papers.abstract: Conversational Query Rewriting (CQR) aims to rewrite ambiguous queries to achieve more efficient conversational search. Early studies have predominantly focused on the rewriting in isolation, ignoring the feedback from query rewrite, passage retrieval and response generation in the rewriting process. To address this issue, we propose Multi-Faceted Self-Consistent Preference Aligned CQR (MSPA-CQR). Specifically, we first construct self-consistent preference alignment data from three dimensions (rewriting, retrieval, and response) to generate more diverse rewritten queries. Then we propose prefix guided multi-faceted direct preference optimization to learn preference information from three different dimensions. The experimental results show that our MSPA-CQR is effective in both in- and out-of-distribution scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出多面自一致偏好对齐方法，通过三方面反馈优化对话查询重写。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对话查询重写方法孤立地重写查询，忽略了重写、检索和生成反馈，导致重写效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何利用重写、检索和生成三个维度的反馈来优化对话查询重写。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建自一致偏好对齐数据，涵盖重写、检索和响应三个维度；提出前缀引导的多面直接偏好优化（prefix guided multi-faceted DPO）来学习偏好信息。
contributions: 提出多面自一致偏好对齐框架MSPA-CQR，融合重写、检索和响应反馈。
设计前缀引导的多面直接偏好优化方法，有效利用多维度偏好信息。
analysis.experiments: 在分布内和分布外场景下均验证了有效性，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量偏好数据构建。
多面优化可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但摘要未提供具体实验细节，影响评分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多面自一致偏好对齐方法，通过三方面反馈优化对话查询重写。

papers.title: FlowExtract: Procedural Knowledge Extraction from Maintenance Flowcharts
papers.abstract: Maintenance procedures in manufacturing facilities are often documented as flowcharts in static PDFs or scanned images. They encode procedural knowledge essential for asset lifecycle management, yet inaccessible to modern operator support systems. Vision-language models, the dominant paradigm for image understanding, struggle to reconstruct connection topology from such diagrams. We present FlowExtract, a pipeline for extracting directed graphs from ISO 5807-standardized flowcharts. The system separates element detection from connectivity reconstruction, using YOLOv8 and EasyOCR for standard domain-aligned node detection and text extraction, combined with a novel edge detection method that analyzes arrowhead orientations and traces connecting lines backward to source nodes. Evaluated on industrial troubleshooting guides, FlowExtract achieves very high node detection and substantially outperforms vision-language model baselines on edge extraction, offering organizations a practical path toward queryable procedural knowledge representations. The implementation is available athttps://github.com/guille-gil/FlowExtract.

analysis.tldr: FlowExtract 从工业维护流程图中提取有向图，通过分离元素检测与连接重建，显著优于视觉语言模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业维护流程常以静态 PDF 或扫描图像中的流程图形式存在，这些流程图编码了资产生命周期管理所需的过程知识，但现代操作员支持系统无法直接访问这些知识。
analysis.problem: 视觉语言模型难以从流程图中重建连接拓扑结构，导致无法提取可查询的过程知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视觉语言模型在重建流程图连接拓扑时表现不佳，而分离元素检测与连接重建的方法更有效。
analysis.method: FlowExtract 管道：使用 YOLOv8 和 EasyOCR 进行节点检测和文本提取，结合新颖的边检测方法（分析箭头方向并逆向追踪连接线到源节点）来提取有向图。
contributions: 提出 FlowExtract 管道，从 ISO 5807 标准流程图中提取有向图。
新颖的边检测方法，通过箭头方向分析和逆向追踪实现高精度连接重建。
在工业故障排除指南上评估，节点检测精度高，边提取显著优于视觉语言模型基线。
analysis.experiments: 在工业故障排除指南上评估，FlowExtract 实现了非常高的节点检测率，并在边提取上大幅优于视觉语言模型基线。
limitations: 可能仅适用于 ISO 5807 标准流程图，其他格式需适配。
依赖 YOLOv8 和 EasyOCR，对极端变形的流程图可能鲁棒性不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法实用但创新性中等，实验规模有限，适合对工业文档处理感兴趣的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlowExtract 从工业维护流程图中提取有向图，通过分离元素检测与连接重建，显著优于视觉语言模型。

papers.title: Zero-Shot Synthetic-to-Real Handwritten Text Recognition via Task Analogies
papers.abstract: Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) models trained on synthetic handwriting often struggle to generalize to real text, and existing adaptation methods still require real samples from the target domain. In this work, we tackle the fully zero-shot synthetic-to-real generalization setting, where no real data from the target language is available. Our approach learns how model parameters change when moving from synthetic to real handwriting in one or more source languages and transfers this learned correction to new target languages. When using multiple sources, we rely on linguistic similarity to weigh their contrubition when combining them. Experiments across five languages and six architectures show consistent improvements over synthetic-only baselines and reveal that the transferred corrections benefit even languages unrelated to the sources.

analysis.tldr: 通过任务类比实现零样本合成到真实手写文本识别，无需目标域真实数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 合成手写训练的HTR模型难以泛化到真实文本，现有适应方法仍需目标域真实样本，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 解决完全零样本的合成到真实手写文本识别问题，即目标语言无任何真实数据可用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 学习从合成到真实手写时模型参数的变化（任务类比），并利用语言相似性加权多源迁移，将校正应用于新目标语言。
contributions: 提出零样本合成到真实手写文本识别方法，无需目标域真实数据。
通过多源语言相似性加权迁移，提升跨语言泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在五种语言和六种架构上实验，相比仅用合成数据的基线有一致提升，且迁移校正对无关语言也有益。
limitations: 依赖源语言与目标语言之间的语言相似性度量。
可能对语言差异极大的目标域效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，实验充分，但属于特定任务，影响范围有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过任务类比实现零样本合成到真实手写文本识别，无需目标域真实数据。

papers.title: TeamLLM: A Human-Like Team-Oriented Collaboration Framework for Multi-Step Contextualized Tasks
papers.abstract: Recently, multi-Large Language Model (LLM) frameworks have been proposed to solve contextualized tasks. However, these frameworks do not explicitly emulate human team role division, which may lead to a single perspective, thereby weakening performance on multi-step contextualized tasks. To address this issue, we propose TeamLLM, a human-like Team-Oriented Multi-LLM Collaboration Framework. TeamLLM adopts four team roles with distinct division and employs a three-phase multi-LLM collaboration for multi-step contextualized tasks. To evaluate the effectiveness of TeamLLM on multi-step contextualized tasks, we propose Contextually-Grounded and Procedurally-Structured tasks (CGPST) and construct the CGPST benchmark. This benchmark has four core features: contextual grounding, procedural structure, process-oriented evaluation and multi-dimensional assessment. We evaluate ten popular LLMs on CGPST at overall-level, step-level, and dimension-level. Results show that TeamLLM substantially improves performance on CGPST. We release the benchmark with scenarios, full-process responses and human scores from ten LLMs. The code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/TeamLLM-anonymous-C50E/.

analysis.tldr: 提出类人团队协作框架TeamLLM，通过角色分工与三阶段协作提升多步上下文任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多LLM框架未模拟人类团队角色分工，导致视角单一，在多步上下文任务中性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计类人团队协作的多LLM框架以有效解决多步上下文任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: TeamLLM采用四种团队角色（如领导者、执行者等）和三个阶段的多LLM协作流程，并构建了CGPST基准（包含上下文基础、过程结构、过程导向评估和多维评估）。
contributions: 提出类人团队协作框架TeamLLM，包含角色分工与三阶段协作。
构建CGPST基准，支持整体、步骤和维度级评估。
在10个LLM上验证TeamLLM显著提升CGPST性能，并开源基准与数据。
analysis.experiments: 在10个流行LLM上评估CGPST，从整体、步骤和维度三个层面显示TeamLLM显著提升性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于多步上下文任务，泛化性待验证。
角色分工的固定性可能限制灵活性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，但实验仅基于自建基准，未见广泛SOTA对比。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出类人团队协作框架TeamLLM，通过角色分工与三阶段协作提升多步上下文任务性能。

papers.title: FlowInOne:Unifying Multimodal Generation as Image-in, Image-out Flow Matching
papers.abstract: Multimodal generation has long been dominated by text-driven pipelines where language dictates vision but cannot reason or create within it. We challenge this paradigm by asking whether all modalities, including textual descriptions, spatial layouts, and editing instructions, can be unified into a single visual representation. We present FlowInOne, a framework that reformulates multimodal generation as a purely visual flow, converting all inputs into visual prompts and enabling a clean image-in, image-out pipeline governed by a single flow matching model. This vision-centric formulation naturally eliminates cross-modal alignment bottlenecks, noise scheduling, and task-specific architectural branches, unifying text-to-image generation, layout-guided editing, and visual instruction following under one coherent paradigm. To support this, we introduce VisPrompt-5M, a large-scale dataset of 5 million visual prompt pairs spanning diverse tasks including physics-aware force dynamics and trajectory prediction, alongside VP-Bench, a rigorously curated benchmark assessing instruction faithfulness, spatial precision, visual realism, and content consistency. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FlowInOne achieves state-of-the-art performance across all unified generation tasks, surpassing both open-source models and competitive commercial systems, establishing a new foundation for fully vision-centric generative modeling where perception and creation coexist within a single continuous visual space.

analysis.tldr: FlowInOne 将多模态生成统一为纯视觉的“图像输入-图像输出”流匹配框架，无需跨模态对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前多模态生成以文本驱动为主，语言主导视觉但无法在视觉内部推理或创造，存在跨模态对齐瓶颈、噪声调度和任务特定架构分支等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何将所有模态（文本描述、空间布局、编辑指令等）统一为单一视觉表示，实现纯视觉驱动的多模态生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 FlowInOne 框架，将所有输入转换为视觉提示，通过单一流匹配模型实现图像输入到图像输出的流水线；同时构建 VisPrompt-5M 数据集和 VP-Bench 基准。
contributions: 提出 FlowInOne，将多模态生成统一为纯视觉流匹配框架，消除跨模态对齐等瓶颈。
构建 VisPrompt-5M 大规模视觉提示数据集和 VP-Bench 评估基准。
analysis.experiments: 在文本到图像生成、布局引导编辑和视觉指令跟随等任务上达到 SOTA，超越开源和商业系统。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模视觉提示数据集的构建质量。
纯视觉表示可能在某些需要显式语言推理的任务上存在局限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，统一多模态生成为纯视觉框架，实验全面且达到 SOTA，但属于生成模型大类下的新范式，非当前最核心关注点。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlowInOne 将多模态生成统一为纯视觉的“图像输入-图像输出”流匹配框架，无需跨模态对齐。

papers.title: How Well Do Vision-Language Models Understand Sequential Driving Scenes? A Sensitivity Study
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly proposed for autonomous driving tasks, yet their performance on sequential driving scenes remains poorly characterized, particularly regarding how input configurations affect their capabilities. We introduce VENUSS (VLM Evaluation oN Understanding Sequential Scenes), a framework for systematic sensitivity analysis of VLM performance on sequential driving scenes, establishing baselines for future research. Building upon existing datasets, VENUSS extracts temporal sequences from driving videos, and generates structured evaluations across custom categories. By comparing 25+ existing VLMs across 2,600+ scenarios, we reveal how even top models achieve only 57% accuracy, not matching human performance in similar constraints (65%) and exposing significant capability gaps. Our analysis shows that VLMs excel with static object detection but struggle with understanding the vehicle dynamics and temporal relations. VENUSS offers the first systematic sensitivity analysis of VLMs focused on how input image configurations - resolution, frame count, temporal intervals, spatial layouts, and presentation modes - affect performance on sequential driving scenes. Supplementary material available at https://V3NU55.github.io

analysis.tldr: VLMs在时序驾驶场景中表现不佳，仅57%准确率，远低于人类的65%。
analysis.research_motivation: VLMs越来越多用于自动驾驶，但它们在时序驾驶场景中的性能缺乏系统研究，特别是输入配置如何影响能力尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 系统评估VLMs在时序驾驶场景中的敏感性，分析输入配置（分辨率、帧数、时间间隔、空间布局、呈现模式）对性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLMs在静态物体检测上表现良好，但在理解车辆动态和时间关系上存在显著能力差距；即使最佳模型准确率仅57%，低于人类65%。
analysis.method: 提出VENUSS框架，从驾驶视频中提取时序序列，生成结构化评估，对25+个VLM在2600+场景中进行系统敏感性分析。
contributions: 首次对VLMs在时序驾驶场景中的输入配置敏感性进行系统分析。
揭示了VLMs在动态和时间关系理解上的能力差距，并建立了基准。
analysis.experiments: 在2600+场景上评估25+个VLM，最佳模型准确率57%，人类65%。
limitations: 仅基于现有数据集，可能未覆盖所有驾驶场景。
未提供具体改进方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 系统评估VLM在时序驾驶场景中的敏感性，揭示能力差距，对自动驾驶领域有重要参考价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLMs在时序驾驶场景中表现不佳，仅57%准确率，远低于人类的65%。

papers.title: From Static to Interactive: Adapting Visual in-Context Learners for User-Driven Tasks
papers.abstract: Visual in-context learning models are designed to adapt to new tasks by leveraging a set of example input-output pairs, enabling rapid generalization without task-specific fine-tuning. However, these models operate in a fundamentally static paradigm: while they can adapt to new tasks, they lack any mechanism to incorporate user-provided guidance signals such as scribbles, clicks, or bounding boxes to steer or refine the prediction process. This limitation is particularly restrictive in real-world applications, where users want to actively guide model predictions, e.g., by highlighting the target object for segmentation, indicating a region which should be visually altered, or isolating a specific person in a complex scene to run targeted pose estimation. In this work, we propose a simple method to transform static visual in-context learners, particularly the DeLVM approach, into highly controllable, user-driven systems, i.e., Interactive DeLVM, enabling seamless interaction through natural visual cues such as scribbles, clicks, or drawing boxes. Specifically, by encoding interactions directly into the example input-output pairs, we keep the philosophy of visual in-context learning intact: enabling users to prompt models with unseen interactions without fine-tuning and empowering them to dynamically steer model predictions with personalized interactions. Our experiments demonstrate that SOTA visual in-context learning models fail to effectively leverage interaction cues, often ignoring user guidance entirely. In contrast, our method excels in controllable, user-guided scenarios, achieving improvements of $+7.95%$ IoU for interactive segmentation, $+2.46$ PSNR for directed super-resolution, and $-3.14%$ LPIPS for interactive object removal. With this, our work bridges the gap between rigid static task adaptation and fluid interactivity for user-centric visual in-context learning.

analysis.tldr: 将静态视觉上下文学习模型改造为支持用户交互（涂鸦、点击、框选）的动态系统，无需微调即可引导预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉上下文学习模型只能通过示例对适应新任务，无法接收用户提供的交互信号（如涂鸦、点击、边界框）来引导或修正预测，限制了实际应用中的可控性和用户体验。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行微调的前提下，使静态视觉上下文学习模型能够有效利用用户交互信号（如涂鸦、点击、框选）来动态引导预测结果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现SOTA视觉上下文学习模型无法有效利用交互线索，常常完全忽略用户引导。
analysis.method: 将用户交互（涂鸦、点击、框选）直接编码到示例输入-输出对中，保持视觉上下文学习范式不变，使模型无需微调即可处理未见过的交互，并动态调整预测。
contributions: 提出Interactive DeLVM，将静态视觉上下文学习模型转化为支持用户交互的动态系统。
通过将交互编码为示例对，无需微调即可实现可控的用户引导预测。
在交互式分割、定向超分辨率和交互式物体移除任务上显著提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在交互式分割（IoU +7.95%）、定向超分辨率（PSNR +2.46）和交互式物体移除（LPIPS -3.14%）上验证了有效性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的视觉上下文学习模型（如DeLVM）。
交互编码方式可能对复杂交互（如多轮交互）支持有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简单有效，实验充分，提升显著，但技术深度中等，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将静态视觉上下文学习模型改造为支持用户交互（涂鸦、点击、框选）的动态系统，无需微调即可引导预测。

papers.title: TurboAgent: An LLM-Driven Autonomous Multi-Agent Framework for Turbomachinery Aerodynamic Design
papers.abstract: The aerodynamic design of turbomachinery is a complex and tightly coupled multi-stage process involving geometry generation, performance prediction, optimization, and high-fidelity physical validation. Existing intelligent design approaches typically focus on individual stages or rely on loosely coupled pipelines, making fully autonomous end-to-end design challenging. To address this issue, this study proposes TurboAgent, a large language model (LLM)-driven autonomous multi-agent framework for turbomachinery aerodynamic design and optimization. The LLM serves as the core for task planning and coordination, while specialized agents handle generative design, rapid performance prediction, multi-objective optimization, and physics-based validation. The framework transforms traditional trial-and-error design into a data-driven collaborative workflow, with high-fidelity simulations retained for final verification. A transonic single-rotor compressor is used for validation. The results show strong agreement between target performance, generated designs, and CFD simulations. The coefficients of determination for mass flow rate, total pressure ratio, and isentropic efficiency all exceed 0.91, with normalized RMSE values below 8%. The optimization agent further improves isentropic efficiency by 1.61% and total pressure ratio by 3.02%. The complete workflow can be executed within approximately 30 minutes under parallel computing. These results demonstrate that TurboAgent enables an autonomous closed-loop design process from natural language requirements to final design generation, providing an efficient and scalable paradigm for turbomachinery aerodynamic design.

analysis.tldr: 提出LLM驱动的多智能体框架TurboAgent，实现涡轮机械气动设计的全自动端到端闭环。
analysis.research_motivation: 涡轮机械气动设计是多阶段紧密耦合的复杂过程，现有智能方法仅关注单阶段或松散流水线，难以实现全自动端到端设计。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够自主完成从几何生成、性能预测、优化到高保真验证的端到端涡轮机械气动设计框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供现象分析。
analysis.method: 以LLM为核心进行任务规划与协调，结合专用智能体分别处理生成设计、快速性能预测、多目标优化和基于物理的验证，将试错设计转化为数据驱动协作流程。
contributions: 提出首个LLM驱动的自主多智能体框架TurboAgent，实现涡轮机械气动设计的全自动闭环。
在跨声速单转子压缩机上验证，性能预测的决定系数均超过0.91，归一化RMSE低于8%，优化后等熵效率提升1.61%，总压比提升3.02%。
analysis.experiments: 在跨声速单转子压缩机上验证，结果显示目标性能、生成设计与CFD模拟高度一致，质量流量、总压比和等熵效率的决定系数均超过0.91，归一化RMSE低于8%；优化智能体使等熵效率提升1.61%，总压比提升3.02%；完整工作流在并行计算下约30分钟完成。
limitations: 仅在一个压缩机案例上验证，泛化性未知。
依赖LLM的规划能力，可能受限于LLM的推理准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖但领域较专，实验充分但仅单案例，推荐保存以备后续参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LLM驱动的多智能体框架TurboAgent，实现涡轮机械气动设计的全自动端到端闭环。

papers.title: Evaluating LLM-Based 0-to-1 Software Generation in End-to-End CLI Tool Scenarios
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are driving a shift towards intent-driven development, where agents build complete software from scratch. However, existing benchmarks fail to assess this 0-to-1 generation capability due to two limitations: reliance on predefined scaffolds that ignore repository structure planning, and rigid white-box unit testing that lacks end-to-end behavioral validation. To bridge this gap, we introduce CLI-Tool-Bench, a structure-agnostic benchmark for evaluating the ground-up generation of Command-Line Interface (CLI) tools. It features 100 diverse real-world repositories evaluated via a black-box differential testing framework. Agent-generated software is executed in sandboxes, comparing system side effects and terminal outputs against human-written oracles using multi-tiered equivalence metrics. Evaluating seven state-of-the-art LLMs, we reveal that top models achieve under 43% success, highlighting the ongoing challenge of 0-to-1 generation. Furthermore, higher token consumption does not guarantee better performance, and agents tend to generate monolithic code.

analysis.tldr: 提出CLI-Tool-Bench基准，评估LLM从零生成CLI工具的能力，发现顶级模型成功率不足43%。

contributions: 提出了CLI-Tool-Bench，首个评估LLM从零生成CLI工具的结构无关基准。
揭示了当前LLM在0-to-1软件生成中的挑战，包括低成功率和代码结构问题。
analysis.experiments: 评估了七个最先进的LLM，顶级模型成功率低于43%。

papers.title: LiveStre4m: Feed-Forward Live Streaming of Novel Views from Unposed Multi-View Video
papers.abstract: Live-streaming Novel View Synthesis (NVS) from unposed multi-view video remains an open challenge in a wide range of applications. Existing methods for dynamic scene representation typically require ground-truth camera parameters and involve lengthy optimizations ($\approx 2.67$s), which makes them unsuitable for live streaming scenarios. To address this issue, we propose a novel viewpoint video live-streaming method (LiveStre4m), a feed-forward model for real-time NVS from unposed sparse multi-view inputs. LiveStre4m introduces a multi-view vision transformer for keyframe 3D scene reconstruction coupled with a diffusion-transformer interpolation module that ensures temporal consistency and stable streaming. In addition, a Camera Pose Predictor module is proposed to efficiently estimate both poses and intrinsics directly from RGB images, removing the reliance on known camera calibration information. Our approach enables temporally consistent novel-view video streaming in real-time using as few as two synchronized unposed input streams. LiveStre4m attains an average reconstruction time of $ 0.07$s per-frame at $ 1024 \times 768$ resolution, outperforming the optimization-based dynamic scene representation methods by orders of magnitude in runtime. These results demonstrate that LiveStre4m makes real-time NVS streaming feasible in practical settings, marking a substantial step toward deployable live novel-view synthesis systems. Code available at: https://github.com/pedro-quesado/LiveStre4m

analysis.tldr: 提出一种前馈式实时新视角视频流方法，无需相机参数即可从无位姿多视角视频生成连贯新视角。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有动态场景表示方法需要真实相机参数且优化耗时（约2.67秒），无法用于直播场景，亟需实时解决方案。
analysis.problem: 从无位姿稀疏多视角输入中实时生成时序一致的新视角视频流。

contributions: 首个前馈式实时新视角视频流方法，无需已知相机参数。
提出相机位姿预测模块，消除对相机标定的依赖。
在1024×768分辨率下每帧重建仅需0.07秒，比优化方法快数个数量级。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及运行时间对比。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种前馈式实时新视角视频流方法，无需相机参数即可从无位姿多视角视频生成连贯新视角。

papers.title: DOC-GS: Dual-Domain Observation and Calibration for Reliable Sparse-View Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Sparse-view reconstruction with 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) is fundamentally ill-posed due to insufficient geometric supervision, often leading to severe overfitting and the emergence of structural distortions and translucent haze-like artifacts. While existing approaches attempt to alleviate this issue via dropout-based regularization, they are largely heuristic and lack a unified understanding of artifact formation. In this paper, we revisit sparse-view 3DGS reconstruction from a new perspective and identify the core challenge as the unobservability of Gaussian primitive reliability. Unreliable Gaussians are insufficiently constrained during optimization and accumulate as haze-like degradations in rendered images. Motivated by this observation, we propose a unified Dual-domain Observation and Calibration (DOC-GS) framework that models and corrects Gaussian reliability through the synergy of optimization-domain inductive bias and observation-domain evidence. Specifically, in the optimization domain, we characterize Gaussian reliability by the degree to which each primitive is constrained during training, and instantiate this signal via a Continuous Depth-Guided Dropout (CDGD) strategy, where the dropout probability serves as an explicit proxy for primitive reliability. This imposes a smooth depth-aware inductive bias to suppress weakly constrained Gaussians and improve optimization stability. In the observation domain, we establish a connection between floater artifacts and atmospheric scattering, and leverage the Dark Channel Prior (DCP) as a structural consistency cue to identify and accumulate anomalous regions. Based on cross-view aggregated evidence, we further design a reliability-driven geometric pruning strategy to remove low-confidence Gaussians.

analysis.tldr: 提出双域观测与校准框架（DOC-GS），通过优化域和观测域协同建模高斯原语可靠性，解决稀疏视图3DGS重建中的伪影问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 稀疏视图3DGS重建因几何监督不足而病态，现有基于dropout的正则化方法缺乏对伪影形成的统一理解。
analysis.problem: 稀疏视图下3DGS重建中高斯原语可靠性不可观测，导致结构畸变和半透明雾状伪影。

analysis.method: 提出DOC-GS框架，优化域通过连续深度引导dropout（CDGD）建模原语可靠性，观测域利用暗通道先验（DCP）识别异常区域并执行可靠性驱动的几何剪枝。

papers.title: WisdomInterrogatory (LuWen): An Open-Source Legal Large Language Model Technical Report
papers.abstract: Large language models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across a wide range of natural language processing tasks, yet their application in the legal domain remains challenging due to the specialized terminology, complex reasoning requirements, and rapidly evolving legal knowledge involved. In this paper, we present WisdomInterrogatory (LuWen), an open-source Chinese legal language model built upon the Baichuan foundation model through three key techniques: continual pre-training on a large-scale legal corpus, supervised fine-tuning with carefully curated legal instruction data, and retrieval-augmented generation integrated with a comprehensive legal knowledge base. We evaluate LuWen on five representative legal tasks spanning both prediction and generation settings, including legal judgment prediction, judicial examination, legal text summarization, law article question answering, and judicial decision reasoning. Experimental results show that LuWen outperforms several strong baselines, demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach in adapting general-purpose language models to the legal domain.

analysis.tldr: 基于百川模型，通过持续预训练、指令微调和检索增强生成构建开源中文法律大模型LuWen，在法律任务上超越多个基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 法律领域术语专业、推理复杂且知识更新快，通用大模型难以直接应用，需要专门适配。
analysis.problem: 如何将通用大模型有效适配到中文法律领域，提升其在法律预测与生成任务上的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

提出了结合持续预训练、指令微调和检索增强生成的领域适配方法。

papers.title: URMF: Uncertainty-aware Robust Multimodal Fusion for Multimodal Sarcasm Detection
papers.abstract: Multimodal sarcasm detection (MSD) aims to identify sarcastic intent from semantic incongruity between text and image. Although recent methods have improved MSD through cross-modal interaction and incongruity reasoning, most still treat modalities as equally reliable. In real social media posts, however, text and images often differ in noise level and relevance, making deterministic fusion susceptible to noisy evidence and weakened incongruity cues. To address this issue, we propose Uncertainty-aware Robust Multimodal Fusion (URMF), a unified framework for robust MSD. URMF first injects visual evidence into textual representations through multi-head cross-attention, and then applies self-attention in the fused semantic space to enhance incongruity reasoning. It models textual, visual, and interaction-aware representations as learnable Gaussian posteriors to estimate modality-specific uncertainty. Based on the estimated uncertainty, URMF dynamically adjusts modality contributions during fusion to suppress unreliable evidence. We further optimize the model with a unified objective that combines information bottleneck regularization, modality prior regularization, cross-modal distribution alignment, and uncertainty-driven contrastive learning. Experiments on the public MSD and MMSD2 benchmarks show that URMF outperforms representative unimodal, multimodal, and MLLM-based baselines. The results demonstrate that explicit uncertainty modeling can improve both accuracy and robustness in multimodal sarcasm detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出不确定性感知鲁棒多模态融合框架，通过高斯后验估计模态不确定性并动态调整融合权重，提升多模态讽刺检测的准确性与鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态讽刺检测方法将各模态视为同等可靠，但真实社交媒体中文本与图像的噪声和相关性差异大，导致确定性融合易受噪声干扰并削弱不一致性线索。
analysis.problem: 如何建模模态不确定性并实现鲁棒的多模态融合，以提升讽刺检测在噪声环境下的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出URMF框架：先通过多头交叉注意力将视觉证据注入文本表示，再在融合语义空间应用自注意力增强不一致性推理；将文本、视觉和交互感知表示建模为可学习高斯后验以估计模态不确定性，并据此动态调整融合权重；联合优化信息瓶颈正则化、模态先验正则化、跨模态分布对齐和不确定性驱动对比学习。
contributions: 提出不确定性感知鲁棒多模态融合框架URMF，显式建模模态不确定性并动态调整融合权重。
设计统一优化目标，结合信息瓶颈、模态先验、分布对齐和对比学习。
在MSD和MMSD2基准上超越单模态、多模态及MLLM基线，验证了不确定性建模的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在公共MSD和MMSD2基准上评估，与代表性单模态、多模态及基于MLLM的基线对比，URMF取得最优性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高斯后验假设，未必适用于所有噪声分布。
计算开销可能高于简单融合方法。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出不确定性感知鲁棒多模态融合框架，通过高斯后验估计模态不确定性并动态调整融合权重，提升多模态讽刺检测的准确性与鲁棒性。

papers.title: Enhancing MLLM Spatial Understanding via Active 3D Scene Exploration for Multi-Perspective Reasoning
papers.abstract: Although Multimodal Large Language Models have achieved remarkable progress, they still struggle with complex 3D spatial reasoning due to the reliance on 2D visual priors. Existing approaches typically mitigate this limitation either through computationally expensive post-training procedures on limited 3D datasets or through rigid tool-calling mechanisms that lack explicit geometric understanding and viewpoint flexibility. To address these challenges, we propose a \textit{training-free} framework that introduces a Visual Chain-of-Thought mechanism grounded in explicit 3D reconstruction. The proposed pipeline first reconstructs a high-fidelity 3D mesh from a single image using MLLM-guided keyword extraction and mask generation at multiple granularities. Subsequently, the framework leverages an external knowledge base to iteratively compute optimal camera extrinsic parameters and synthesize novel views, thereby emulating human perspective-taking. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach significantly enhances spatial comprehension. Specifically, the framework outperforms specialized spatial models and general-purpose MLLMs, including \textit{GPT-5.2} and \textit{Gemini-2.5-Flash}, on major benchmarks such as 3DSRBench and Rel3D.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的框架，通过3D重建和视觉思维链增强MLLM空间理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM依赖2D视觉先验，在复杂3D空间推理中表现不佳，而现有方法要么需要昂贵的后训练，要么缺乏几何理解和视角灵活性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行额外训练的情况下，提升MLLM对3D空间的理解和推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出无需训练的框架，包含：1) 利用MLLM引导的关键词提取和多粒度掩码生成，从单张图像重建高保真3D网格；2) 利用外部知识库迭代计算最优相机外参并合成新视角，模拟人类视角转换，实现视觉思维链。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的框架，通过显式3D重建和视觉思维链增强MLLM空间理解。
在3DSRBench和Rel3D等基准上超越专用空间模型和通用MLLM（如GPT-5.2和Gemini-2.5-Flash）。
analysis.experiments: 在3DSRBench和Rel3D基准上评估，框架优于专用空间模型和通用MLLM（包括GPT-5.2和Gemini-2.5-Flash）。
limitations: 依赖单张图像重建3D网格，可能受限于图像质量。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且无需训练，实验显示显著提升，与VLM/MLLM方向强相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的框架，通过3D重建和视觉思维链增强MLLM空间理解。

papers.title: The Traveling Thief Problem with Time Windows: Benchmarks and Heuristics
papers.abstract: While traditional optimization problems were often studied in isolation, many real-world problems today require interdependence among multiple optimization components. The traveling thief problem (TTP) is a multi-component problem that has been widely studied in the literature. In this paper, we introduce and investigate the TTP with time window constraints which provides a TTP variant highly relevant to real-world situations where good can only be collected at given time intervals. We examine adaptions of existing approaches for TTP and the Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP) with time windows to this new problem and evaluate their performance. Furthermore, we provide a new heuristic approach for the TTP with time windows. To evaluate algorithms for TTP with time windows, we introduce new TTP benchmark instances with time windows based on TTP instances existing in the literature. Our experimental investigations evaluate the different approaches and show that the newly designed algorithm outperforms the other approaches on a wide range of benchmark instances.

analysis.tldr: 提出带时间窗的旅行窃贼问题（TTP-TW），设计新启发式算法并构建基准测试集。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实世界中许多优化问题涉及多个相互依赖的组件，但传统研究常孤立处理；旅行窃贼问题（TTP）虽已广泛研究，但缺乏对时间窗约束的考虑，而时间窗在物流等实际场景中至关重要。
analysis.problem: 定义并求解带时间窗的旅行窃贼问题（TTP-TW），即物品只能在特定时间区间内收集的TTP变体。

analysis.method: 改编现有TTP和带时间窗旅行商问题的求解方法，并提出一种新的启发式算法。
contributions: 首次提出带时间窗的旅行窃贼问题（TTP-TW）并形式化定义。
构建基于现有TTP实例的带时间窗基准测试集。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出带时间窗的旅行窃贼问题（TTP-TW），设计新启发式算法并构建基准测试集。

papers.title: Fine-grained Approaches for Confidence Calibration of LLMs in Automated Code Revision
papers.abstract: In today's AI-assisted software engineering landscape, developers increasingly depend on LLMs that are highly capable, yet inherently imperfect. The tendency of these models to produce incorrect outputs can reduce developer productivity. To this end, a canonical mitigation method is to provide calibrated confidence scores that faithfully reflect their likelihood of correctness at the instance-level. Such information allows users to make immediate decisions regarding output acceptance, abstain error-prone outputs, and better align their expectations with the model's capabilities. Since post-trained LLMs do not inherently produce well-calibrated confidence scores, researchers have developed post-hoc calibration methods, with global Platt-scaling of sequence-level confidence scores proving effective in many generative software engineering tasks but remaining unreliable or unexplored for automated code revision (ACR) tasks such as program repair, vulnerability repair, and code refinement. We hypothesise that the coarse-grained nature of this conventional method makes it ill-suited for ACR tasks, where correctness is often determined by local edit decisions and miscalibration can be sample-dependent, thereby motivating fine-grained confidence calibration. To address this, our study proposes local Platt-scaling applied separately to three different fine-grained confidence scores. Through experiments across 3 separate tasks and correctness metrics, as well as 14 different models of various sizes, we find that fine-grained confidence scores consistently achieve lower calibration error across a broader range of probability intervals, and this effect is further amplified when global Platt-scaling is applied. Our proposed approaches offer a practical solution to eliciting well-calibrated confidence scores, enabling more trustworthy and streamlined usage of imperfect models in ACR tasks.

analysis.tldr: 针对自动代码修订任务，提出细粒度置信度校准方法，通过局部Platt缩放显著降低校准误差。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在自动代码修订中常产生错误输出，降低开发者效率；现有全局置信度校准方法粒度粗糙，不适用于局部编辑决定正确性的ACR任务。
analysis.problem: 如何为自动代码修订任务中的LLM输出提供实例级、细粒度的置信度校准，以准确反映正确性概率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全局Platt缩放对ACR任务不可靠，因为正确性由局部编辑决定且误校准具有样本依赖性。
analysis.method: 提出局部Platt缩放方法，分别应用于三种不同的细粒度置信度分数。
contributions: 首次在自动代码修订任务中探索细粒度置信度校准，并证明其有效性。
提出局部Platt缩放方法，在多个任务和模型上持续降低校准误差。
analysis.experiments: 在3个任务（程序修复、漏洞修复、代码精炼）和14个不同规模模型上评估，细粒度置信度分数在更宽概率区间内校准误差更低，且全局Platt缩放可进一步增强效果。
limitations: 仅针对自动代码修订任务，可能不直接适用于其他生成任务。
未讨论细粒度分数选择对结果的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations

papers.title: Exploring 6D Object Pose Estimation with Deformation
papers.abstract: We present DeSOPE, a large-scale dataset for 6DoF deformed objects. Most 6D object pose methods assume rigid or articulated objects, an assumption that fails in practice as objects deviate from their canonical shapes due to wear, impact, or deformation. To model this, we introduce the DeSOPE dataset, which features high-fidelity 3D scans of 26 common object categories, each captured in one canonical state and three deformed configurations, with accurate 3D registration to the canonical mesh. Additionally, it features an RGB-D dataset with 133K frames across diverse scenarios and 665K pose annotations produced via a semi-automatic pipeline. We begin by annotating 2D masks for each instance, then compute initial poses using an object pose method, refine them through an object-level SLAM system, and finally perform manual verification to produce the final annotations. We evaluate several object pose methods and find that performance drops sharply with increasing deformation, suggesting that robust handling of such deformations is critical for practical applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出DeSOPE数据集，用于6D变形物体姿态估计，并发现现有方法在变形场景下性能显著下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有6D物体姿态估计方法大多假设物体是刚体或铰接体，但实际中物体因磨损、冲击或变形会偏离标准形状，导致方法失效，因此需要专门的数据集和方法来应对变形物体。
analysis.problem: 解决变形物体的6D姿态估计问题，缺乏大规模、高精度的变形物体数据集。

提供高精度3D注册和大量RGB-D图像及姿态标注，支持变形场景下的方法评估。
通过实验揭示现有方法在变形物体上的性能瓶颈，推动该方向研究。

limitations: 数据集仅包含26类物体，可能无法覆盖所有实际变形场景。

papers.title: LAST: Leveraging Tools as Hints to Enhance Spatial Reasoning for Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Spatial reasoning is a cornerstone capability for intelligent systems to perceive and interact with the physical world. However, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) frequently suffer from hallucinations and imprecision when parsing complex geometric layouts. As data-driven scaling struggles to internalize structured geometric priors and spatial constraints, integrating mature, specialized vision models presents a compelling alternative. Despite its promise, applying this paradigm to spatial reasoning is hindered by two key challenges: The difficulty of invoking heterogeneous, parameter-rich tools, as well as the challenge of understanding and effectively leveraging their diverse low-level outputs (e.g., segmentation masks, depth maps) in high-level reasoning. To address these challenges, we propose LAST, a unified framework for tool-augmented spatial reasoning. LAST features an extensible interactive sandbox, termed LAST-Box, which abstracts heterogeneous tool invocations into atomic instructions and reusable spatial skills, returning multimodal hints (e.g., annotated images and textual descriptions) that can be directly consumed by LLMs. We further design a three-stage progressive training strategy that guides models from understanding tool outputs to proficient and adaptive tool invocation. Experiments on four datasets show that LAST-7B achieves around 20\% performance gains over its backbone and outperforms strong proprietary closed-source LLMs, substantially enhancing reasoning on complex spatial tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出LAST框架，通过工具增强多模态大模型的空间推理能力，在多个数据集上提升约20%。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在空间推理中常出现幻觉和不精确，数据驱动方法难以内化结构化几何先验，而集成专业视觉模型面临工具调用和输出理解两大挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何有效集成异构、参数丰富的视觉工具，并利用其低级输出（如分割掩码、深度图）提升多模态大模型的空间推理能力。

papers.title: Deep Hierarchical Knowledge Loss for Fault Intensity Diagnosis
papers.abstract: Fault intensity diagnosis (FID) plays a pivotal role in intelligent manufacturing while neglecting dependencies among target classes hinders its practical deployment. This paper introduces a novel and general framework with deep hierarchical knowledge loss (DHK) to achieve hierarchical consistent representation and prediction. We develop a novel hierarchical tree loss to enable a holistic mapping of same-attribute classes, leveraging tree-based positive and negative hierarchical knowledge constraints. We further design a focal hierarchical tree loss to enhance its extensibility and devise two adaptive weighting schemes based on tree height. In addition, we propose a group tree triplet loss with hierarchical dynamic margin by incorporating hierarchical group concepts and tree distance to model boundary structural knowledge across classes. The joint two losses significantly improve the recognition of subtle faults. Extensive experiments are performed on four real-world datasets from various industrial domains (three cavitation datasets from SAMSON AG and one publicly available dataset) for FID, all showing superior results and outperforming recent state-of-the-art FID methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出深度层次知识损失（DHK）框架，利用层次树损失和组树三元组损失实现故障强度诊断中的层次一致表示与预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 故障强度诊断（FID）在智能制造中至关重要，但现有方法忽略了目标类别间的依赖关系，限制了实际部署效果。

papers.title: HQF-Net: A Hybrid Quantum-Classical Multi-Scale Fusion Network for Remote Sensing Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Remote sensing semantic segmentation requires models that can jointly capture fine spatial details and high-level semantic context across complex scenes. While classical encoder-decoder architectures such as U-Net remain strong baselines, they often struggle to fully exploit global semantics and structured feature interactions. In this work, we propose HQF-Net, a hybrid quantum-classical multi-scale fusion network for remote sensing image segmentation. HQF-Net integrates multi-scale semantic guidance from a frozen DINOv3 ViT-L/16 backbone with a customized U-Net architecture through a Deformable Multiscale Cross-Attention Fusion (DMCAF) module. To enhance feature refinement, the framework further introduces quantum-enhanced skip connections (QSkip) and a Quantum bottleneck with Mixture-of-Experts (QMoE), which combines complementary local, global, and directional quantum circuits within an adaptive routing mechanism. Experiments on three remote sensing benchmarks show consistent improvements with the proposed design. HQF-Net achieves 0.8568 mIoU and 96.87% overall accuracy on LandCover.ai, 71.82% mIoU on OpenEarthMap, and 55.28% mIoU with 99.37% overall accuracy on SeasoNet. An architectural ablation study further confirms the contribution of each major component. These results show that structured hybrid quantum-classical feature processing is a promising direction for improving remote sensing semantic segmentation under near-term quantum constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合量子-经典多尺度融合网络HQF-Net，用于遥感图像分割，在三个基准上取得一致提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感语义分割需要同时捕捉精细空间细节和高层语义上下文，经典编码器-解码器架构（如U-Net）难以充分利用全局语义和结构化特征交互。
analysis.problem: 如何设计混合量子-经典网络以增强遥感图像分割中的特征提取与融合能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: HQF-Net集成冻结的DINOv3 ViT-L/16骨干的多尺度语义引导与定制U-Net架构，通过可变形多尺度交叉注意力融合模块（DMCAF）连接，并引入量子增强跳跃连接（QSkip）和量子混合专家瓶颈（QMoE），后者通过自适应路由机制组合互补的局部、全局和方向性量子电路。
contributions: 提出HQF-Net，一种混合量子-经典多尺度融合网络，用于遥感图像分割。
引入量子增强跳跃连接（QSkip）和量子混合专家瓶颈（QMoE），提升特征细化能力。

analysis.experiments: 在LandCover.ai、OpenEarthMap和SeasoNet三个遥感基准上评估，HQF-Net在LandCover.ai上达到0.8568 mIoU和96.87%总体精度，在OpenEarthMap上达到71.82% mIoU，在SeasoNet上达到55.28% mIoU和99.37%总体精度。还进行了架构消融研究。
limitations: 量子组件可能受限于当前量子硬件约束，实际部署效率未讨论。
方法复杂度较高，可能难以扩展到更大规模或实时应用。
